Name: AI-Powered Automated Research Report Generator
Description: This n8n workflow automates research report creation using OpenAI GPT-4 for query refinement and summarization, Wikipedia, NewsAPI, Google Custom Search, SerpApi for scholarly papers, and integrates PDFShift for PDF generation. Reports are sent via Gmail and Telegram, streamlining professional research delivery.

Name: AI Social Video Generator & Auto Social Posting
Description: An automated n8n workflow leveraging Telegram, GPT-4, Kling AI video API, Cloudinary, and Blotato to create AI videos with voice-over and captions, then auto-publish to Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, Twitter (X), LinkedIn, Threads, Bluesky, and Pinterest.

Name: n8n AI & App Node Reference Library
Description: Comprehensive n8n workflow showcasing various AI nodes (OpenAI, Langchain agents, Anthropic, Google Gemini) and app integrations (Google Suite, Dropbox, Bitly, Reddit, YouTube, etc.) designed as a visual reference for automation and AI-enhanced workflow building.

Name: AI Social Video Auto-Creation & Multi-Platform Posting
Description: Automates video creation from Telegram prompts or images using AI (GPT-4, Piapi, Blotato), merges voice-over and captions, saves metadata to Google Sheets, and auto-publishes videos to 9 social platforms (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, Threads, Twitter, LinkedIn, Bluesky, Pinterest) via Blotato API.

Name: AI-Driven Sales Meeting Follow-Up Scheduler
Description: An n8n workflow automating sales follow-ups using Google Calendar and Gmail APIs. It retrieves past meetings, checks email interaction, uses OpenAI GPT-4 powered AI agents to suggest and book next meeting slots, with human approval for final booking. Supports calendar management and contextualized follow-ups.

Name: Google Calendar to Outlook Sync
Description: Automates syncing Google Calendar events to Microsoft Outlook. Uses Google Calendar triggers for event creation/cancellation and Outlook API to create/delete events, including email notifications on cancellations. Integrates Google Calendar and Microsoft Outlook APIs via n8n.

Name: AI Conversational Agent with External Tools
Description: An AI chatbot workflow using OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini, integrated with SerpAPI and Wikipedia for enhanced real-time info retrieval. It stores recent chat history in a 20-message buffer to maintain context, enabling dynamic, informed human-like conversations.

Name: RAG AI Agent with Milvus & Cohere
Description: Automates Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) using Cohere embeddings, Milvus vector DB, OpenAI GPT-4o, and Google Drive. Upload PDFs to Drive, auto-embed and store in Milvus, then query via an AI chat agent for contextual AI responses.

Name: Incident Management: PagerDuty, Jira & Mattermost
Description: Automates incident lifecycle by integrating PagerDuty, Jira, and Mattermost. Creates Jira issues from PagerDuty incidents, updates statuses on acknowledgment & resolution, and posts real-time messages with interactive buttons in Mattermost channels.

Name: Two-Way Sync Between Pipedrive and MySQL
Description: Automates bidirectional data synchronization between Pipedrive CRM and a MySQL database. Utilizes n8n nodes including Pipedrive API, MySQL integration, dataset comparison, and conditional logic to create, update, and maintain consistent contact records.

Name: Event Attendee Automation with Mattermost & Google
Description: Automates attendee registration for events using Typeform, Google Sheets, Mattermost chat, Google Calendar, and Gmail. It registers attendees, creates Mattermost accounts, adds them to teams/channels, updates event calendars, and sends confirmation emails.

Name: Phishing URL Analyzer with URLScan and VirusTotal
Description: Automates phishing URL detection from unread Outlook emails by extracting URLs, scanning via URLScan.io and VirusTotal APIs, and sending detailed Slack alerts. Integrates Microsoft Outlook, Python ioc-finder lib, URLScan.io, VirusTotal, and Slack for automated cybersecurity threat analysis.

Name: AI Meeting Summary & Follow-Up Scheduler
Description: Automates extraction of Google Meet transcripts, uses OpenAI-powered AI agent to summarize meetings, identify key points, and schedule follow-up Google Calendar events with attendees. Integrates Google Calendar, Google Drive, Google Meet APIs, and OpenAI Langchain AI agent.

Name: AI-Powered Calendar Assistant with PDF Q&A
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4o, Pinecone vector store, Google Calendar API, and Langchain to automate appointment booking with Max Tkacz, classify emails, and enable chat-based Q&A on PDFs like the BTC whitepaper, all via a chat interface and Slack notifications.

Name: AI Meeting Task & Scheduling Assistant
Description: Automates meeting transcript processing from Fireflies using OpenAI GPT-4 to create Airtable tasks, notify clients via Gmail, and schedule follow-up calls in Google Calendar. Streamlines project management by converting meeting notes into actionable workflows.

Name: AI Real-Time Meeting Transcription & Notes
Description: Automates real-time meeting transcription and note-taking using Recall.ai for transcription, OpenAI GPT-4 for AI insights, and Supabase/Postgres for data storage. Captures, structures, and analyzes meeting dialogue for productivity boosts.

Name: AI Google Calendar Assistant with OpenAI
Description: n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4o and Google Calendar API to create and retrieve calendar events. It uses Langchain for AI agent management, supports natural language chat input, and dynamic memory buffer for session context.

Name: Airtable PDF Data Extractor with LLM Automation
Description: Automates extraction of data from PDFs stored in Airtable using dynamic prompts and OpenAI LLM. Utilizes Airtable webhooks, PDF extraction, LangChain LLM nodes, and HTTP requests for real-time AI-based field updates in Airtable records.

Name: AI Triathlon Coach with Strava & Gemini
Description: Automates personalized triathlon coaching by analyzing Strava activity data using Google Gemini (PaLM) AI. Generates detailed, motivational feedback and improvement plans for swimming, cycling, and running, then formats and sends insights via email or WhatsApp.

Name: AI Company Research & Data Enrichment
Description: Automates company info research using n8n with OpenAI GPT-4, SerpAPI, ScrapingBee, and Google Sheets. Extracts data like domain, LinkedIn URL, pricing, plans, APIs, integrations, and case studies for B2B/B2C markets, enabling scalable enrichment workflows.

Name: AI-Powered ERPNext Recruitment Automation
Description: Automates candidate screening and job application processing by integrating ERPNext ERP, Google Gemini AI, and communication tools like WhatsApp and Outlook. Extracts resume text, evaluates fit via AI scoring, updates ERPNext with decisions, and notifies applicants.

Name: Google Sheets to Google Calendar Event Automation
Description: Automates creation of Google Calendar events from new rows in Google Sheets using n8n. Integrates Google Sheets API for event data retrieval and Google Calendar API for event creation, including date formatting, event details, and color-coding for efficient event management.

Name: Automated Blog Writer & Publisher
Description: An n8n workflow automating blog content creation and publishing. Uses Google Sheets for scheduling/configuration, OpenAI (via OpenRouter) for AI content generation, and WordPress XML-RPC API for posting. Includes data preprocessing, content merging, and status logging to Sheets.

Name: AI-Powered Interview Scheduling Assistant
Description: An automated interview scheduler using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini and Google Calendar APIs. It checks calendar availability, generates 30-min weekday slots (9am-5pm EST), interacts via AI chat to gather candidate info, and books interviews without double booking.

Name: AI Document Note Generator from Folder
Description: Automates note creation by monitoring a folder for new docs (PDF, DOCX, TEXT), extracting and summarizing content using Mistral Cloud LLM, LangChain text splitter, and Qdrant vector store. Generates study guides, timelines, and briefings, then exports files locally.

Name: Auto-Post to 9 Social Platforms
Description: Automates video publishing across Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Facebook, LinkedIn, Threads, Twitter, Bluesky, and Pinterest using n8n, Google Sheets, and Blotato API. Scheduled to fetch video data, upload it, then post simultaneously to all platforms without manual effort.

Name: Google Drive Document QA with Pinecone & OpenAI
Description: Automates Q&A on documents fetched from Google Drive by indexing text chunks into Pinecone vector DB using OpenAI embeddings. Supports chat queries with contextual answers and citations. Tech stack: Google Drive API, Pinecone vector DB, OpenAI embeddings & chat models, n8n automation.

Name: Audio Transcription and Summary with OpenAI & Google Drive
Description: Automates audio file transcription and summarization using OpenAI's API, stores raw and processed transcripts as JSON and markdown in Google Drive, and sends notifications via Gmail and Telegram. Includes optional user approval and advanced transcript structuring.

Name: AI-Powered Gmail Reply Draft Automation
Description: Automates email reply drafting by fetching Gmail threads with specific labels, sending email content to OpenAI Assistant for a reply, generating HTML, and saving drafts in Gmail. Utilizes Gmail API, OpenAI API, and n8n automation platform.

Name: AI-Powered Dynamic User Interview Workflow
Description: Automates AI-driven user interviews using n8n forms, Groq LLM, Redis session management (via Upstash), and Google Sheets for transcript storage. It dynamically asks interview questions, records answers in sessions, and displays transcripts on completion.

Name: Adaptive RAG Query Processor
Description: An n8n workflow utilizing Google Gemini and Qdrant vector store to classify user queries into Factual, Analytical, Opinion, or Contextual types, and adaptively retrieve and generate precise answers with tailored strategies for each query type.

Name: Trustpilot Reviews Insight Generator
Description: Automates scraping Trustpilot reviews, stores embeddings in Qdrant vector DB, clusters reviews using K-means, summarizes insights via OpenAI GPT-4, and exports results to Google Sheets. Stack: n8n (automation), Trustpilot (reviews), Qdrant (vector DB), OpenAI (LLM), Google Sheets.

Name: AI-Powered Gmail Spam & Marketing Filter
Description: An n8n workflow that automates Gmail inbox cleaning by classifying emails as unwanted, marketing, or spam using Google Gemini AI. It deletes flagged emails and sends Telegram notifications about deletions or skips. Integrates Gmail API, Google PaLM AI, and Telegram API.

Name: Tech Radar AI Insight & Sync
Description: Automates syncing Tech Radar data from Google Sheets into MySQL and Google Docs, enriches it using Google Gemini embeddings and Pinecone vector store, and provides AI-powered querying via RAG and SQL agents for strategic tech adoption insights across multiple companies.

Name: AI-Powered Incident Management with NocoDB
Description: Automates incident ticketing by integrating NocoDB for data storage, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for AI-driven incident categorization, Slack and SMTP for notifications. Streamlines issue reporting, AI prioritization, and timely alerts for clients and assignees.

Name: AI-Driven HR Job Application Workflow
Description: Automates job applications with a custom form, uploads CVs to Google Drive, stores data in Airtable, uses OpenAI GPT for candidate scoring, generates interview questions, emails candidates, schedules interviews via Google Calendar, and tracks hiring stages.

Name: AI-Powered Resume & Interview Screening
Description: Automates hiring by extracting data from resumes submitted via forms, scoring candidates using Google Gemini LLM, ElevenLabs AI voice interviews, and updating Notion ATS & Google Sheets for holistic candidate evaluation and interview management.

Name: Automated AI CV Screening & Notification
Description: This n8n workflow automates candidate CV screening using Google Gemini (PaLM) AI for resume analysis and ratings, sends email confirmations to applicants and notifications to HR, and logs candidate data in Google Sheets. It integrates Gmail, Google Sheets, PDF extraction, and LangChain AI models to streamline HR processes.

Name: Airtable to telli AI Voice Call Automation
Description: Automate scheduling AI voice-agent calls by syncing Airtable CRM contacts with telli's API. Uses Airtable Trigger node, HTTP requests to telli's /add-contact and /schedule-call endpoints. Ideal for lead qualification, reminders, and feedback calls.

Name: WP CF7 Contact Form Auto Response & Classification
Description: Automates classification and drafting of responses to WordPress Contact Form 7 inquiries using Google Gemini AI and Gmail API. Saves categorized responses to Google Sheets, streamlining customer support for businesses handling diverse requests.

Name: Gmail AI Auto-Responder Draft Creator
Description: Automates Gmail replies by detecting if an incoming email needs a response using OpenAI GPT-4o, then drafts professional replies in the thread via Gmail API. Utilizes n8n workflow with Gmail OAuth2, LangChain nodes, and OpenAI GPT models for smart email management.

Name: AI Web Search Agent with Memory
Description: An n8n workflow combining OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini, SearchAPI.io, and LangChain to create an AI agent that performs web searches on demand. It uses SearchAPI as a tool and retains recent chat context with a sliding memory buffer for smarter responses.

Description: Automates capturing new Notion pages, filters out non-text blocks, concatenates content, generates 768-dim embeddings using Google Gemini (PaLM) API, and inserts vectors with metadata into Pinecone vector store for semantic search and retrieval.

Name: Notion to Linear Issue Importer
Description: Automates issue creation in Linear from Notion blocks. Uses Notion API to fetch tasks, OpenAI GPT-4 to shorten titles, and Linear GraphQL API to create issues and assign team members based on extracted data. Ideal for integrating task management between Notion and Linear.

Description: Automate monthly archiving of Spotify liked tracks into Google Sheets, enrich with Spotify audio features, and classify tracks into playlists using Anthropic Claude 3.5 AI. Integrates Spotify API, Google Sheets, and AI for seamless music organization and historical tracking.

Name: TechFin Customer Support Automation
Description: Automates customer support by integrating Voiceflow, Zendesk, Google Sheets, Google Calendar, and Airtable via n8n workflows. It fetches customer data, creates Zendesk tickets, schedules meetings, and logs transcripts for product analysis, streamlining tech customer success processes.

Name: Selenium Web Scraper with OpenAI Analysis
Description: An advanced n8n workflow integrating Selenium via Docker, Google Search, and OpenAI GPT-4 to extract, analyze, and retrieve web data even behind login or restricted access. Supports cookie injection, screenshots, proxy use, and AI-based info extraction for dynamic web scraping.

Name: Automated AI-Powered JIRA Issue Resolver
Description: An n8n workflow automates the management of unresolved JIRA issues using OpenAI GPT-4 models, Jira and Notion APIs, and Slack integration. It classifies issues, attempts AI-based resolution via knowledgebase search, performs sentiment analysis, posts comments, closes tickets, and notifies Slack channels, enhancing customer support efficiency.

Name: AI-Powered User Interview Workflow
Description: Automates user interviews with AI-driven question generation and session management using n8n forms, Langchain AI agent (Groq Chat Model), Redis for session storage, and Google Sheets for transcript saving. Efficient tool for scalable qualitative research.

Name: AI Meeting Prep & WhatsApp Notification
Description: Automates meeting preparation by checking upcoming Google Calendar events, extracting attendee details from invites, summarizing recent Gmail and LinkedIn correspondence using OpenAI GPT-4, and sending concise WhatsApp pre-meeting notifications. Integrates Google Calendar, Gmail, Apify web scraping, and WhatsApp API.

Name: Automated API Schema Crawler & Extractor
Description: An n8n workflow that automates researching API documentation for services, scraping relevant pages using Apify, extracting REST API operations with Google Gemini LLM, storing data via Qdrant vector DB, and saving results in Google Sheets and Drive. Tech stack: Google Sheets, Google Drive, Apify web scraper, Qdrant vector store, Google Gemini LLM, n8n orchestrator.

Name: Automated Candidate Shortlisting for ERPNext
Description: n8n workflow automates recruitment by integrating ERPNext with AI models (Google Gemini) to evaluate resumes against job descriptions, scoring and justifying candidate fit. Uses PDF extraction, HTTP API, and communication via Outlook and WhatsApp.

Name: Airtable PDF Data Extractor with AI
Description: Automates extraction of data from PDFs in Airtable using dynamic prompts and AI/LLM. Utilizes Airtable API, n8n nodes, and OpenAI models to update records based on webhook-triggered events. Ideal for enriching Airtable data with AI-powered document processing.

Name: AI-Powered Calendar Appointment Scheduler
Description: An intelligent n8n workflow using OpenAI GPT-4, Microsoft Outlook API, and Langchain to handle customer chat, check calendar availability, suggest free slots within UK business hours, and book appointments or escalate to human support with detailed email notifications.

Description: An AI phone agent workflow using RetellAI for voice calls, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for transcript summarization, RAG with Qdrant vector DB for knowledge retrieval, and Google Calendar for appointment booking. Sends summaries via Telegram and automates customer support calls effectively.

Description: Automates in-depth survey analysis by importing Google Sheets responses, vectorizing with OpenAI embeddings, clustering via K-means in Qdrant, and summarizing insights with GPT-4. Exports detailed sentiment and trends back to Sheets for actionable survey insights.

Description: n8n workflow automates graphic design from prompt to final image review using Ideogram API, OpenAI GPT-4 for image prompt evaluation, Google Drive and Sheets for storage and logging, and Gmail for notifications. Tailored for creative teams producing audience-optimized visuals.

Description: Automates UTM link creation with custom parameters, stores links in Airtable, generates QR codes via QuickChart, and schedules Google Analytics reports analyzed by OpenAI GPT-4. Integrates OpenAI, Airtable, Google Analytics, Gmail, and QuickChart APIs for marketing campaign tracking.

Name: AI-Powered Visual Regression Testing Workflow
Description: Automates visual regression testing by comparing webpage screenshots using Google Gemini AI vision model, Apify screenshot API, Google Drive & Sheets, and Linear for issue tracking. Detects UI changes and reports them automatically.

Description: An n8n workflow that integrates OpenAI GPT-4 with a SQL database to answer user data queries. It dynamically determines if a chart is needed, generates Chart.js definitions via OpenAI, and produces visual charts using Quickchart.io for enhanced data analysis and visualization.

Name: AI Workplace Discrimination Analysis
Description: Automates extraction and analysis of workplace discrimination patterns by scraping Glassdoor reviews using ScrapingBee, analyzing demographic ratings with OpenAI, and visualizing disparities via QuickChart. Identifies biased experiences across demographic groups with statistical insights.

Name: Semantic Web Search & Result Re-Ranking

Ideal for research with AI-powered query optimization and detailed result extraction.

Name: AI-Powered Autonomous Research Workflow
Description: An advanced n8n workflow automating deep research by generating search queries via LLM (OpenRouter), querying SerpAPI (Google Search), analyzing content with Jina AI, referencing Wikipedia, and synthesizing a comprehensive report using LangChain agents and memory buffers.

Name: AI Knowledge Base Article Generator

Description: Automates monitoring of RSS feeds with AI using OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini for relevance classification and article summarization, Jina AI for content extraction, Google Sheets for data storage, and Slack for delivering formatted summaries. Keeps teams informed about relevant topics efficiently.

Description: An n8n workflow for detecting suspicious logins using GreyNoise API for IP threat intelligence, IP-API for geolocation, UserParser for user agent analysis, and Postgres for login history. It prioritizes alerts and notifies via Slack and email for security response.

Description: Automates Zoom meeting data retrieval, transcript extraction, and participant info to generate formal meeting summaries using OpenAI GPT-4. Integrates with ClickUp for task creation and Microsoft Outlook for scheduling follow-ups. Sends summary emails via SMTP.

Name: AI-Powered Google Calendar Assistant
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4 via Langchain with Google Calendar API to create, update, get, and delete calendar events intelligently. Handles single and attendee events, using AI to interpret user queries and manage schedules seamlessly.

Description: An AI-driven email management workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4o with Gmail API to automate composing, sending, replying, drafting, labeling, and managing emails efficiently. Designed for professional HTML emails signed as 'Nate'.

Description: Automate scraping of Google Maps data using SERPAPI API in n8n, processing results, removing duplicates, and updating a Google Sheets document with detailed place info like phone, website, ratings, and reviews. Includes scheduling and error handling.

Description: Automates code review for GitLab merge requests by analyzing diffs and providing AI-generated feedback using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini. Integrates GitLab API, n8n workflow, and LangChain for automated, high-quality code review comments.

Description: Automates fetching HelloFresh weekly menus, extracts recipe details, stores them in a Qdrant vector store and SQLite DB, and enables AI-powered recipe recommendations via Mistral Cloud embeddings and chat model, using Langchain, Qdrant, and n8n's workflow capabilities.

Name: AI-Powered Document Note Generator
Description: Automates note creation by watching a folder for new files, extracting content from PDF/DOCX/TXT, summarizing and vectorizing using Mistral Cloud and Qdrant, then generates study guides, timelines, and briefing docs via AI agents.

Name: AI Competitor Research & Report Generator

Name: AI-Powered PDF QA & Appointment Scheduler
Description: An n8n workflow that integrates OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic, Pinecone vector store, and Google Calendar API to load PDFs, create embeddings, enable Q&A over documents, categorize emails with AI, and book calendar appointments via chat-based interface.

Name: Survey Response Insights Generator
Description: Automates detailed insights generation from Google Sheets survey data by vectorizing responses with OpenAI embeddings, clustering with K-means in Qdrant vector store, and summarizing groups via GPT-4. Outputs enriched insights sheet with sentiment analysis.

Name: Trustpilot Reviews Insight Generator
Description: Automates extraction, clustering, and summarization of Trustpilot reviews using n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4, Qdrant vector store, and K-means clustering for actionable customer insights. Outputs results to Google Sheets for analysis.

Name: Notion AI Assistant Workflow Generator
Description: Generates an n8n AI Agent workflow to query any Notion database using the provided URL. Utilizes Notion API, Langchain AI nodes (Anthropic and OpenAI), JSON validation, and chat triggers for interactive assistant creation.

Name: AI-Powered Visual Regression Testing Workflow
Description: Automates website visual regression testing using Google Sheets for URLs, Apify for screenshots, Google Drive for storage, and Google Gemini AI Vision model for comparing changes. Results generate detailed reports in Linear.app.

Name: AI Calendar & Notion Task Manager
Description: An AI-powered n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4, Google Calendar, and Notion APIs to automate scheduling events and managing tasks. It uses LangChain agents, chat triggers, and memory buffers to route user chat inputs to appropriate tools for calendar and task operations.

Description: An n8n workflow that uses Gmail API and OpenAI GPT to automatically read, categorize, and label incoming Gmail messages. It polls Gmail every 5 minutes, analyzes emails using OpenAI, matches or creates Gmail labels accordingly, and assigns labels, optimizing inbox organization.

Name: AI-Powered JIRA Stale Issue Auto-Assignment
Description: Automates assignment of stale JIRA issues using OpenAI embeddings and Langchain. Utilizes Supabase vector database to find similar resolved issues and identifies best suited team members by workload, auto-assigning and commenting in JIRA to keep backlog manageable.

Name: Voice AI Appointment Scheduler with Google & Airtable
Description: Automates appointment booking, rescheduling, and cancellation via a voice AI receptionist using Vapi, Google Calendar, and Airtable. Includes availability checks, event management, and logging call recordings and details for HVAC service scheduling.

Name: AI-Powered Outlook Calendar Assistant
Description: Automate Outlook calendar management via Slack with an AI agent using OpenAI for natural language understanding and Microsoft Outlook API for calendar event search, creation, and retrieval. Enables conversational calendar assistance and event handling.

Name: Google Drive File Deduplication Automator
Description: Automates detection and handling of duplicate files in Google Drive using Google Drive API with n8n. Features configurable options to keep first or last duplicate and either flag by renaming or move duplicates to trash, improving file organization and storage efficiency.

Description: Automates daily auditing of recently modified Google Drive documents using Google Drive API, Google Sheets for reporting, and Gmail for sending alerts. Identifies files shared publicly or with external users, logs details in a new Google Sheet, and emails a summary report for improved access control.

Name: Monthly Financial Performance Report Automation

Description: Automates triaging and resolution of JIRA support tickets using scheduled triggers, JIRA API, and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for labeling, prioritizing, rewriting, and suggesting fixes by analyzing new and past resolved tickets with comments.

Description: An n8n workflow automating raw material receipt, stock updates, issue requests, and approvals. Integrates webhooks, Google Sheets, Supabase DB, and Gmail to streamline inventory management and send low stock alerts with email notifications.

Name: AI-Powered Web Data to Vector DB Workflow
Description: Automates extraction, formatting, and vectorization of web data using Bright Data API, Google Gemini models, Langchain nodes, and Pinecone vector database for building AI-ready datasets for LLMs.

Name: AI Exam Question Generator from Google Docs
Description: Automates creating open and multiple-choice exam questions from Google Docs content using OpenAI embeddings, Google Gemini LLM, and Qdrant vector database for retrieval-augmented generation and question-answering.

Name: API Schema Crawler, Extractor & Generator

Description: Automates local folder monitoring and syncs file data as vector embeddings to Qdrant vector database. Uses Mistral Cloud AI for embeddings and chat model, enabling AI Q&A on updated files. Stack: n8n, Local File Trigger, Qdrant API, Mistral Cloud, Langchain nodes.

Name: AI SQL Query Generator from DB Schema
Description: An n8n workflow using MySQL, OpenAI GPT-4o, and LangChain to convert database schema into executable SQL queries via AI chat. It extracts schema from MySQL, stores locally, then generates SQL on chat input, executing queries and returning results seamlessly.

Name: Automated Weekly Reddit Trend PR Report
Description: Automates weekly discovery of trending Reddit posts on chosen topics. Extracts top comments, performs sentiment and content analysis with Anthropic Claude AI, enriches with article content via Jina API, then generates and uploads comprehensive PR story reports to Google Drive and shares via Mattermost. Tech stack: Reddit API, Anthropic Claude, Jina AI, Google Drive, Mattermost webhook.

Name: AI-Powered SMS Appointment Scheduler
Description: Automates PC/laptop repair appointment scheduling via SMS using Twilio, Airtable, OpenAI's GPT, and Cal.com API. Manages sessions, handles booking actions (create/reschedule/cancel), and sends follow-ups with STOP opt-out support.

Name: AI-Powered Job Application with CV Parsing
Description: n8n workflow automates job applications by processing PDF CV uploads via form triggers, classifying documents with OpenAI, extracting relevant data using LLMs contextualized by job posts, and storing details including PDF in Airtable ATS. Includes multi-step user form with AI-assisted pre-fill.

Name: AI-Powered HR Job Application & Interview Automation
Description: Automates job application intake, CV storage, AI-driven candidate scoring, questionnaire generation, interview scheduling, and communication using n8n, Airtable, Google Drive, Google Calendar, and OpenAI GPT models.

Name: Semantic Web Search Query & Results Re-Ranker
Description: An n8n workflow that automates intelligent web search query generation and semantic re-ranking of results using Brave Web Search API and advanced language models (Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT). It refines user questions, ranks top search results, and extracts key info for precise answers.

Name: Invoice Data Extraction & Reconciliation
Description: Automates invoice processing by watching Gmail for PDF invoices, uploading them to LlamaParse API for parsing, extracting structured invoice data using OpenAI GPT-3.5, and appending results to Google Sheets for reconciliation. Incorporates label management to avoid duplicate processing.

Name: AI WhatsApp Customer Support Assistant
Description: An AI-powered customer support chatbot for WhatsApp that dynamically crawls and extracts real-time website info using Langchain tools (list_links, get_page), OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and Postgres memory. Enables brands to deliver on-demand, accurate support directly on WhatsApp.

Name: Zoom AI Meeting Assistant
Description: Automates Zoom meeting transcription processing to create summaries, action items, and schedule follow-ups using Zoom API, Anthropic Claude AI, ClickUp, and Microsoft Outlook integrations with n8n workflow automation.

Name: GitLab Merge Request Auto Review & Risk Assessment
Description: An n8n workflow automating GitLab MR review by fetching diffs, using Anthropic Claude AI for risk assessment, issues, recommendations, and test case generation, then posting comments and emailing relevant dev & QA teams. Integrates GitLab API, Anthropic AI, and Gmail.

Name: AI-Powered Personal Assistant with Google APIs
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Google Gemini Chat AI, Google Calendar, Gmail, and Google Sheets to create an AI personal assistant. It manages calendar events, emails, contacts in Sheets, and supports conversational interactions via an MCP server and client setup.

Name: AI Invoice & Document Parser with LlamaParse
Description: Automates extraction, classification, and summarization of documents from Gmail using LlamaParse API, OpenAI GPT models, and Google Drive/Sheets. Extracts invoice details as JSON, saves files, sends Telegram notifications, and organizes data for streamlined accounting and insights.

Name: Weekly Online Marketing Report Generator
Description: Automates weekly retrieval, analysis, and reporting of online marketing data using Google Analytics, Google Ads API, Meta Ads (Facebook Graph API), and OpenAI GPT-4 for AI-powered insights and summaries. Sends detailed HTML email and Telegram report.

Name: AI Job Hunt POV Video Creator
Description: Automates creation of short-form job hunting videos using OpenAI for captions & scripts, PiAPI Flux for image generation, Kling for video, ElevenLabs for voiceovers, Creatomate for final rendering, Google Sheets for ideas, and uploads to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook, LinkedIn via upload-post.com.

Name: n8n Ultimate Selenium Web Scraper
Description: Automates advanced web scraping with Selenium and OpenAI GPT-4 integration. Uses Selenium Chrome container, residential proxies, Google search, cookie injection for session-based scraping, and AI-driven info extraction from screenshots and text for data on dynamic or login-protected websites.

Name: CoinMarketCap AI Crypto Analyst Bot
Description: An n8n AI workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4o Mini with CoinMarketCap APIs via modular agents for real-time crypto market analytics, token data, exchange insights, and decentralized DEX liquidity. Outputs interactive replies through Telegram.

Name: Animated Story Creation with GPT-4o-mini, Midjourney, Kling & Creatomate
Description: Automates creation of animated story videos using GPT-4o-mini for story prompts, Midjourney for images, Kling for video generation, and Creatomate for final video editing. Ideal for generating engaging animated content from text prompts via APIs.

Name: Monthly Spotify Track Archiving & AI Playlist Classifier
Description: Automate monthly archiving of Spotify liked tracks and playlists into Google Sheets, then use Anthropic Claude 3.5 AI to classify tracks into playlists. Utilizes Spotify API, Google Sheets, and Anthropic AI for advanced music management.

Name: Video Frame Extraction and AI Narration
Description: Automates video downloading, frame extraction using OpenCV, script generation with GPT-4 multimodal LLM, and text-to-speech audio creation via OpenAI API. The workflow batches image frames, creates narration scripts, synthesizes voiceovers, and uploads results to Google Drive.

Name: AI-Powered Weekly Tech Newsletter
Description: Automates fetching tech news from multiple RSS feeds, processes with OpenAI embeddings and GPT-4 summarization, and sends a personalized weekly newsletter via Gmail. Uses n8n, OpenAI API, RSS feeds, and Gmail integration to deliver curated tech updates based on user interests.

Name: Notion DB AI Assistant Generator
Description: Generates an n8n AI Agent workflow to query any Notion database using URLs. Utilizes Notion API, Anthropic and OpenAI language models, LangChain agents, and advanced JSON validation. Automates creating custom AI chatbots for dynamic Notion DB schemas.

Name: Automated Daily n8n Workflow Backups to Google Drive
Description: Automates daily backup of n8n workflows by fetching workflow JSON via n8n API, saving to timestamped Google Drive folders using Google Drive API, retains only last 7 days backups with auto-deletion, and sends completion notifications via Telegram API.

Name: AI-Powered Autonomous Research Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow automating deep research by generating multiple search queries with LLMs, fetching data via SerpAPI and Jina AI, extracting relevant info, and compiling comprehensive markdown reports. Integrates OpenRouter LLM, SerpAPI, Jina AI, and Wikipedia.

Name: AI SQL Query Generator from Database Schema
Description: This n8n workflow uses MySQL to extract database schemas, stores them locally, and combines with OpenAI's GPT-4o via LangChain AI Agent to generate SQL queries based only on the schema and user chat input. It automates SQL generation without executing queries directly.

Name: AI Agent with Long-Term Memory & Tools Router
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4o-mini and Google Docs for AI agent long-term memory storage and retrieval. It dynamically routes tasks like saving memories, retrieving them, and sending notifications via Gmail and Telegram to enhance AI chatbot contextual understanding and multi-channel communication.

Name: Parents Smart Assistant Bot
Description: An intelligent personal assistant for busy parents using Telegram, OpenAI (GPT-3.5, embeddings, audio transcription), Qdrant vector DB, Tavily web search, and Wikipedia API. It routes requests to specialized agents for calendar, email, contacts, content creation, and calculations, responding warmly in Hebrew.

Name: Vision-Based AI Webpage Scraper with Sheets
Description: An advanced n8n workflow integrating Google Sheets, ScrapingBee API, and Google's Gemini-1.5-Pro AI model for vision-based scraping. It extracts structured e-commerce data from webpage screenshots and falls back to HTML scraping if needed, saving data back to Sheets.

Name: Gmail Automation MCP Server
Description: An n8n workflow serving as an MCP (multi-command processor) for Gmail. It integrates Gmail OAuth2 API with multiple nodes to perform email operations (get, search, reply, delete, label management, drafts, threads) via a webhook SSE server, enabling AI-driven email management.

Name: AI-Powered Appointment Scheduling with Approval
Description: Automate appointment requests with multi-step n8n forms, AI enquiry classification and summarization (OpenAI), Gmail approval workflow, and Google Calendar event creation. Enhances user experience with terms acceptance and conditional scheduling.

Name: AI-Powered n8n Workflow Credential Explorer
Description: An n8n workflow that extracts credentials info from all workflows via n8n API, stores them in SQLite, and enables querying via an AI agent using OpenAI's Chat API. Simplifies searching which workflows use specific app credentials.

Name: Google Drive to Pinecone RAG with OpenRouter & Gemini
Description: Automates document ingestion from Google Drive, splits text contextually, generates embeddings using Google Gemini, and stores vectors in Pinecone. Uses OpenRouter chat model and Langchain for AI context-aware chunking to enhance retrieval-based generation workflows.

Name: Google Ads Keyword Generator with Search Volumes
Description: Automates generation of SEO keywords with monthly search volumes using Google Ads API v18. Integrates n8n with Google Sheets for data storage. Helps SEO and marketing teams find valuable keywords for campaigns with competition and bid metrics.

Name: UTM Link & QR Code Generator with GA Reports
Description: Automates creation of UTM tagged links and QR codes, stores them in Airtable, and schedules Google Analytics reports analyzed by OpenAI GPT-4. Integrates n8n with OpenAI, Google Analytics, Airtable, and QuickChart APIs for streamlined marketing campaign tracking and executive reporting.

Name: Google Drive Audio Transcription & Summary to Notion
Description: Automates transcription of audio files uploaded to a Google Drive folder using OpenAI Whisper, summarizes content with GPT-4 Turbo, and sends structured summaries to Notion. Integrates Google Drive, OpenAI API, and Notion for efficient audio documentation workflows.

Name: WhatsApp AI Sales Agent with Product Brochure
Description: Automate customer support on WhatsApp using n8n integrated with OpenAI GPT-4 and vector search. Extracts Yamaha product brochure PDF, creates an in-memory vector store knowledge base, and runs an AI Sales Agent to answer customer queries via WhatsApp text messages.

Name: Video Frame Narration & Voiceover Generator
Description: Automates video narration by downloading a video, extracting frames using OpenCV in Python, generating a script with OpenAI GPT-4 Vision LLM, creating TTS audio, and uploading results to Google Drive. Integrates HTTP, Python, Langchain, OpenAI APIs, and Google Drive.

Name: AI SQL Agent with Dynamic Charting
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4o, Langchain SQL Agent, and Quickchart.io to answer SQL queries and generate dynamic charts. It extracts user questions, runs SQL queries on PostgreSQL, classifies if charts are needed, and creates visualizations using OpenAI structured output and Quickchart.io.

Name: Automated CV Screening with OpenAI & Supabase
Description: n8n workflow to download CV PDFs, extract text, and analyze candidate fit using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini with a structured JSON schema. Stores results in Supabase. Ideal for recruiters to automate initial resume screening and generate fitting scores and insights.

Name: AI-Powered Job Application Automation
Description: This n8n workflow automates job applications by accepting CV PDFs via form upload, using OpenAI LLM and text classification to validate and extract relevant candidate data based on a job posting, and saving to Airtable ATS. It enables a two-step form process with AI-assisted prefill and validation.

Name: AI-Powered Appointment Scheduling with Approval
Description: Automate appointment requests processing with n8n multi-step forms, OpenAI AI text classification and summarisation, Gmail approval workflow, and Google Calendar integration for scheduling events. Provides user-friendly form UX and admin approval via email.

Name: AI-Powered On-Brand Blog Article Generator
Description: Automates generating brand-consistent blog drafts using n8n workflows. It scrapes latest articles from a blog, converts content to Markdown, analyzes style and voice with OpenAI LLMs, and creates new drafts saved to Wordpress for review.

Name: Real-Time AI Meeting Transcription System
Description: An n8n workflow that automates joining virtual meetings (Zoom, Google Meet) using Recall.ai API for real-time transcription, processes dialogue via OpenAI API, stores structured data in Supabase/Postgres, and creates AI-generated notes for meeting insights.

Name: Automated Meeting Task & Event Manager
Description: Automates creation of tasks from Fireflies.ai meeting transcripts using OpenAI GPT-4o, stores tasks in Airtable, sends email notifications via Gmail, and schedules Google Meet events. Streamlines post-meeting follow-ups and client communications with AI-powered processing.

Name: AI Agent for Automated CV Screening & Sorting
Description: Automates screening, sorting, and rating of candidate CV resumes against job descriptions using n8n with Google Drive, Google Docs, Google Sheets, Gmail, and Groq Llama 4 AI model integration. Moves CVs to folders, updates trackers, and sends notifications.

Name: Automated Zoom Meeting & Stripe Payment Setup
Description: Automates event creation by integrating Zoom for meeting scheduling, Stripe for secure payment processing, and Google Sheets for data management. Sends email notifications via Gmail for presenters and participants, streamlining event setup and participant tracking with no-code automation.

Name: Chinese Vocabulary Flashcard Generator
Description: Automates vocabulary learning by translating English words to Chinese, generating pinyin and example sentences via OpenAI, retrieving images from Pexels API, and updating Google Sheets and Drive. Uses Google Translate, Langchain AI, Pexels API, and Google Workspace APIs.

Name: CoinMarketCap Crypto AI Agent
Description: An AI-powered n8n workflow integrating CoinMarketCap APIs with OpenAI GPT-4o Mini for live cryptocurrency data analysis, including prices, metadata, market rankings, conversions, and global metrics. Enables advanced crypto queries using natural language and session memory.

Name: n8n Workflow Backup to GitLab
Description: Automates backup of n8n workflows to GitLab repository using n8n API and GitLab API. Supports manual and scheduled triggers, compares existing files, and updates or creates workflow JSON files tagged for backup.

Name: Gumroad Sales to MailerLite & CRM Automation
Description: Automates post-purchase workflows by capturing Gumroad sales, adding customers to MailerLite email groups for automated sequences, and logging sales data to Google Sheets CRM. Uses Gumroad webhook, MailerLite API, and Google Sheets API to streamline customer onboarding and sales tracking.

Name: ConnectWise New Ticket Alerts to Teams
Description: Automates fetching new tickets from ConnectWise API, filters out previously sent tickets using Redis, groups them by company, and sends alert messages to Microsoft Teams chat. Uses n8n, ConnectWise API, Redis, and Microsoft Teams integration.

Name: HN 'Who is Hiring' Job Scraper
Description: n8n workflow scraping Hacker News 'Ask HN: Who is hiring?' posts using Algolia Search API and Hacker News API. It cleans and structures job posts with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, then stores them in Airtable for easy job listing. Requires OpenAI and Airtable accounts.

Name: Typeform Feedback Collector
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers on Typeform feedback submissions, filters responses by usefulness score, and logs positive and negative feedback separately into Google Sheets using OAuth2 for authentication.

Name: ISS Position Updates via ActiveMQ Every Minute
Description: Automates fetching the International Space Station's real-time position every minute using WheretheISS.at API, processes the data with n8n nodes, and sends updates to an ActiveMQ topic via AMQP protocol for real-time tracking workflows.

Name: ISS Position to AWS SQS Queue
Description: Automates fetching real-time ISS location using 'wheretheiss.at' API every minute and sends latitude, longitude, timestamp, and name details to AWS SQS queue. Tech stack: n8n, HTTP Request, AWS SQS, Cron node for scheduling.

Name: ISS Location Logger to BigQuery
Description: Automates fetching ISS real-time position via 'wheretheiss.at' API every minute, formats data, and stores name, latitude, longitude, and timestamp into Google BigQuery. Built with n8n workflows using HTTP Request, Cron, Set, and Google BigQuery nodes.

Name: Calendly to Notion Contact Logger
Description: Automates capturing new Calendly invitee info and logs it into a Notion database. Uses Calendly API webhook to trigger on invitee creation and Notion API to add pages with invitee name, email, and status for streamlined contact management.

Name: AWS S3 to Transcribe Audio Workflow
Description: Automates transcription of audio files stored in AWS S3 using AWS Transcribe with automatic language detection. Built in n8n with AWS S3 and AWS Transcribe nodes, triggered manually to process all files in a specified bucket.

Name: Notion-SIGNL4 Alert Management Workflow
Description: Automates alert handling by integrating Notion database monitoring with SIGNL4 incident management. Uses n8n to process incoming alerts via webhook, update Notion status fields, and send or resolve SIGNL4 alerts accordingly. Tech stack: n8n, Notion API, SIGNL4 API.

Name: Daily Weather Updates via LINE Message
Description: Automate sending daily weather updates at 9 AM via LINE messenger using OpenWeatherMap API and n8n Cron trigger. Fetches Berlin temperature and sends a personalized notification via LINE Notify OAuth2 integration.

Name: Fetch & Merge Multiple RSS Feeds
Description: This n8n workflow fetches RSS feeds from specified URLs (Medium and Dev.to for n8n content), reads and batches them, checks completion, and merges all feed items into a single dataset. Tech stack: n8n native nodes (RSS Feed Read, Function, IF, SplitInBatches) to automate RSS aggregation.

Name: Google Sheets to Dropbox XLS Exporter
Description: Automates exporting Google Sheets data to an XLS file and uploads it to Dropbox every 15 minutes. Uses Google Sheets API, n8n spreadsheet conversion, and Dropbox API to keep backups or share spreadsheet updates seamlessly.

Name: Netlify Form Submission to Airtable
Description: Automates capturing Netlify form submissions and appends extracted name, email, and role data to Airtable. Uses Netlify Trigger webhook, n8n's Set node for data mapping, and Airtable API integration for database storage.

Name: Onfleet Task Creation from Spreadsheet
Description: Automates creating Onfleet delivery tasks using data from Excel spreadsheets. Utilizes n8n nodes for reading binary files, parsing spreadsheets, and Onfleet API integration. Ideal for logistics teams to streamline task imports from customer or delivery data sheets.

Name: Google Drive to AWS S3 Sync
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers on Google Drive file updates in a specific folder and syncs files to an AWS S3 bucket with AES256 encryption. Uses Google Drive API, AWS S3 API, and n8n nodes for seamless cloud file synchronization.

Name: Webhook JSON to XLSX Exporter
Description: An n8n workflow that accepts JSON data via a POST webhook, splits items in the JSON body, converts them into an XLSX spreadsheet file, and returns it as a downloadable binary response. Uses n8n built-in nodes: Webhook, Item Lists, Spreadsheet File, Respond to Webhook.

Name: Monthly Financial Metrics to Mattermost
Description: Automates monthly retrieval of financial metrics from ProfitWell API and posts key data (active customers, recurring revenue, growth rate) to a Mattermost channel using n8n workflow triggered by a cron schedule.

Name: Crypto Portfolio Value Updater
Description: Automates hourly updates of cryptocurrency prices and portfolio values using CoinGecko API and Airtable. Retrieves portfolio data, fetches current prices, updates records, and calculates total portfolio value for easy tracking and reporting.

Name: Tweet Generator with Hashtag & Airtable Logging
Description: An n8n workflow that generates short tweets featuring random hashtags (#techtwitter, #n8n) using OpenAI's GPT-3 API, and then logs the tweet and hashtag into Airtable. Utilizes manual trigger, function node, HTTP Request to OpenAI, data set, and Airtable integration.

Name: Onfleet to QuickBooks Invoice Automation
Description: Automates invoice creation in QuickBooks Online upon new Onfleet task creation using Onfleet Trigger and QuickBooks API integration. Streamlines billing by triggering an invoice every time a delivery or task is initiated in Onfleet.

Name: Google Drive File Update to Onfleet Task
Description: Automate task creation in Onfleet when a specific Google Drive file is updated using Google Drive Trigger and Onfleet API in n8n workflow. Useful for seamless delivery or service task management linked to file changes.

Name: Manage Cases in TheHive via n8n
Description: Automates creation, updating, and retrieval of cases in TheHive using n8n workflow. Utilizes TheHive API to handle case lifecycle from creation to modification and fetching detailed info, ideal for cybersecurity incident management.

Name: GitLab Backup Automation
Description: Automates backing up n8n workflows and credentials by exporting them, then committing and pushing changes to a GitLab repo using command line and cron scheduling.

Name: Automated Timesheet Report Generator
Description: An n8n workflow to generate timesheet reports with user avatars and task summaries. It fetches data, sorts tasks, retrieves avatars via HTTP, creates a styled Markdown report converted to HTML, and optionally emails the report. Uses n8n nodes: Function, HTTP Request, Markdown, and Email Send.

Name: User Request Management via Typeform & ClickUp
Description: Automates workflow for managing user requests by integrating Typeform forms with ClickUp task management. It routes request types (document, presentation, update, workflow) to corresponding ClickUp lists using OAuth2 API. Enhances task tracking and team collaboration.

Name: HTTP Requests & Pagination Demo Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow demonstrating common HTTP request use cases: fetching data from APIs (GitHub, Wikipedia, JSONPlaceholder), handling pagination, scraping HTML content, and splitting response bodies for easier data handling. Tech stack: n8n nodes (HTTP Request, HTML Extract, If, Set), GitHub API, Wikipedia, JSONPlaceholder REST API.

Name: Sync Customer Data to Google Sheets
Description: Automates fetching customer data via n8n's Customer Datastore node, transforms fields using Set node, and upserts records into Google Sheets with OAuth2 API. Ideal for keeping customer info updated and organized in spreadsheets effortlessly.

Name: Weekly Google Sheets to MySQL Importer
Description: Automates weekly data import from Google Sheets to MySQL using Cron scheduling, Google Sheets API with OAuth2 for authentication, and MySQL node for insertion. Ideal for syncing spreadsheet data into a database automatically.

Name: Google Sheets to HTML Table via Webhook
Description: This n8n workflow reads data from a Google Sheets spreadsheet using Google Sheets API, converts the data into a Bootstrap-styled HTML table using a custom function, and serves it as an HTML response via a webhook. Ideal for dynamic table generation from sheet data.

Name: Asana to Notion Task Sync
Description: Automates syncing tasks from Asana to Notion via their APIs using n8n. Triggered by Asana updates, it creates or updates Notion database pages with task info and deadlines, ensuring task data consistency across both platforms.

Name: Company Logo and Info to Airtable
Description: Automates fetching company logos, icons, and details via Brandfetch API and stores them in Airtable. Includes n8n manual trigger, Brandfetch integration for company data, and Airtable append operation for database storage.

Name: Pipedrive to Stripe Customer Sync
Description: Automates syncing updated Pipedrive deals with Stripe by checking deal won time changes, retrieving organization details, searching Stripe customers, and creating new customers if needed using Pipedrive and Stripe APIs in n8n.

Name: Stripe to Pipedrive Charge Logger
Description: Automates logging of successful Stripe charges to Pipedrive CRM by fetching charges since last run, enriching with customer and organization details via Stripe and Pipedrive APIs, then creating notes in Pipedrive. Scheduled daily at 8 AM using n8n workflow.

Name: Sync New Pipedrive Products to Stripe
Description: Automates product sync from Pipedrive CRM to Stripe. Uses Pipedrive trigger node, processes product data with Function and Set nodes, and creates products and prices via Stripe API calls. Ideal for streamlining e-commerce product management.

Name: Automated Weekly Stock Portfolio Reporter
Description: This n8n workflow fetches stock data from Baserow, scrapes live prices from Tradegate.de, calculates portfolio value changes, builds an HTML report, and sends it via SendGrid email. Integrates Baserow API, HTTP requests, HTML extraction, and SendGrid for automation.

Name: Google Sheets to Salesforce Account & Contact Sync
Description: Automates syncing companies and contacts from a Google Sheet into Salesforce. Uses Google Sheets API and Salesforce API to read, search, create, and update accounts and contacts based on sheet data, ensuring no duplicates. Ideal for CRM data automation.

Name: Excel to Salesforce Account & Contact Sync
Description: Automates syncing company accounts and contacts from Microsoft Excel to Salesforce using n8n. It reads Excel data, searches Salesforce for existing accounts, merges data, creates new accounts, and upserts contacts via Salesforce API.

Name: Excel to Salesforce CRM Importer
Description: Automates importing company and contact data from an Excel spreadsheet into Salesforce. Uses HTTP request to download the file, spreadsheet parsing, Salesforce API to search, create, and update accounts and contacts, deduplicating data along the way.

Name: Google Firestore CRUD - Create, Update, Get
Description: n8n workflow automates document creation, updating, and retrieval in Google Cloud Firestore using Firestore API and OAuth2 credentials. Ideal for backend data management and integration scenarios with Firestore database.

Name: Mautic to Monday.com Contact Sync
Description: Automates contact creation in Monday.com from new Mautic leads using n8n. Integrates Mautic webhook trigger and Monday.com API to sync lead names and emails as board items, enabling CRM task automation and enhanced contact management.

Name: Company Profile Extractor & Analyzer
Description: Automates extraction of company info from domains listed in Google Sheets. Uses HTTP requests, HTML extraction, OpenAI for AI-driven value proposition, industry, market & audience classification, then updates Sheet. Tech: Google Sheets API, OpenAI API, n8n nodes.

Name: RabbitMQ to SMS Alert System
Description: An n8n workflow that listens to a RabbitMQ queue for temperature readings and sends SMS alerts via the Vonage API when a threshold is exceeded. It automates message processing using RabbitMQ trigger, conditional logic, and SMS notification.

Name: Export SQL Table to CSV File
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches data from a Microsoft SQL Server table and saves it as a CSV file. Utilizes Microsoft SQL API for querying, n8n spreadsheet node for CSV export, and supports further automation like emailing or uploading the file.

Name: API JSON to Google Sheets & CSV Export
Description: Automates fetching JSON user data from randomuser.me via HTTP Request, then directly appends it into Google Sheets using Google Sheets API, and also converts selected data fields into a downloadable CSV file using n8n's Spreadsheet File node. Includes manual trigger and data mapping via Set node.

Name: Sync Outlook Calendar with Notion Database
Description: This n8n workflow automates syncing events from Microsoft Outlook Calendar to a Notion database. It fetches calendar events via Microsoft Graph API OAuth2, checks for existing pages in Notion, and creates or updates them accordingly.

Name: LLM Data Parser with Auto-fixing
Description: n8n workflow using Langchain with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to parse structured data about US states and cities. Includes prompt setup, validation via a JSON schema, and an auto-fixing LLM output parser to ensure data correctness and reprocess invalid outputs.

Name: Pinecone Vector DB Chat with Google Drive
Description: An n8n workflow that loads files from Google Drive, splits text content, embeds chunks using OpenAI embeddings, and inserts them into a Pinecone vector index. Enables chat interactions by retrieving relevant data chunks from Pinecone and answering via OpenAI GPT-4o-mini model.

Name: Google Drive Document Summarizer
Description: An n8n workflow that downloads a document from Google Drive, splits the text into chunks, and uses OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via Langchain to generate automated summaries. Integrates Google Drive API and OpenAI API for efficient document summarization.

Name: Customer Feedback Sentiment Analysis
Description: Automates capturing customer feedback via an n8n form, analyzes sentiment using OpenAI API, merges results with form data, and appends entries to Google Sheets. Integrates n8n formTrigger, OpenAI sentiment classification, and Google Sheets for streamlined feedback management.

Name: Sync Airtable Users to Mailchimp
Description: Automates user data synchronization by retrieving contact details from Airtable and creating subscriber entries in Mailchimp using n8n automation. Utilizes Airtable API, Mailchimp API, and a Cron trigger for scheduled execution to keep mailing lists updated.

Name: Google Calendar to Zoom Meeting Scheduler
Description: Automates scheduling Zoom meetings from Google Calendar events within the next 12 hours. Uses Google Calendar API to fetch events and Zoom API (OAuth2) to create meetings. Filters out canceled and specific event types to ensure relevant Zoom meetings are created.

Name: Google Sheets to Mailchimp Subscriber Sync
Description: Automates syncing email addresses from a Google Sheets range to a Mailchimp mailing list. Utilizes Google Sheets and Mailchimp APIs within n8n, triggered at set intervals to keep subscriber lists updated seamlessly.

Name: SMS Broadcast via Airtable & Twilio
Description: Automates sending personalized SMS messages using Airtable to store contacts and Twilio API for messaging. Users trigger the workflow manually in n8n, which fetches phone numbers and names from Airtable and sends custom SMS via Twilio, streamlining bulk communication.

Name: AI Agent for Hacker News Top Posts
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Langchain's AI agent and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to fetch, clean, and return the top 50 Hacker News posts in JSON. It uses n8n's Hacker News node and custom tool workflow features for interactive chat queries.

Name: Google Drive Folder File Sharing & Link Generator
Description: Automates listing files from a specified Google Drive folder, changes their sharing status to public, and generates direct download links. Uses Google Drive API and n8n workflow automation to batch process files and produce shareable URLs efficiently.

Name: Spotify Discover Weekly Auto-Archiver
Description: Automates weekly archiving of unique tracks from Spotify's Discover Weekly playlist to a user-created Archive playlist. Built with n8n using Spotify API, Cron scheduling, and data merging to prevent duplicates. Enhances music discovery management effortlessly.

Name: Strava to Beeminder Activity Logger
Description: Automates adding datapoints to Beeminder goals when new activities are created in Strava using Strava Trigger and Beeminder API nodes in n8n. Ideal for fitness tracking and goal monitoring.

Name: Google Contacts: Create, Update & Get Contact
Description: Automates creating, updating, and retrieving a contact in Google Contacts via n8n using the Google Contacts API with OAuth2. Enables workflow automation for managing contacts seamlessly within Google ecosystem.

Name: Google Indexing API Sitemap Automation
Description: Automates website URL indexing by extracting sitemap URLs, converting XML to JSON, and submitting each URL to Google's Indexing API with batch control and quota limit error handling. Tech: n8n, Google Indexing API, XML, HTTP Request.

Name: Euro Exchange Rate Webhook API
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches the latest Euro foreign exchange rates from ECB's XML API, converts the data to JSON, filters by requested currency via a webhook query, and responds with current exchange rate. Utilizes HTTP Request, XML to JSON conversion, and webhook triggers.

Name: Automated Viral Tweet Creator & Scheduler
Description: An n8n workflow automating creation and scheduled posting of viral tweets every 6 hours using OpenAI GPT-4 Turbo for content generation and Twitter API for posting. Customizable influencer niche, style, and inspiration ensure on-brand, engagement-focused tweets.

Name: Todoist Daily Task Automator
Description: Automates daily task creation in Todoist by copying template tasks with custom due dates from descriptions. Uses Todoist API, JavaScript for parsing, and n8n scheduling and filtering nodes to manage recurring daily tasks.

Name: n8n Workflow Auto-Documenter
Description: This n8n workflow auto-generates concise documentation for n8n workflows using OpenAI's GPT-4. It accepts workflow JSON and title via a form, crafts a prompt, sends it to OpenAI API, and returns brief, SEO-friendly docs as HTML. Ideal for n8n users needing quick workflow summaries.

Name: Automated Tweets Scheduler from Google Sheets
Description: n8n workflow automates posting tweets by fetching texts from a Google Sheets document every 6 hours and posting them on X (Twitter) via API. It uses Google Sheets OAuth2 for reading and deleting rows and Twitter OAuth2 for posting tweets, enabling scheduled social media updates.

Name: Groundhogg CRM Mailing Address Verifier
Description: An n8n workflow that verifies new contact mailing addresses in Groundhogg CRM using Lob API for US address validation. It triggers via webhook, checks address deliverability, and updates the CRM by tagging verified or unverified addresses to streamline contact data accuracy.

Name: Keap Contact Address Verification Automation
Description: Automates mailing address verification for new Keap CRM contacts using Lob API via webhook triggers. Tags contacts as deliverable or non-deliverable to trigger follow-up actions. Tech stack: Keap CRM webhook, Lob address verification API, n8n workflow automation.

Name: DOCX to PDF File Converter
Description: Automates converting DOCX documents to PDF using ConvertAPI. Downloads a DOCX file, sends it to ConvertAPI for format conversion, and saves the resulting PDF to disk. Utilizes HTTP requests, file handling, and ConvertAPI authentication.

Name: AI Movie Recommender with MongoDB
Description: An AI agent using OpenAI's chat model integrated with MongoDB aggregation to recommend and store favorite movies. It processes chat inputs, queries movies collection, and updates favorites, combining Langchain memory buffer and n8n workflows for seamless AI-driven movie management.

Name: n8n Default Error Handler Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow for automated error handling: detects workflow failures, fetches error workflow info via n8n API, updates workflows lacking error handlers, and sends failure notifications via Gmail OAuth2 email. Runs daily via schedule trigger.

Name: AI Web Scraper & API Data Agent
Description: An n8n workflow using OpenAI's Chat Models, Langchain agents, and Firecrawl API to scrape web content and call external APIs for data. It enables AI agents to fetch, process, and respond with live web and API data in a streamlined manner.

Name: AI-Powered n8n Workflow Credential Query Agent
Description: This n8n workflow extracts and stores workflow credential metadata from the n8n API into a SQLite database, then uses OpenAI's GPT model with Langchain integration to create an AI agent that can query these credentials via natural language. It enables users to find workflows by app credentials via AI-powered SQL querying using n8n, SQLite, and OpenAI APIs.

Name: Stripe Checkout Sessions Fetch & Filter
Description: An n8n workflow that retrieves all Stripe checkout sessions from the last 20 days using Stripe API, paginates results, then splits and filters them by custom fields like nickname and job title for easy data processing and visualization.

Name: Confluence Page Creator from Template
Description: Automates creating Atlassian Confluence pages using REST API. Fetches a template, replaces placeholders with webhook input data, and posts a new page to a target space. Uses HTTP Basic Auth with Atlassian API keys and supports dynamic content generation.

Name: Daily Backup of n8n Workflows to Bitbucket
Description: Automates daily backup of all n8n workflows to a specified Bitbucket repository. Uses n8n API to fetch workflows, Bitbucket API for storage, and handles rate limiting with dynamic wait times to ensure smooth, uninterrupted backups.

Name: Candidate Resume AI Qualification
Description: Automates candidate resume screening by downloading PDFs from Google Drive, converting them to images via Stirling PDF API, then analyzing with Google's Gemini multimodal LLM to assess fit for a specific role. Uses n8n, Google Drive, Stirling PDF API, and Google Gemini.

Name: Passport Photo AI Validator Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow using Google Drive, Google Gemini AI vision model, and Langchain for AI-based validation of passport photos per UK government guidelines with structured output parsing.

Name: Automated Alert to Azure DevOps Task
Description: n8n workflow automates querying Elasticsearch daily at 12:15 to detect alerts and creates work items in Azure DevOps if alerts exist using Cron, Elasticsearch API, and Azure DevOps REST API with Basic Auth.

Name: Auto-Update Zoom Meeting & WP Redirect
Description: Automates creating Zoom recurring meetings via OAuth2, updates a WordPress page with a meta refresh redirect to the Zoom join URL, and notifies a Slack channel. Uses Zoom API, WordPress API, Slack API and a cron trigger for scheduling.

Name: Webflow Form to Google Sheets Logger
Description: Automates capturing form submissions from Webflow via webhook, processes data with custom JS, and appends it to Google Sheets. Uses Webflow API, Google Sheets API, and n8n code node for seamless form data archival and timestamping.

Name: Automated Weekly Dinner Meal Planner
Description: Scheduled weekly automation using n8n to create dinner meal plans from Mealie API. It fetches recipes by category, randomly selects configured number, and posts meal plans with configurable offsets. Utilizes HTTP authentication and JavaScript code for randomization.

Name: OnThisDay Hacker News Highlights Digest
Description: Automates daily collection of Hacker News front-page headlines for the same calendar day across multiple years, analyzes tech trends using Google Gemini LLM, and sends a categorized Markdown summary with source links via Telegram. Uses n8n, HTTP requests, HTML extraction, and Google PaLM API.

Name: PDF Data Extraction with Claude & Gemini
Description: An n8n workflow that downloads a PDF from Google Drive, converts it to base64, and extracts data using AI models Claude 3.5 Sonnet and Google Gemini 2.0 Flash. Enables prompt customization to tailor extraction, comparing results from two top NLP APIs seamlessly.

Name: Google Drive PII Remover
Description: Automates removal of personally identifiable information (PII) from CSV files in Google Drive. Uses Google Drive API to monitor and process files, extracts data, identifies PII columns via OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, removes sensitive data, and uploads sanitized files back to Drive.

Name: Upwork Job Scraper & Notifier
Description: Automates scraping of fresh Upwork job posts using Apify API, filters based on working hours, stores unique jobs in MongoDB, and sends notifications to Slack #general channel. Utilizes MongoDB, Slack API, Apify, and n8n's scheduling for continuous job updates.

Name: GitLab Merge Request Automation
Description: An n8n workflow automating GitLab merge request lifecycle: checks, creates MRs, adds comments, closes or merges them. Uses GitLab API via HTTP Requests and includes scheduling, conditional logic, and wait timers for pipeline completion.

Name: Google Drive Workflow Backup Automation
Description: Automates scheduled backups of n8n workflows by exporting workflow data as JSON files and saving them into date-stamped folders on Google Drive. Utilizes n8n API, Google Drive OAuth2, and scheduled triggers for streamlined backup management.

Name: VPS Resource Monitor and Alert System
Description: Automates VPS resource checks (CPU, RAM, Disk) every 15 minutes via SSH commands. Uses n8n schedule trigger, SSH node for system stats, SQL merge and IF node for threshold comparison, and sends email alerts via SMTP if usage exceeds 80%.

Name: Bulk File Upload to Google Drive
Description: An n8n workflow for batch uploading multiple files via a form to Google Drive. It checks for an existing folder by name, creates the folder if missing, and uploads files preserving original names. Uses Google Drive API, n8n form trigger, and custom JS code for file handling.

Name: Exponential Backoff Retry for Google APIs
Description: This n8n workflow implements an exponential backoff strategy to handle rate limits and errors when interacting with Google APIs (e.g., Google Sheets). It uses n8n nodes including Google Sheets API via service account, code node for backoff logic, wait node for delays, and error handling to retry up to 5 times with increasing delays.

Name: Export Postgres Data to Excel File
Description: This workflow connects to a PostgreSQL database to run a SQL query retrieving product names and EANs, converts the result into an Excel spreadsheet, and saves it as a binary XLS file locally. Utilizes Postgres node, Spreadsheet File node, and Write Binary File node in n8n.

Name: AI Linux SysAdmin via SSH Automation
Description: An n8n workflow that enables an AI agent (GPT-4o via OpenAI API) to act as a Linux system administrator. It receives chat commands, interprets user intent for Linux VPS management, generates safe SSH commands, and executes them remotely using SSH node, enhancing VPS management automation.

Name: AI Video Generator with HeyGen & n8n
Description: Automates AI video creation using HeyGen API within n8n. Input text, avatar, and voice IDs to generate and monitor video status. Utilizes HTTP Request, Wait, and If nodes for orchestration. Perfect for creating customizable AI avatar videos programmatically.

Name: Automated n8n Workflow Backup to Google Drive
Description: This n8n workflow automatically backs up all n8n workflows daily at 01:30 by retrieving them via the n8n API, encoding the data into JSON files, and uploading them to a specified Google Drive folder. Tech stack: n8n, n8n API, Google Drive API.

Name: Google Doc Auto-Fill from Web Form
Description: This workflow collects form input via n8n Form Trigger, copies a Google Docs template, and replaces placeholders with submitted form data using Google Drive and Google Docs APIs. Enables dynamic document generation from user-submitted fields.

Name: Real Estate Appointment Voice Reminder
Description: An automated workflow using Google Calendar API, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for message creation, ElevenLabs Text-to-Speech API to generate voice reminders, and Gmail for sending MP3 voice appointment reminders. Designed for real estate agents to remind clients professionally.

Name: Squarespace to Mailchimp Contact Sync
Description: Automates adding Squarespace newsletter signups to Mailchimp audience using Google Sheets and Mailchimp APIs. Scheduled or manual triggers ensure new contacts sync despite Squarespace-Mailchimp limitations, improving newsletter audience management.

Name: n8n AI Assistant for Tool Discovery
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Langchain chat triggers, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and n8n Multi-Channel Platform API to provide an AI assistant. It interacts with users' chat queries about n8n, dynamically looks up and executes relevant tools, delivering tailored, actionable responses on n8n usage and resources.

Name: AI Supply Chain SQL Assistant with BigQuery
Description: Workflow integrates OpenAI GPT-4o-mini with an AI agent specialized in SQL for supply chain analytics on BigQuery. It processes user chat input, generates SQL, executes it on Google BigQuery, and returns structured shipment performance results.

Name: Weekly Missing Project Budget Alert
Description: Automates weekly monitoring of open external projects with zero budgeted cost from a MySQL database. Uses n8n's MySQL, Switch node for cost center routing, and Microsoft Outlook API to send tailored HTML email alerts to respective cost center teams for timely budget updates.

Name: Automated Resume Screener from Gmail to Sheets
Description: This n8n workflow automates screening resumes received as email attachments in Gmail. It extracts PDF text, uses OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via Langchain to analyze and score resumes, extracts contact info, and saves results to a Google Sheets document. Tech stack: Gmail API, Google Sheets API, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, Langchain integration.

Name: Incident Resolution & Notification Automation
Description: Automates incident status updates by integrating PagerDuty, Jira, and Mattermost via n8n. Resolves incidents in PagerDuty, updates Jira issue status, and posts closure notifications to Mattermost channels, streamlining IT incident management workflows.

Name: Dynamic Line Chart Generator with Google Drive Upload
Description: Creates a dynamic line chart from JSON data using QuickChart API in n8n and uploads the image to Google Drive. Includes a manual trigger, customizable input data, and flexible chart options for easy visualization and sharing.

Name: Error Notification via Mattermost & Twilio
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers on errors, sends detailed error notifications to Mattermost, and then sends an SMS alert via Twilio. Utilizes n8n errorTrigger node, Mattermost API, and Twilio API to provide real-time monitoring and multi-channel alerting.

Name: Upload Photo to SharePoint via Microsoft Graph
Description: Automates uploading a photo to a SharePoint folder using Microsoft Graph API with OAuth2 client credentials. Utilizes HTTP Request and Set nodes in n8n to authenticate, fetch test image, set destination, and upload binary data securely.

Name: Google Autocomplete Keyword Generator A-Z
Description: An n8n workflow that generates keyword queries by appending each letter A-Z to a base keyword, queries Google Autocomplete API to retrieve popular search suggestions, and aggregates results. Utilizes n8n code nodes, HTTP request node, and batch processing to prevent API blocking.

Name: AI-Triaged Support Ticket Creation
Description: Automates support ticket creation by monitoring a Microsoft Outlook shared inbox, using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to triage and label tickets, then creating issues in JIRA. Tech stack: Outlook API, OpenAI LLM, JIRA API, n8n automation platform.

Name: Web Scraper & Product Extractor with GPT-4
Description: Automates scraping product data via Brightdata API, cleans HTML, and extracts structured info using OpenRouter GPT-4.1 and Langchain parsers, storing results in Google Sheets. Ideal for e-commerce and market research workflows.

Name: Automated PDF to HTML Converter
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers on new PDFs in Google Drive, uses PDF.co API to convert PDFs to HTML, and saves the HTML back to Google Drive. Automates document conversion using Google Drive and PDF.co API for efficient web-ready file creation.

Name: Clockify to Syncro Time Tracker Sync
Description: Automates time entry synchronization from Clockify to Syncro MSP using n8n. It captures time tracking data via webhook, matches users, updates or creates timers on Syncro via API, and logs entries in Google Sheets. Tech stack: Clockify API, Syncro MSP API, Google Sheets, n8n workflow automation.

Name: NameCheap Dynamic DNS Updater
Description: Automates updating DNS records on NameCheap via their Dynamic DNS API. Uses n8n workflow with Cron for scheduling, IP check to avoid redundant updates, and HTTP Request nodes for API calls. Ideal for users managing dynamic IPs on multiple subdomains.

Name: TheHive & SIGNL4 Alert Automation
Description: An automated security alert system using TheHive API for incident management and SIGNL4 for alert notifications and resolution. It includes webhook triggers, conditional checks, and supports efficient security operations automation.

Name: Crosspost Articles to Medium & Dev.to
Description: Automates posting of articles received via webhook to Medium (using Medium API) and Dev.to (using their REST API). Uses n8n webhook node for data intake and formats posts in Markdown for seamless cross-platform publishing.

Name: Google Webpage Entity Extraction
Description: Extract named entities from any webpage by sending its URL to a webhook that fetches content and uses Google Natural Language API. Tech stack: n8n, HTTP Request, Google Cloud Natural Language API. Returns structured entity data like people, locations, orgs with salience.

Name: Zammad Support Tickets Summary
Description: Automates daily retrieval and categorization of Zammad support tickets using Zammad API, filtering by status, and sends a summary notification to Zulip chat for customer support teams, scheduled via cron for standup meetings.

Name: CFP Submission Selection & Visualization
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Airtable, Bannerbear, and Trello to automate selection and visualization of conference talks scoring above 15. It pulls submissions from Airtable, creates custom banners via Bannerbear API, and organizes selected proposals on Trello boards.

Name: Automated Receipt Expense Tracker
