Description: An n8n workflow that automates expense tracking by capturing receipt images via Typeform, extracting details with Mindee's OCR API, and storing expenses in Airtable for easy management and review.

Name: Workflow Failure SMS Alert via Twilio
Description: This n8n workflow uses an Error Trigger node and Twilio API integration to send an SMS notification when any workflow fails. It helps monitor workflow executions by alerting users immediately via SMS, ensuring quick response to failures.

Name: Figma to Jira Auto Version Commenter
Description: Automates updating Jira issues with design version info from Figma using n8n. Integrates Figma webhook (file version updates) and Jira Cloud API to find issues and add version comments. Requires Figma Commit Plugin and Jira credentials configured.

Name: Perplexity AI Research Assistant
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Perplexity AI's Sonar model via HTTP API to answer research queries. It formats user prompts, sends them to Perplexity AI, and extracts clean, in-depth responses for knowledge discovery and content research automation.

Name: Google Sheets to Mautic Contact Sync
Description: Automates syncing contacts from Google Sheets to Mautic CRM every 5 minutes using Google Sheets API and Mautic API via n8n workflow.

Name: Product Feedback Collector & Manager
Description: Automates collecting product feedback via Typeform, stores responses in Airtable, and routes low-score feedback to Trello for team review. Integrates Typeform API, Airtable API, and Trello API to streamline feedback management and prioritize action items efficiently.

Name: IoT Sensor Data Logger via MQTT & InfluxDB
Description: An n8n workflow that uses MQTT to receive temperature and humidity data from a remote ESP32 with DHT22 sensor, processes the data with JavaScript, and stores it into an InfluxDB time-series database via HTTP API. Ideal for IoT sensor monitoring.

Name: OpenAI Text-to-Speech Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that converts text to speech using OpenAI's TTS API. It accepts text and voice parameters, sends an authenticated HTTP POST request to the OpenAI audio/speech endpoint, and outputs an .mp3 audio file. Designed for easy manual or automated triggering.

Name: Weather Info Fetcher via Webhook
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches current weather data for a specified city using OpenWeatherMap API triggered by a webhook. It extracts temperature, humidity, wind speed, description, and city info, delivering structured weather details. Built with n8n, OpenWeatherMap API.

Name: Weather SMS Notification via Webhook & Airtable
Description: n8n workflow receives POST webhook with user data, stores it in Airtable, fetches current weather via OpenWeatherMap API for the specified city, then sends weather details by SMS using Twilio. Integrates Webhook, Airtable, OpenWeatherMap, and Twilio APIs.

Name: Receipt OCR to Airtable Logger
Description: Automates receipt data extraction using Mindee OCR API from uploaded receipts via webhook, then logs categorized expense details like merchant, date, total, and currency into Airtable. Uses n8n webhook, Mindee OCR, and Airtable API for expense tracking automation.

Name: Receipt Data Extraction via Mindee API
Description: Automates extracting detailed information from receipt images using Mindee OCR API. Retrieves an image via HTTP request, then extracts structured data like totals, dates, and vendor info. Useful for expense tracking and accounting automation.

Name: Weekly Coffee Group Bot for Mattermost
Description: Automates weekly virtual coffee meetups by grouping Mattermost users into random teams of 3 and sending invites via Google Calendar. Utilizes Mattermost API, Google Calendar API, cron scheduling, and JavaScript for dynamic group creation to foster team bonding.

Name: Daily Language Learning with Hacker News
Description: Automates daily extraction of top 3 Hacker News article titles, extracts and translates unique words to German using LingvaNex API, stores results in Airtable, and sends a curated vocabulary list via SMS with Vonage API.

Name: Google Sheets to Orbit Member Sync
Description: Sync and upsert member and activity data from Google Sheets to Orbit workspace using Google Sheets API and Orbit API integration in n8n. Automates community metrics management with OAuth2 authentication and data merging by GitHub usernames.

Name: Automizy Contact List Management
Description: This n8n workflow uses Automizy's API to create a contact list, add a new contact, update contact tags, and retrieve all contacts in the list. It automates email marketing contact management seamlessly.

Name: Daily Weather Push Notifications via Pushcut
Description: Automates sending daily 9AM weather updates for Berlin using OpenWeatherMap API and Pushcut push notifications in n8n. Ideal for timely personalized weather alerts leveraging cron scheduling and No-Code automation.

Name: Matrix Room Creation & Invitation Workflow
Description: Automates creating a Matrix chat room, inviting members from another room, and sending a welcome message. Utilizes Matrix API for room and user management, with conditional logic to avoid re-inviting the creator, enabling seamless community onboarding.

Name: Daily Weather SMS via Vonage
Description: Automates sending daily weather updates for Berlin at 9 AM using OpenWeatherMap API and Vonage SMS service via n8n workflow with Cron scheduling.

Name: Google Sheets to Mattermost Alert
Description: Automates monitoring of a Google Sheet using OAuth2, checks for new entries every 45 minutes, and sends real-time Mattermost notifications with new data details. Utilizes n8n workflow nodes: Google Sheets API, custom JavaScript function, interval trigger, and Mattermost API.

Name: AI-Powered Google Calendar MCP Server
Description: This n8n workflow integrates OpenAI's GPT-4o model with Google Calendar API to build an AI assistant managing calendar events via MCP server-client tools. It supports creating, updating, deleting, and searching events, plus additional AI utilities like text case conversion, joke retrieval, and random user data generation.

Name: Daily Weather Push Notification
Description: Automates daily weather updates for Berlin via OpenWeatherMap API, sending temperatures as push notifications using Pushover. Triggered by a Cron job running at 9 AM. Ideal for users wanting timely, automatic local weather alerts on their devices.

Name: GetResponse to Airtable Subscriber Logger
Description: Automates capturing new GetResponse email subscribers via webhook and appends their name and email to an Airtable base. Uses GetResponse API webhook triggers and Airtable API integration to streamline email list management.

Name: QuickBooks Invoice Automation Workflow
Description: Automates customer creation, invoice generation, and email sending in QuickBooks using OAuth2 API integration within n8n workflow. Streamlines accounting tasks by chaining customer creation, invoice creation, and invoice emailing efficiently.

Name: MailerLite Subscriber Management Workflow
Description: n8n workflow integrates with MailerLite API to create, update, and retrieve email subscribers. It automates managing subscriber data including custom fields like city using MailerLite nodes triggered manually. Ideal for email marketing automation.

Name: Weather Info via Webhook API
Description: An n8n workflow that provides current weather data via a webhook. Utilizes OpenWeatherMap API to fetch temperature and 'feels like' info based on city query parameters, returning formatted weather details in English.

Name: Typeform to PDF Invoice Automation
Description: Automates invoice generation by triggering on Typeform submissions and using APITemplate.io to create customized PDF invoices. Utilizes Typeform API for form data capture and APITemplate.io API for dynamic PDF creation and download.

Name: Wise Transfer Event to Airtable Logger
Description: Automates logging of Wise money transfer events into Airtable by triggering on transfer state changes using Wise API, then fetching transfer details and appending structured data (ID, date, reference, amount) to Airtable. Integrates Wise API and Airtable with n8n workflow.

Name: Google Trends Data Extract & Summarize
Description: Automates extraction of Google Trends data using Bright Data proxy and web unlocker, followed by structured data extraction and summarization via Google Gemini AI (PaLM). Outputs summaries via email and webhook, enabling insightful trend analysis.

Name: Typeform Feedback Sentiment & Task Automator
Description: Automates processing of Typeform feedback by analyzing sentiment with Google Cloud NLP. Positive feedback triggers entries to Notion and Trello, and notifications sent via Slack. Integrates Typeform, Google Cloud Natural Language API, Notion, Trello, and Slack for streamlined feedback management.

Name: Amazon Ads AI Optimization Workflow
Description: Automate Amazon Ads report processing with Google Drive, Excel/CSV data extraction, and GPT-4o AI analysis to generate actionable optimization recommendations. Uses n8n nodes, Google Drive API, OpenAI GPT-4o, and Gmail to email insights for bid, budget, and keyword strategies.

Name: Airtable AI Assistant Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4o-mini and Airtable API to process user chat requests, query Airtable bases and tables, and perform data aggregation and visualization. Enables dynamic, AI-driven interactions for managing Airtable data.

Name: AI-Powered HR CV Processing & Evaluation
Description: Automates job application processing: candidates submit CVs via a form, PDFs are extracted, AI extracts qualifications and personal data using LangChain and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, evaluates fit against a company profile, and logs results to Google Sheets. Integrates Google Drive and Sheets APIs.

Name: AI Agent with Hacker News Data Fetcher
Description: An n8n workflow integrating LangChain AI agent with OpenAI chat and Hacker News API to fetch and process top posts data. Enables querying Hacker News popular posts through AI chat, combining AI and real-time data fetch for interactive insights.

Name: Stock Market Q&A AI Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow leveraging OpenAI embeddings, Qdrant vector store, and Google Drive PDFs to enable Q&A over stock market documents. It extracts data via Google Drive, processes with OpenAI and LangChain, and answers queries through a webhook API.

Name: Customer Feedback Sentiment Analysis
Description: Automates sentiment classification of customer feedback using an OpenAI API with form input, then logs categorized responses into Google Sheets for easy tracking and analysis.

Name: AI Data Extraction for Baserow PDFs
Description: Automates extraction of data from PDFs uploaded to Baserow tables using dynamic user-defined prompts and OpenAI's LLM API. It integrates Baserow webhook events, Baserow API, PDF extraction, and LangChain LLM nodes within n8n to auto-fill table fields based on PDF content and field descriptions.

Name: Stock Earnings Report RAG Analysis Workflow
Description: Automates financial analysis of Google's last 3 quarters earnings by loading PDFs from Google Drive, creating embeddings via Google Gemini, storing/retrieving with Pinecone vector DB, and generating detailed markdown reports saved to Google Docs using AI agents.

Name: Podcast Transcript Summarizer & Digest Generator
Description: Automates summarization of podcast transcripts using n8n with LangChain, OpenAI GPT-3.5 & GPT-4, and Wikipedia API. Extracts key topics, generates questions, researches explanations, formats as HTML, and emails a comprehensive episode digest.

Name: Automated RSS News Aggregator & Trello Notifier
Description: n8n workflow aggregating news from multiple RSS feeds, filtering recent articles, formatting them in Markdown, and posting summaries as Trello card comments with email notifications. Integrates RSS, Trello API, and Gmail via OAuth2 for streamlined team updates.

Name: OpenAI Travel Assistant with Google Drive Docs
Description: Builds a custom OpenAI-powered travel assistant integrated with Google Drive to upload and convert travel agency documents to PDF, updating assistant knowledge. Uses OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, Langchain memory buffer, and Google Drive API for contextual chat interaction.

Name: Hugging Face Paper Auto-Import to Notion
Description: Automates daily extraction of research papers from Hugging Face, uses HTML scraping, OpenAI GPT-4O for abstract analysis, and stores enriched metadata in Notion. Integrates Hugging Face API, OpenAI API, and Notion API for academic paper management.

Name: Typeform Feedback Sentiment to Mattermost
Description: Automates sentiment analysis of event feedback submitted via Typeform using Google Cloud Natural Language API, then sends a sentiment score and message to a Mattermost channel. Integrates Typeform, Google NLP, and Mattermost for real-time feedback monitoring.

Name: Bing Copilot Search Results Summarizer
Description: Automates extraction and summarization of Bing Copilot search results using Bright Data API for data scraping and Google Gemini AI for natural language processing and structured data formatting. Delivers structured JSON data and concise summaries via webhooks.

Name: Automated Company Review & News Insights
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4, SerpApi, and Notion API to automate gathering and analyzing company reviews, news, and product offerings. It scrapes review sites, summarizes pros/cons, tracks sentiment, and updates Notion for competitive analysis.

Name: AI Passport Photo Validator
Description: n8n workflow that imports portrait photos from Google Drive, resizes images, and uses Google Gemini AI vision model to validate passport photo compliance against UK government criteria. Includes structured output parsing for automation.

Name: OpenAI Fine-Tuning Workflow with Google Drive
Description: Automates fine-tuning of OpenAI GPT models using training data stored on Google Drive. Uses n8n with Google Drive API to download a .jsonl training file, uploads it to OpenAI for fine-tuning, and triggers a custom fine-tuned GPT-4o-mini chat model via Langchain integration for interactive AI responses.

Name: n8n Workflow Deployment Automation
Description: Automates deployment of n8n workflows by monitoring a Google Drive folder for JSON workflow files. Uses Google Drive API, n8n API with authenticated requests to create workflows, apply tags, and move files between Drive folders, streamlining workflow management.

Name: Line Pay Slip Text Extractor with Gemini AI
Description: An n8n workflow integrating LINE Messaging API, Google Gemini AI, and Google Sheets to extract and classify text from pay slip images or text messages. It auto-analyzes images with Gemini 2.0, parses key payment details, replies via LINE, and logs data into Google Sheets.

Name: OpenSea NFT Marketplace Agent
Description: AI-powered n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4o Mini with OpenSea API to fetch and analyze NFT listings, offers, orders, and trait-specific data. Enables informed NFT trading decisions with features like best offers, listings by collection, and detailed order lookups.

Name: Texas Tax Code AI Assistant
Description: An automated workflow using n8n that downloads Texas tax code PDFs, extracts sections, generates Mistral.ai embeddings, stores them in Qdrant vectorstore, and provides a chatbot powered by OpenAI to answer tax-related questions with precise citations.

Name: OpenAI Travel Assistant with Google Drive Docs
Description: Automates building and updating a GPT-4-powered travel assistant using OpenAI API and Google Drive integration. It downloads travel documents, converts them to PDF, uploads to OpenAI, and enables interactive chat with context memory. Ideal for travel agencies seeking AI support.

Name: AI Agent for Interactive Google Sheets Chat
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-3.5-turbo with Google Sheets via API, enabling users to query spreadsheet data conversationally. It includes custom tools to list columns, fetch rows, and get column values dynamically, making complex sheet data accessible through natural language.

Name: AI-Powered Chat with PostgreSQL DB
Description: This n8n workflow enables interactive chat with a PostgreSQL database using OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini model and LangChain agent. It automatically generates and executes SQL queries based on user prompts, fetching schema and table info dynamically for accurate DB responses.

Name: GitLab Merge Request AI Reviewer
Description: Automates code review for GitLab merge requests using GitLab API and OpenAI's LLM. It fetches code changes, parses diffs, and posts detailed, scored review comments directly to merge request discussions, streamlining code quality checks.

Name: Yelp Review Extractor & Summarizer with LLM
Description: Automates extraction of Yelp business reviews using Bright Data API and processes data with Google Gemini LLM for structured analysis and summarization. Integrates web scraping, AI parsing, and webhook notifications for streamlined review insights.

Name: Linear Bug Ticket Auto-Classifier
Description: Automates classification of bug tickets in Linear using OpenAI GPT-4. It filters issues that need triage, classifies bugs by team responsibility (customizable), updates Linear tickets, and notifies Slack if classification fails. Tech: Linear API, OpenAI GPT-4, Slack API, n8n automation.

Name: OpenAI Text-to-Speech Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that converts text to speech using OpenAI's TTS API. It sets input text and voice, then sends a request to OpenAI's API to produce an MP3 audio output. Ideal for automating TTS tasks with OpenAI's tts-1 model.

Name: Weekly Google Analytics Report Automation
Description: Automates weekly Google Analytics data retrieval (last 7 days & same period previous year), AI-generated summary & analysis (OpenAI GPT-4O), and report delivery via email (SMTP) and Telegram. Scheduled every Monday at 7 AM for actionable insights.

Name: Squarespace Orders to Google Sheets Sync
Description: Automates retrieval of all Squarespace orders using Squarespace Commerce API and logs detailed order info into a Google Sheets spreadsheet via Google Sheets API. Supports filtering, pagination, and updates with an easy editable global config node.

Name: LangChain n8n Workflow with OpenAI & Wikipedia
Description: This n8n workflow integrates LangChain with OpenAI language models and a custom Wikipedia tool. It demonstrates creating LLM chains, chat interactions, and agent-based queries combining LLM and external knowledge via LangChain tools for flexible AI responses.

Name: AI Resume Screening with Multimodal LLM
Description: Automates candidate resume evaluation by converting PDF resumes from Google Drive into images via Stirling PDF API, then analyzing them using Google's Gemini multimodal language model to determine candidate fit for a role and detect AI bypass attempts.

Name: Automated CV Screening with OpenAI & Supabase
Description: This n8n workflow automates resume screening by downloading CV PDFs, extracting text, sending data with job descriptions to OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini for detailed candidate evaluation, then storing structured results in Supabase. Ideal for recruiters and HR teams to speed up hiring.

Name: n8n Workflow Statistics Dashboard
Description: Generates a detailed dashboard summarizing n8n workflows including nodes, tags, webhooks, and global stats. Uses n8n API, JavaScript, JMESPath, Luxon, XML/XSLT, and Bootstrap for interactive reporting and visualization within n8n.

Name: AI Logo Sheet Extractor to Airtable
Description: Automates extraction of tools and attributes from uploaded AI logo sheets using OpenAI GPT-4o and LangChain AI agent, then stores and updates records in Airtable with hashed IDs and links. Enables easy cataloging of product comparisons from images via form submissions.

Name: AI-Powered US Grants Tracker & Notifier
Description: Automates fetching, AI summarization, eligibility analysis, tracking, and emailing of new AI-focused US grants using Grants.gov API, OpenAI, Airtable, and Gmail. Helps organizations quickly discover and review relevant grant opportunities daily.

Name: AI-Powered Fact-Checking Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that uses Ollama LLM models and custom code to split text into sentences, evaluate factual accuracy against provided facts, and summarize errors. Utilizes JavaScript, Ollama API, and LangChain integration to automate fact verification and summary generation.

Name: PDF to Blog Post Automation
Description: Transforms uploaded PDFs into SEO-optimized blog posts by extracting text with n8n and generating structured content via OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini. Publishes drafts directly to Ghost CMS using Ghost Admin API.

Name: Dynamically Switch Between LLMs
Description: An n8n workflow that dynamically selects and switches between multiple OpenAI language models (gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4o, o1) to generate polite customer support responses. It validates answers via sentiment analysis and handles errors to improve response quality.

Name: Trustpilot Reviews to Google Sheets
Description: Automates scraping recent customer reviews from Trustpilot using HTTP requests and Cheerio parsing, then appends or updates data in Google Sheets for analysis or reporting. Utilizes n8n's HTTP Request, Code, and Google Sheets nodes to extract review details and save structured data automatically.

Name: Glassdoor Company Summary with Google Gemini & Bright Data
Description: Automates extraction and summarization of Glassdoor company info using Bright Data Web Scraper API and Google Gemini (PaLM) language model. Retrieves up-to-date company data, checks scrape status, then summarizes with Langchain AI to provide concise insights.

Name: OCR Invoice & Receipt Processor with Google Drive
Description: Automates OCR extraction of invoices and receipts from Google Drive using OakPDF OCR API via RapidAPI, integrates with Google Sheets for structured data storage. Enables real-time and manual triggers for seamless document processing and record keeping.

Name: Notion to Supabase Vector Storage with OpenAI
Description: Automates storing textual content from new Notion pages as vector documents in Supabase using OpenAI embeddings. Integrates Notion (page trigger, content retrieval), OpenAI (text embeddings), and Supabase (vector column storage) to enable efficient semantic search and organization.

Name: Automated Backup of n8n Workflows to Gitea
Description: This workflow automates backing up n8n workflows to a Gitea Git repository every 45 minutes. It uses the n8n API to fetch workflows, compares changes, encodes them in base64 using Python code nodes, and manages files via Gitea's API with HTTP Request nodes secured by Personal Access Tokens.

Name: Automated PDF Scans Upload to Nextcloud
Description: Workflow automates copying scanned PDF files from a local ScanServJS API to Nextcloud. Uses HTTP Request nodes to fetch file lists and files, Nextcloud node for uploading, and Schedule Trigger for hourly automation. Ideal for managing scanned documents efficiently.

Name: Automated Q&A Generator for n8n Integrations
Description: This n8n workflow automates the creation of FAQ templates for various service integrations using Google Sheets, OpenAI GPT-4, and Google Drive. It reads integration data from Sheets, generates and enhances Q&A pairs with AI, and saves results to Drive for CMS use (e.g., Wordpress, Webflow, Strapi).

Name: Pipedrive Org Data Enrichment with GPT-4 and ScrapingBee
Description: Automates enriching new Pipedrive organizations by scraping their website with ScrapingBee, summarizing company info via OpenAI GPT-4o, creating detailed Pipedrive notes, and sending formatted Slack alerts. Integrates Pipedrive API, ScrapingBee API, OpenAI GPT-4o, and Slack API.

Name: Airtable Product Data Enricher with AI Vision & Web Agent
Description: This n8n workflow automates enrichment of product data in Airtable from photos using OpenAI's GPT-4o vision model, SERP API for reverse image search, and Firecrawl.dev for web scraping. It intelligently analyzes images, performs internet research, and updates Airtable records with detailed product attributes.

Name: Dynamic HTML Generator with OpenAI Structured Output
Description: This n8n workflow uses OpenAI's GPT-4o API with Structured Output to generate HTML pages dynamically from user queries. It converts JSON UI components styled with Tailwind CSS into HTML, then serves it via webhook. Tech stack: OpenAI API, Tailwind CSS, n8n webhook.

Name: PDF Data Extraction via Claude & Gemini APIs
Description: n8n workflow automates downloading a PDF from Google Drive, converts it to base64, and extracts data using Claude 3.5 Sonnet and Google Gemini 2.0 Flash AI models with custom prompts. Enables comparison of extraction accuracy, latency, and cost.

Name: Logo Sheet AI Extractor to Airtable
Description: This n8n workflow automates extracting product/tool data from uploaded logo sheet images using OpenAI GPT-4 with Langchain AI agent. It parses tools and their attributes, maps similarities, and upserts structured records into Airtable. Ideal for cataloging software tools from visual data.

Name: Self-hosted LLM Personal Data Extractor
Description: An n8n workflow that uses a self-hosted Mistral NeMo LLM via Ollama API to extract structured personal data from chat messages. It features error auto-correction, structured JSON schema parsing, and real-time chat triggers for reliable data extraction.

Name: Automated Credit Card Spend Extractor
Description: This n8n workflow automates extraction of credit card transaction details from Gmail labeled emails using Gmail API, PDF extraction, HTML parsing, and AI NLP models (Google Gemini, Groq LLaMA, LangChain) to structure spend data, then logs it into Google Sheets for finance tracking.

Name: Google Trends Keyword Tracker & Summarizer
Description: Automates fetching top trending keywords from Google Trends Italy RSS, scrapes related news content using jina.ai API, summarizes combined text, and appends results with metadata to Google Sheets for editorial planning. Uses n8n with Google Sheets, HTTP Request, XML, and Code nodes.

Name: NetSuite SuiteQL API Query Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow integrating NetSuite REST API to run SuiteQL queries via a webhook or manual trigger. It leverages n8n's NetSuite node to fetch and respond with dynamic query results, enabling automated and real-time data retrieval from NetSuite ERP systems.

Name: AI-Enhanced Structured Output Parser
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI Chat models with LangChain for parsing structured data. It processes prompts, validates and auto-fixes AI outputs to extract formatted information like US states and cities with populations, ensuring reliable structured data generation.

Name: Stock Earnings Report Analysis with AI & Pinecone
Description: Automates analysis of stock earnings PDFs using n8n with Google Gemini embeddings, Pinecone vector store, Google Sheets/Drive integration, and AI agents. Generates detailed markdown financial reports and saves to Google Docs, focusing on Google (Alphabet Inc.) earnings over last 3 quarters.

Name: Hugging Face Paper Summarizer to Notion
Description: Automates daily extraction of new research papers from Hugging Face, analyzes abstracts using OpenAI GPT-4O, and stores structured summaries in Notion. Tech stack includes Hugging Face API, HTML extraction, OpenAI API (GPT-4O), and Notion API integration.

Name: INSEE Data Enrichment for Agile CRM
Description: Automate enrichment of Agile CRM company data with official French company info from the INSEE OpenData API. This workflow integrates Agile CRM and INSEE APIs to update company addresses and add SIREN identifiers, improving CRM accuracy with verified government data.

Name: OpenAI Model Fine-tuning Automation
Description: Automates fine-tuning of OpenAI GPT models using training data from Google Drive. Integrates Google Drive API, OpenAI file upload, and fine-tuning job creation with n8n automation platform to streamline custom AI model creation and deployment.

Name: Google SERP Extraction & Summarization with Bright Data
Description: Automates Google Search scraping using Bright Data API, processes results with Google Gemini AI for extraction and summarization, then sends formatted data via webhook. Utilizes n8n, Bright Data, and Google Gemini PaLM API for advanced search analysis.

Name: Invoice PDF Generator with JSReport & n8n
Description: Automates invoice creation from form input using n8n workflows, JSReport API for PDF generation, and Gmail to email invoices. Integrates form-trigger, HTTP POST to JSReport (document template API), and Gmail OAuth2 for sending, streamlining billing tasks.

Name: AI-Powered Weather Forecast with Open-Meteo API
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI's GPT chat model with Open-Meteo geolocation and weather APIs for interactive, AI-driven weather forecasts. Users input a city name via chat, AI fetches coordinates, then retrieves and returns a 7-day forecast using HTTP requests, enabling smart travel planning.

Name: AI Agent for Web Scraping & API Data Fetch
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI Langchain agents with API tools like Firecrawl for web scraping and Bored API for activity suggestions. Enables AI-driven data retrieval, parsing, and dynamic interaction via custom HTTP calls to enhance automation tasks.

Name: DeepSeek V3 Chat & Reasoning AI Agent
Description: An n8n workflow integrating DeepSeek API and Ollama local model with LangChain nodes to create a conversational AI agent featuring reasoning capabilities and memory. Utilizes OpenAI-compatible DeepSeek models and local LLMs for advanced chat interactions.

Name: Confluence Knowledge Base Query Tool
Description: Automates IT support by transforming Slack user queries using OpenAI GPT-4, then searching Confluence via its API to return relevant KB article titles, links, and excerpts. Integrates n8n, OpenAI, and Confluence APIs for efficient knowledge retrieval.

Name: Auto Resume Disabled n8n Workflows
Description: An n8n workflow that automatically resumes disabled workflows tagged with 'auto_resume:true' every 4 hours using n8n API nodes, schedule triggers, and filters. Ensures continuous automation by activating paused workflows in n8n.

Name: WhatsApp & Asana Customer Support Automation
Description: Automates customer support by capturing form data via n8n form trigger, sending confirmation messages through WhatsApp Business Cloud API, and creating support tickets in Asana task management. Integrates n8n native forms, WhatsApp Business Cloud API, and Asana API for seamless support workflows.

Name: Gmail Automation Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow automating Gmail operations like sending, replying, getting emails, and waiting for responses using Gmail OAuth2 API. Integrates n8n's langchain MCP trigger for AI-driven email handling and dynamic message management.

Name: Sync New Clients from Notion to Clockify
Description: Automate client management by syncing new clients from a Notion database to Clockify workspace using n8n. Utilizes Notion API as trigger and Clockify API to add clients automatically, streamlining project tracking setup.

Name: AI Movie Recommendation Agent with MongoDB
Description: An AI-driven movie recommendation chatbot using OpenAI GPT and MongoDB aggregation. It receives user chat input, queries a MongoDB movies collection with AI-generated aggregation pipelines, provides recommendations, and allows saving favorite movies. Built with n8n, OpenAI API, and MongoDB.

Name: Client Feedback AI Summary & Social Post
Description: Automates client feedback processing using n8n workflow with Deepseek AI API for analysis, email for report delivery, and Telegram for social media draft sharing. Summarizes positives, suggests improvements, and drafts social posts from feedback.

Name: OpenAI Assistant with File Upload & Chat
Description: Automates creating a custom OpenAI Assistant by uploading a Google Drive document and enabling chat interaction. Uses Google Drive API, OpenAI API (file upload, assistant creation, GPT-4 Turbo). Ideal for building knowledge-based chatbots from documents.

Name: AI Tweet Generator with Hashtag & Airtable
Description: Generates short tweets including random tech hashtags using OpenAI's text-davinci-001 API, then stores results in Airtable. Uses n8n for workflow orchestration with manual trigger, function nodes, HTTP request, and Airtable node.

Name: Text-to-Speech Audio Generator with OpenAI
Description: An n8n workflow that converts text to audio using OpenAI's text-to-speech API. It features a POST webhook to receive text input, processes it with OpenAI audio generation, and responds with the audio binary. Useful for automating audio content creation.

Name: Automated Web Server Uptime Monitor
Description: An n8n workflow that monitors web server availability every minute. It fetches server lists from Google Sheets, checks server status via HTTP requests, logs results in Google Sheets, and sends Gmail alerts on downtime. Uses Google Sheets API, HTTP Request node, and Gmail API.

Name: Daily Weather Data Fetch & Store
Description: Automates daily fetching of weather data using the OpenWeatherMap API and stores temperature, humidity, wind speed, and location info in Airtable for historical tracking.

Name: Matomo Analytics Visitor Insights
Description: Automates gathering of Matomo analytics visitor data (visits>3) via API, analyzes it using Meta LLaMA AI on Openrouter, and stores SEO insights in Baserow. Uses n8n to schedule, process JSON, and integrate Matomo, Openrouter AI, and Baserow for actionable website visitor behavior analysis.

Name: CSV to Postgres Automatic Import
Description: This n8n workflow automates importing CSV files stored locally into a PostgreSQL database. It uses a manual trigger, reads the CSV file, converts it into spreadsheet format, and inserts data into Postgres. Key tools: n8n, PostgreSQL, local file system.

Name: Form Data Capture & Storage to Airtable
Description: Automates capturing user-submitted form data via n8n's form trigger and stores it directly in Airtable. Utilizes n8n workflow nodes with Airtable API integration to streamline data collection for easy structured management and future use.

Name: Global SMS Sender via ClickSend API
Description: Automate sending SMS worldwide using the ClickSend API with n8n. This workflow sets SMS content and recipient, then sends the message via HTTP POST with Basic Auth. Ideal for global SMS notifications with easy setup instructions included.

Name: Spotify Monthly Playlist Updater
Description: Automates creation and update of a Spotify monthly playlist by syncing liked tracks using Spotify API and storing data in NocoDB. Scheduled with n8n to maintain playlist freshness and database records.

Name: URL Shortener and Click Tracker with Airtable
Description: An n8n workflow that creates short URLs by hashing long URLs using SHA256 and stores them in Airtable. It redirects short URLs to the original URLs while tracking click counts. Includes a dashboard displaying total links, clicks, and hosts. Uses Webhooks, Airtable API, and built-in crypto node.

Name: Daily Google Calendar to Trello Cards
Description: An automated n8n workflow that fetches daily Google Calendar events, filters out recurring tasks, and creates Trello cards for each event with relevant details. Uses Google Calendar API and Trello API, triggered every day at 8am to keep task boards current and organized.

Name: Mattermost Standup Bot Workflow
Description: Automates daily standup meetings in Mattermost using n8n. Utilizes Mattermost API, webhooks, and cron schedules to prompt users with configurable questions, collect responses, and publish summarized reports in channels. Includes config dialogs and direct messaging.

Name: Notion Empty Page Archiver
Description: Automates daily archiving of empty pages in Notion databases using the Notion API. Checks all databases and pages, analyzes page content and properties, and archives those with no meaningful content to keep Notion workspace tidy.

Name: Airtable Batch Upsert/Insert/Update Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow to batch process Airtable records with modes for upsert, insert, and update. Utilizes Airtable API via HTTP requests, handles rate limits with wait retries, supports batching to avoid throttling, and merges outputs for efficient Airtable data management.

Name: Weekly Book Recommendation via Open Library
Description: Automates finding and emailing a random book recommendation weekly using Open Library API and n8n automation. Fetches book count, selects a random book, retrieves detailed info, formats the author links, and sends the recommendation via SMTP email.

Name: Notion Team & Project Management Automation
Description: Automates creation and management of team members, projects, and semesters in Notion. Uses n8n with Notion API, webhooks, and JavaScript for data processing. Ideal for educational or organizational project tracking and user-semester-project relations.

Name: Auto AWS Transcribe & Google Sheets Logger
Description: Automates transcription of audio files uploaded to Google Drive by saving them to AWS S3, transcribing via AWS Transcribe, then logging results with metadata into Google Sheets using OAuth2 authentication.

Name: Smart Factory Sensor Monitoring & Incident Alert
Description: n8n workflow integrating AMQP for real-time factory sensor data, converting °C to °F, conditionally triggering PagerDuty incidents for temps ≥50°C, and storing machine & incident data in CrateDB for smart factory monitoring and alerting automation.

Name: HelloFresh Recipe Recommendation Bot
Description: An n8n workflow that uses Mistral large language model API, Qdrant vector search, and SQLite to recommend recipes from HelloFresh's current weekly menu. It processes user inputs, queries recipe data, and provides tailored meal suggestions while excluding off-menu items.

Name: XML to Google Sheets Data Importer
Description: Automates downloading XML data from a URL, parses it, and imports the structured data into a new Google Sheets spreadsheet. Uses n8n with HTTP Request, XML, and Google Sheets nodes. Ideal for converting XML feeds to spreadsheets effortlessly.

Name: Spreadsheet File Processing & Upload Automation
Description: An n8n workflow template for loading, converting, manipulating, and saving Excel and CSV spreadsheet files. Utilizes HTTP Request, Google Drive, Microsoft OneDrive, and SFTP nodes to fetch and upload files. Supports local, public URL, and cloud sources. Automates processing and storage of spreadsheet data in various formats.

Name: Automated Gmail Campaign Manager with Google Sheets
Description: An n8n workflow automating email campaigns using Gmail API and Google Sheets. It sends sequences of personalized emails with placeholders, follows up based on thread replies, and updates contact status in Sheets. Supports scheduling, weekend skipping, and multi-step email sequencing.

Name: Todoist Task Snooze Automator
Description: Automates moving tasks between Todoist projects based on due dates to simulate snoozing. Uses Todoist API, scheduled triggers at 5am and every 5 minutes, date calculations, and HTTP requests to move tasks back to inbox or snoozed project automatically.

Name: Linear Tickets to Google Sheets Sync
Description: Automates daily syncing of team tickets from Linear via GraphQL API to Google Sheets. Includes pagination handling, custom field setting, and data flattening for easy filtering and tracking. Requires Linear API auth and Google Sheets OAuth.

Name: AI-Powered Linear Bug Ticket Team Classifier
Description: This n8n workflow automates bug ticket triage in Linear by using OpenAI GPT-4 to classify tickets and assign them to the correct team. It integrates Linear API, OpenAI API, and Slack to streamline issue management and team notifications.

Name: PDF to AI Q&A with Supabase & Qdrant
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches PDFs from Google Drive, splits and indexes their content into Qdrant vector store via Supabase for fast semantic search, and answers user queries using OpenAI GPT-4o Mini model. Integrates Google Drive API, Qdrant vector DB, Supabase, and OpenAI.

Name: S3 Folder Bulk Download and ZIP Compressor
Description: Automates downloading all files from a specified AWS S3 bucket folder, aggregates them into one item including binaries, and compresses the collection into a ZIP file using n8n's AWS S3 and Compression nodes for easy retrieval or further processing.

Name: Google SERP Keyword Rank Tracker
Description: Automates SEO keyword ranking tracking using ScrapingRobot API and n8n. Fetches Google SERP data for custom keyword lists, processes organic results, assigns ranking positions, and prepares output for databases like Airtable. Ideal for SEO research and competitor analysis.

Name: Webpage to Markdown & Links Extractor
Description: An n8n workflow that uses the Firecrawl.dev API to convert web pages into markdown format and extract links. It handles batch processing with rate limiting and outputs data for further use. Integrates with your own URL database and output tools like Airtable.

Name: Automated Birthday & Event SMS Wishes
Description: This n8n workflow automates daily SMS sending of personalized congratulatory messages using Google Sheets for event data and messages, Twilio for SMS delivery, and a daily cron trigger. It targets automating birthday and event greetings via SMS.

Name: Qualys Report to TheHive Automator
Description: Automates fetching finished vulnerability scan reports from Qualys via API, converts them from XML to JSON, filters new reports, creates matching cases in TheHive SOC platform, and attaches downloaded reports. Uses Qualys API, TheHive API, and n8n workflow automation.

Name: Parallel Sub-Workflow Execution Manager
Description: An n8n workflow to start multiple sub-workflows asynchronously using HTTP webhooks, wait pseudo-synchronously for all to finish, and coordinate completion tracking with retry. Uses n8n nodes: HTTP Request, Webhook, Wait, Code, Manual Trigger for parallel task orchestration.

Name: Webinar Registration to KlickTipp Sync
Description: Automates processing of webinar registrations from JotForm, transforms data (phone, date, URLs), and subscribes contacts with custom tags in KlickTipp CRM for targeted marketing. Uses JotForm API and KlickTipp API integrated within n8n for error-free lead management.

Name: Gravity Forms to KlickTipp Feedback Automation
Description: Automates integration between Gravity Forms and KlickTipp using n8n. Captures form submissions, transforms data (phone format, UNIX timestamps, ratings), manages subscriber details and dynamic tag creation in KlickTipp. Ideal for streamlined feedback and contact management.

Name: Typeform to KlickTipp Quiz Integration
Description: Automates quiz submission processing by integrating Typeform with KlickTipp. It formats quiz data, manages subscriber info including tags dynamically in KlickTipp, and supports seamless lead capture and segmentation. Uses Typeform API and KlickTipp API within n8n for workflow automation.

Name: AI Triathlon Coach Using Strava & Gemini AI
Description: Automates triathlon coaching by analyzing Strava activity data with Google Gemini AI. It provides personalized, data-driven training insights and motivational feedback for swimming, cycling, and running. Sends structured HTML reports via Email or WhatsApp. Tech stack: Strava API, Google Gemini (PaLM) AI, Gmail, WhatsApp API.

Name: Threads to Notion Post Archiver
Description: Automates fetching recent Instagram Threads posts and comments using Threads API, filters and formats media and text content, then archives them into a Notion database with media embeds. Uses n8n, Threads API, and Notion API for seamless social media content archival.

Name: Stripe to QuickBooks Payment Sync
Description: Automates syncing Stripe payment intents to QuickBooks Online sales receipts. Uses Stripe webhooks & API to retrieve customer and payment details, checks/creates customers in QuickBooks via its API, then posts sales receipts. Tech: Stripe API, QuickBooks Online API, n8n.

Name: HTML to PDF Conversion via Webhook
Description: An n8n workflow that receives HTML content through a webhook, converts it to PDF using the CustomJS HTML to PDF API, and responds with the PDF file. Tech stack includes n8n automation, CustomJS PDF toolkit, and webhook handling for dynamic PDF generation.

Name: Invoice PDF Generator via Webhook
Description: An n8n workflow that converts invoice data into a styled HTML invoice and generates a PDF. It uses custom JS for HTML-to-PDF conversion, processes invoice details, and responds via webhook. Ideal for automated invoice creation using n8n and a custom JS PDF toolkit.

Name: Typeform Issue Reporting & Notification
Description: Automates capturing user feedback from Typeform, logs entries to Google Sheets, filters high-severity issues (severity >7), then sends alerts via Slack and email. Integrates Typeform API, Google Sheets API, Slack API, and SMTP for notifications, simplifying issue tracking.

Name: n8n Workflow Backup to Nextcloud
Description: Automates backup of all n8n workflows by fetching them via n8n REST API every 6 hours or on manual trigger, then saving JSON backups to Nextcloud cloud storage. Utilizes n8n HTTP Request, Function, Merge, and Nextcloud nodes for seamless workflow export and cloud backup.

Name: Google Sheets Data Management Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Google Sheets API via OAuth2 to append, lookup, update, and read spreadsheet data. Automates managing rental info by city, modifying rent values, and returning formatted results for streamlined Google Sheets data handling.

Name: Notion Duplicate Page Archiver
Description: An n8n workflow using Notion API and custom JavaScript to identify and archive duplicate pages in a Notion database based on a specified property. Triggers daily or upon page creation to maintain a clean database automatically.

Name: Google Drive Doc Summarizer to Sheet
Description: Automates fetching the latest Google Docs file from a specified Drive folder, summarizes its contents using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and appends the summary with metadata to a Google Sheet for easy organization and quick reference.

Name: n8n Error Notification via Line
Description: This n8n workflow triggers on flow errors and sends detailed notifications via the Line Messaging API using HTTP requests and header-based authentication. It enables real-time error alerts for efficient monitoring and quick response.

Name: Daylight Saving Time Change Notifier
Description: Automates detection of Daylight Saving Time changes for specified timezones. Uses n8n with JavaScript code for timezone handling, Slack API for notifications, and SMTP for email alerts. Helps users adjust schedules by notifying upcoming DST shifts.

Name: HN Learning Resources Recommender via Google Gemini
Description: Automates finding top learning resources by scraping 'Ask HN' posts on HackerNews, analyzing comments with Google Gemini AI, categorizing by resource type and difficulty, then emailing recommendations. Uses HackerNews API, Google PaLM API, and SMTP for email delivery.

Name: AI-Powered CV Screening Automation
Description: Automates CV submission and screening for Software Engineer roles using n8n, Google Gemini (PaLM) AI for resume analysis, Gmail for notifications, and Google Sheets for candidate tracking. Streamlines HR processes with AI-driven candidate compatibility ratings and email alerts.

Name: Wikipedia Data Extraction & Summarization
Description: Automates extraction of Wikipedia content using Bright Data API and summarizes it using Google Gemini AI models. Utilizes HTTP requests, Langchain chains for data extraction and concise summarization, and webhook for notifications.

Name: AI Expense Tracker with Google Sheets
Description: An n8n workflow leveraging OpenAI's GPT via LangChain to parse natural language expense entries from chat, convert them to structured JSON, and append them to a Google Sheets expense tracker. Integrates AI chat triggers, memory, and Google Sheets API for seamless expense logging.

Name: Notion Pages to Supabase Vectors with OpenAI
Description: Automates storing Notion page texts as vector embeddings in Supabase using OpenAI API. Triggers on new Notion pages, fetches and filters content, summarizes text, generates embeddings, and saves them in a Supabase vector column for efficient semantic search.

Name: Summarize Google Sheets Feedback with GPT-4
Description: Automates feedback summarization from Google Sheets form responses using n8n workflow. Integrates Google Sheets API to fetch data, OpenAI GPT-4 to generate summaries, Markdown-to-HTML conversion, and Gmail API to send summary reports via email.

Name: Audio Transcription & Summarization to Notion
Description: Automates transcription of audio files from Google Drive using OpenAI Whisper, summarizes content via GPT-4 Turbo, and stores structured summaries in Notion. Utilizes Google Drive Trigger, OpenAI API, and Notion API for seamless audio content management.

Name: Automated Viral Tweet Scheduler for X
Description: An n8n workflow that automates tweeting every 6 hours with randomized posting times using OpenAI GPT-4 Turbo to generate viral tweets tailored by niche, style, and inspiration. It validates tweet length and posts to X via OAuth2 API.

Name: Jira Epic Retrospective Report Generator
Description: Automates creation of Agile retrospective reports by fetching Jira Epic issues and comments, summarizing with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and generating actionable lessons learned documents in Google Docs. Uses Jira API, n8n workflows, Langchain AI agent, and Google Docs integration.

Name: AI-Powered Web Scraper with Bright Data & Google Gemini
Description: An automated web scraping system integrating Bright Data's MCP SDK for data extraction, Google Gemini AI for query understanding, and n8n workflows. It scrapes webpages as Markdown or HTML, triggers webhooks with results, and saves data locally for analysis.

Name: Jira Ticket Creator from Splunk Alerts
Description: Automates creation and updating of Jira tickets based on Splunk alert webhook data. Uses Splunk webhooks, Jira Cloud API, and n8n workflow automation to search for existing tickets, create new ones, or add comments to avoid duplicates, improving SecOps incident management.

Name: Google Drive to Airtable File Sync & Share
Description: Automates syncing new files from a specific Google Drive folder by sharing them via email and logging metadata (file ID, name, timestamps) into Airtable. Uses Google Drive Trigger and API plus Airtable API for streamlined file management and tracking.

Name: n8n Workflow Visualizer with Mermaid.js
Description: Visualize and explore your n8n workflows as interactive flowcharts using Mermaid.js. It uses the n8n API to fetch workflows, aggregates data, and dynamically renders diagrams with custom node shapes via Mermaid.js and Bootstrap for UI.

Name: Sync Notion Task Updates with ClickUp
Description: Automates two-way synchronization between Notion and ClickUp task statuses using Notion API triggers and ClickUp webhooks. Ensures task updates in Notion reflect in ClickUp and vice versa for seamless project management.

Name: Dynamic Form Builder for Airtable & Baserow
Description: An n8n workflow that dynamically generates web forms from Airtable and Baserow table schemas using their APIs. It converts database fields to n8n form fields, handles form submissions to create/update records, and manages file uploads separately.

Name: AI-Powered US Grants Tracking & Alerts
Description: Automates fetching, AI summarizing, eligibility analysis, and tracking of latest US AI grants from Grants.gov. Uses n8n workflows with OpenAI API for summaries, Airtable as database, and Gmail for email alerts to subscribers.

Name: Proxmox API AI Agent Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Proxmox VE API with Google Gemini LLM for conversational management of virtualization tasks. Utilizes Proxmox API, Gemini AI, HTTP requests, and structured output parsing to convert natural language into valid Proxmox API commands for VM lifecycle and cluster management.

Name: Baserow PDF Data Extraction with AI
Description: Automates extraction of data from PDFs into Baserow tables using webhooks, Baserow API, n8n workflow, and OpenAI language models. Supports dynamic prompts per field and updates rows on events like row updates and field changes.

Name: CallForge AI Sales Call Data to Notion
Description: Automates extraction and organization of AI-processed sales call data into Notion. Integrates Gong AI transcripts, Notion databases, and handles product feedback and AI use cases with rate limiting and data validation for streamlined CRM insights.

Name: Startup Funding News Data Extractor
Description: Automates extraction and structuring of funding news data from TechCrunch and VentureBeat sitemaps using n8n with Langchain AI (Anthropic Claude, OpenRouter Perplexity), HTML/XML parsing, and Airtable for storage. Enables comprehensive company funding research.

Name: AI Workplace Discrimination Pattern Detector
Description: This n8n workflow uses ScrapingBee to extract Glassdoor reviews, employs OpenAI's LLMs to analyze demographic rating disparities, calculates statistical measures like z-scores & effect sizes, and visualizes results with QuickChart, helping identify workplace discrimination patterns.

Name: Reddit Business Opportunity Analyzer with AI
Description: Automates fetching and filtering Reddit posts from r/smallbusiness, analyzes business-related content using GPT-4o-mini (OpenAI API) for sentiment, summarization, and solution ideation, then categorizes results into Gmail drafts and logs insights to Google Sheets.

Name: Etsy Data Mining Automation with Bright Data & AI
Description: Automates Etsy product data extraction using Bright Data's Web Unlocker API for scraping, enriched by Google Gemini and OpenAI for AI-driven information extraction and pagination handling. Outputs structured product info and supports webhook notifications and disk storage.

Name: PDF Digital Certificate & Signing Service
Description: n8n workflow automating PDF digital signing with key generation using node-forge and @signpdf libraries, plus API endpoints for uploading, signing, and downloading PDFs securely. Supports PFX cert creation and handles file management in a server environment.

Name: AI News Summary & Auto Post to X
Description: Automates fetching the latest AI news using Perplexity AI API and posts concise headlines with article links to X (formerly Twitter) every 21 hours. Uses n8n for scheduling, HTTP requests, and Twitter OAuth2 API integration for social media automation.

Name: Billbee Address Validation Automation
Description: Automates address validation for Billbee orders using Endereco API. Fetches shipping data from Billbee, validates and corrects addresses via Endereco service, updates Billbee, and applies tags for validation status. Uses Billbee API, Endereco API, and n8n automation.

Name: Medoids Setup for Crop Anomaly Detection
Description: n8n workflow sets cluster centers and thresholds for anomaly detection in agricultural crop data using Qdrant vector DB, Voyage AI multimodal embeddings, and Scipy. Enables precise identification of cluster representatives and scoring for anomaly detection with Qdrant Cloud API.

Name: Todoist Weekly Completed Tasks Review
Description: Automates weekly retrieval of completed Todoist tasks using Todoist API. Filters out unwanted projects, formats tasks by completion date into an HTML email, and sends a summary every Friday. Built with n8n automation, HTTP Request, JavaScript code, and email nodes.

Name: n8n Gmail Error Notification Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers on workflow errors (execution and trigger-level) and sends detailed error notification emails via Gmail. Includes error details, stack traces, and direct links to workflows and executions. Uses n8n Error Trigger and Gmail nodes for robust error handling.

Name: 3D Model to Spinning Video Generator
Description: Automates creation of 3D spinning videos from AI-generated images using PiAPI's Midjourney, GPT-4o-image, and Kling APIs. Workflow includes image generation, transformation to 3D figurines, and final video rendering with status checks and waits, all orchestrated in n8n.

Name: SRT Subtitle File Translator
Description: An n8n workflow automating SRT subtitle file translation using Google Translate API. It extracts text from uploaded SRT files, processes subtitle blocks, translates content to selected languages (e.g., EN, JP), then rebuilds and returns the translated SRT file. Utilizes n8n form triggers and file processing nodes.

Name: ParquetReader File Converter to JSON
Description: An n8n workflow that converts uploaded Parquet, Avro, ORC, and Feather files to JSON format using the ParquetReader API. It uses a webhook to receive files, sends them via multipart/form-data to the API, and parses the JSON response, enabling easy data transformation and integration.

Name: Automated Online List Builder
Description: An n8n workflow that automates building curated online lists by querying Google search with Airtop API, extracting people info from web pages, deduplicating results, and appending to Google Sheets. Uses Airtop API, Google Sheets, and custom JavaScript.

Name: n8n Workflow Documentation Generator
Description: Automates documentation for n8n workflows using OpenAI GPT-4, Mermaid.js for diagrams, and Docsify for Markdown rendering. Supports viewing, editing, auto-generating, and saving workflow docs stored as Markdown files.

Name: Gumroad to Beehiiv Newsletter & CRM Sync
Description: Automates adding Gumroad sales to Beehiiv newsletter subscriptions and Google Sheets CRM, plus Telegram notifications. Uses Gumroad API webhook, Beehiiv HTTP API, Google Sheets OAuth2, and Telegram bot. Ideal for creators syncing sales with newsletter & CRM.

Name: Google Drive to PGVector Loader
Description: Automates loading of documents from Google Drive into a Postgres PGVector database with OpenAI embeddings. Supports PDF, text, and JSON files, uses Langchain nodes for processing, enabling vector search-ready storage and management.

Name: AI Website Screenshot Analyzer
Description: Automate website screenshot capture using URLbox API, then analyze the image content with OpenAI's vision capabilities in n8n workflow. Combines URL capture, AI image analysis, and data merging for concise website summaries. Requires URLbox & OpenAI API keys.

Name: Google Sheets to Postgres Sync Automation
Description: Automates synchronization of data from Google Sheets to a Postgres database using n8n. Utilizes Google Sheets API and Postgres nodes to retrieve, compare, insert, and update rows on a scheduled hourly basis, ensuring database consistency with spreadsheet updates.

Name: Backlink Live Status Checker
Description: Automates backlink verification by reading URLs from Google Sheets and checking their live status using DataForSEO's On-Page API. Updates sheet with backlink statuses ('Live', 'Lost', or 'Lost (Nofollow)'). Integrates Google Sheets, DataForSEO API, and n8n automation.

Name: MAIA Health Check URL Monitor
Description: Automates website health monitoring by fetching URLs from Google Sheets, checking their HTTP status, and sending alerts via Telegram. Utilizes Google Sheets API, HTTP Request node, and Telegram Bot API, enabling easy scheduled uptime notifications.

Name: Multi-LLM Testing & Analysis with LM Studio
Description: An n8n workflow to test multiple local LLMs via LM Studio API, analyze readability and language metrics, and save results to Google Sheets. Uses LM Studio server API, n8n LangChain nodes, and Google Sheets integration to track and compare LLM outputs effectively.

Name: Meeting Booking to Newsletter & CRM Sync
Description: Automates adding meeting attendees from Cal.com to Google Sheets and Beehiiv newsletter, with Telegram notifications. Integrates Cal.com webhook, Google Sheets API, Beehiiv API, and Telegram bot for seamless CRM and newsletter management.

Name: Multipage Website Scraper with Jina.ai & Google Drive
Description: This n8n workflow scrapes multipage websites using sitemap XMLs, processes content with Jina.ai's no-API-key web scraper, extracts titles and markdown, and saves them to Google Drive. It automates website content collection and organization efficiently.

Name: Weekly News Scraper & Summarizer
Description: Automates weekly scraping of news posts from Colt's website without RSS feed. Uses CSS selectors for extracting titles, dates, and links, then summarizes and extracts keywords via OpenAI GPT-4 API. Stores results in a NocoDB SQL database for further processing.

Name: Gmail Invoice Attachments to Google Drive & Sheets
Description: Automates processing of unread Gmail emails with PDF invoices by saving attachments to Google Drive, extracting invoice data using OpenAI's GPT-4, and appending results to Google Sheets for reconciliation. Integrates Gmail API, Google Drive API, Google Sheets API, and OpenAI GPT-4.

Name: 360° Virtual Try-on Video Generator
Description: Automates creation of 360° virtual try-on clothing videos using Kling API via PiAPI. Integrates HTTP requests, status checks, and wait nodes in n8n workflow. Ideal for fashion e-commerce and content creators seeking immersive try-on experiences.

Name: Colombian Electronic Invoice Processor
Description: Automates extraction and organization of Colombian electronic invoices from Gmail ZIP attachments. Uses OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via LangChain to parse PDF and XML invoice data, validates totals, saves PDFs to Google Drive, and logs details in Google Sheets for easy tracking.

Name: Competitor Pricing Monitor & Alert System
Description: Automates monitoring competitor pricing by fetching URLs from Google Sheets, using Airtop AI to summarize and compare pricing plans, filters changes, updates the sheet, and sends Slack alerts. Integrates Google Sheets API, Airtop AI, and Slack API.

Name: ICP Company Scoring Automation
Description: Automates Ideal Customer Profile scoring by extracting company data from Google Sheets, analyzing LinkedIn data via Airtop AI, and updating scores back to the sheet. Tech stack includes Google Sheets API and Airtop AI for detailed LinkedIn company profile analysis and scoring.

Name: Airflow DAG Run Trigger & Monitor
Description: An n8n workflow to trigger Apache Airflow DAG runs and monitor their state using Airflow REST API with HTTP Basic Auth. It supports waiting with retry logic until the DAG run succeeds or fails, returning task results via XCom. Useful for automating Airflow DAG execution and status retrieval.

Name: Sync Jira Issues & Comments to Notion DB
Description: Automates syncing Jira issue events (created, updated, deleted) with a Notion database, updating issue details and statuses in real-time. Utilizes Jira Webhooks, Notion API, conditional logic (IF, Switch nodes), and JavaScript for data transformation in n8n.

Name: Qdrant Vector DB Embedding Pipeline
Description: Automates embedding of JSON documents from FTP into Qdrant vector DB using OpenAI embeddings. Uses FTP for file retrieval, OpenAI 'text-embedding-ada-002' for embeddings, Qdrant Vector Store for storage, and Langchain nodes for splitting and loading. Ideal for semantic search setups.

Name: OpenSea NFT Analytics Agent
Description: An AI-powered n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4o-mini and the OpenSea API to fetch and analyze NFT collection stats, wallet events, and market trends. Provides real-time NFT insights, supports multiple endpoints, and ensures compliant, structured NFT data retrieval.

Name: Stripe Payment Order Sync & Customer Info Extraction
Description: Automates syncing Stripe payment events, auto-retrieves detailed customer info and product purchased from Stripe API using webhook triggers and HTTP requests in n8n for seamless order data handling.

Name: Error Logging with Rate-Limited Alerts
Description: An n8n workflow that captures workflow errors, logs them into a PostgreSQL database (via NocoDB schema), and limits alert notifications (email and push) to one every 5 minutes to avoid overload. Includes manual cleanup and extensible error handling hooks.

Name: OpenSea NFT Data AI Agent
Description: An AI-powered n8n workflow integrating OpenSea API and GPT-4o Mini to retrieve, analyze, and process NFT collections, user profiles, contracts, NFTs, payment tokens, and traits. Enables real-time structured NFT insights with advanced query support and session memory.

Name: Web Data Search & Summarization with Gemini AI
Description: Automates web data retrieval and summarization using Bright Data's scraping API, Perplexity search, and Google Gemini AI models. Extracts data snapshots, processes and summarizes content via LangChain integration, then sends results to webhooks for notifications.

Name: OpenID Connect (OIDC) Authentication Flow
Description: An n8n workflow implementing OpenID Connect client login using OAuth2 with PKCE. Utilizes webhook, HTTP requests to auth, token, and userinfo endpoints, and dynamic HTML responses for login and welcome pages. Supports Keycloak and similar providers.

Name: Batch Import CSV Files to Google Sheets
Description: Automates importing multiple CSV files from a folder into a Google Sheet using n8n. It reads CSVs, removes duplicate users, filters only subscribers, sorts by subscription date, and updates the sheet via Google Sheets API integration.

Name: AI-Powered Dynamic Clarification Form
Description: This n8n workflow uses OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini model to analyze open-ended form responses and dynamically generate follow-up questions to avoid redundancy, optimizing data capture. It combines n8n forms, Langchain output parsing, and filtering to create adaptive multi-step forms for AI consultancy lead qualification.

Name: AI Travel Planner with MongoDB & Google Gemini
Description: An AI-powered travel assistant built with n8n using Google Gemini for chat, MongoDB Atlas for chat memory and vector search, and OpenAI embeddings. It ingests points of interest, enabling intelligent travel recommendations based on up-to-date vectorized data.

Name: LLM Output Comparison with OpenRouter & Sheets
Description: An n8n workflow to compare outputs of two language models via OpenRouter API, displaying results side-by-side in chat and logging them into Google Sheets. Features isolated model memory, supports OpenAI and Vertex AI, enabling manual or automated evaluation.

Name: Pipedrive Organization Data Enrichment
Description: Automates enrichment of Pipedrive organizations by scraping their website using ScrapingBee, summarizing company info with OpenAI GPT-4o, adding a detailed note in Pipedrive, and sending Slack notifications. Utilizes Pipedrive API, ScrapingBee API, OpenAI GPT-4o, and Slack integration.

Name: AI-Powered Contact Manager with Airtable
Description: Automates contact management combining OpenAI GPT-4o and Airtable APIs. Uses AI agent for intelligent querying, adding, and updating contacts seamlessly, ideal for CRM automation and productivity enhancement.

Name: Vision-Based AI Web Scraper with Google Sheets
Description: This n8n workflow uses Google Sheets, ScrapingBee API, and Google Gemini-1.5-Pro AI model to extract structured e-commerce data from website screenshots. It falls back to HTML scraping converted to Markdown for accuracy, outputting organized JSON results to Google Sheets.

Name: DeepSeek Chat & Reasoning Agent
Description: An n8n workflow integrating DeepSeek's AI models (deepseek-chat & deepseek-reasoner) and Ollama local model for advanced conversational AI with reasoning. Uses Langchain nodes, HTTP requests, memory buffer, and OpenAI-compatible APIs to manage chat interactions and multi-turn memory.

Name: n8n Workflow Documentation System
Description: This n8n workflow generates, views, edits, and saves Markdown documentation for n8n workflows using Docsify, Mermaid.js, and OpenAI GPT-4 API. It auto-creates workflow docs with interactive Mermaid diagrams, live Markdown editor, and serves HTML/Markdown content via webhooks.

Name: Perplexity AI Article Formatter
Description: n8n workflow integrating Perplexity.ai API with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to convert structured article data into professional, single-line HTML content. Uses AI for research, content enhancement, and HTML formatting to automate article generation with rich metadata and hashtags.

Name: LM Studio Multi-LLM Testing & Analysis
Description: Automates testing and comparison of multiple local LLMs via LM Studio server. Uses HTTP requests, LangChain nodes, OpenAI API credentials, and Google Sheets for logging. Analyzes response metrics like readability, word count, and timing for informed LLM evaluation.

Name: Gmail PDF Attachment Filter & Google Drive Upload
Description: Automates filtering PDF email attachments by text content using OpenAI, then uploads matched PDFs to a Google Drive folder. Integrates Gmail, OpenAI, and Google Drive via n8n. Ideal for processing invoices, payslips, or contracts received by email automatically.

Name: Podcast Transcript Summarizer & Digest Sender
Description: Automates summarizing a podcast transcript with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, extracts key topics and questions, enriches them via Wikipedia research, formats the content in HTML, and emails a digest using Gmail. Utilizes n8n, LangChain modules, OpenAI API, and Wikipedia tool.

Name: Nextcloud Folder & File Move Automation
Description: Automates moving folders and all their files/subfolders within Nextcloud using Nextcloud API. Supports recursive subfolder processing, folder structure replication, and sequential file moves to handle rate limits in external storage.

Name: Structured Data Extraction & AI Analysis Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow for structured data extraction using Bright Data Web Unlocker API, processed by Google Gemini PaLM AI models for topic extraction, sentiment analysis, and trend clustering by location and category. Saves results to files and supports webhook notifications.

Name: Printify Product Title & Description Updater
Description: An automation workflow integrating Printify API, Google Sheets, and OpenAI to update product titles and descriptions. It uses AI to generate engaging ecommerce content following custom brand guidelines, syncing updates when sheet rows change.

Name: Blockchain DEX Screener Insights Agent
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Telegram and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to provide real-time insights on decentralized exchange (DEX) data via DexScreener API endpoints. It processes user queries from Telegram, fetching token profiles, boosts, pairs, orders, and pools to deliver detailed blockchain DEX analytics.

Name: Dialpad Call to Syncro Ticket Sync
Description: An n8n workflow that integrates Dialpad webhook events with Syncro MSP API to sync call data and create/update support tickets automatically. Uses HTTP Request nodes for Syncro API, processes contact/customer data, and logs activities into Google Sheets.

Name: AI-Powered Webpage Fetch and Markdown Converter
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Langchain AI Agent with OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini and HTTP requests to fetch, sanitize, simplify, and convert webpage HTML content into Markdown. Handles errors, limits length, and offers a simplified or full content mode.

Name: Icypeas Bulk Domain Scan from Google Sheets
Description: Automate bulk domain scans using Icypeas API by reading company data from Google Sheets. Uses Google Sheets node, custom JavaScript for API auth with HMAC-SHA1 signing, and HTTP POST request for domain search tasks. Ideal for bulk domain research and verification.

Name: G2 Competitor Review Monitor
Description: Automates daily monitoring of competitor reviews on G2 using ScrapingBee API for scraping, extracts and converts review data to Markdown, stores results in Google Sheets, and sends new review alerts to Slack for real-time team updates.

Name: Cloudflare KV Namespace Manager
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Cloudflare KV storage API to manage namespaces and key-value pairs. Supports creation, deletion, renaming namespaces, plus read/write/delete of KV pairs with metadata. Utilizes HTTP Request nodes, Cloudflare API, and n8n's set and manual trigger nodes.

Name: Meraki Network Latency & Loss Alert System
Description: Automates monitoring of Cisco Meraki networks by fetching orgs, networks, and uplink latency/loss data via Meraki API. Calculates 5-min averages, filters problematic sites, avoids duplicate alerts using Redis, and notifies teams through Microsoft Teams.

Name: Switchy.io URL Shortener with Meta Parsing
Description: An advanced n8n workflow integrating Switchy.io API, OpenGraph.xyz, Dub.sh, Norton, Bitdefender, and PhishTank to parse URL metadata, check safety, generate screenshots, and create or update short URLs with rich preview images and branding options.

Name: Airtable Automated Recurring Task Creator
Description: Automates recurring task creation using Airtable API in n8n. It retrieves task templates, assignees, clients, calculates task dates, creates new tasks, updates automation records, and optionally notifies assignees via Slack.

Name: Bulk CSV Contact Upload to Airtable
Description: Automates bulk upload of contacts from CSV files into Airtable using Airtable API, CSV parsing, and file download. Tracks upload status (Processing, Uploaded, Failed) and integrates with Airtable Interface and Google Sheets templates.

Name: Daily Crunchbase Fundraising to Google Sheets
Description: Automates daily retrieval of recent Series A, B, and Seed fundraising data from Piloterr API (Crunchbase data) and enriches with company info. Data is processed and updated in Google Sheets. Uses n8n, Piloterr API, and Google Sheets integration for startup funding tracking.

Name: AI Agent for Google Sheets Customer Queries
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4o-mini and Google Sheets API to create an AI agent that answers complex customer data queries by selectively retrieving column names, column values, or customer rows from a Google Sheet. Supports dynamic data fetching to handle large datasets efficiently.

Name: Intercom User Enrichment with ExactBuyer API
Description: Automates enriching new Intercom user profiles by receiving webhook events, fetching detailed contact info from ExactBuyer API, and updating Intercom contacts with social profiles, phone, location, and avatar data via HTTP requests.

Name: Google Drive PDF Chat with Pinecone & OpenAI
Description: An n8n workflow that downloads a PDF from Google Drive, splits it into chunks, inserts embeddings into Pinecone vector DB, and enables chat queries with citation-based answers using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini model. Integrates Google Drive, Pinecone API, and OpenAI API.

Name: Stripe Payment Link Creator
Description: An n8n workflow that automates Stripe product creation and payment link generation. Utilizes Stripe API via HTTP Request nodes, with an input form trigger and automatic webhook redirect. Ideal for simple product monetization setups using Stripe.

Name: AI Gmail Auto Labeler
Description: Automates Gmail email labeling by analyzing message content with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via LangChain in n8n. It triggers on new emails, fetches content, assigns AI-driven labels like 'Inquiry', 'Partnership', 'Notification', and updates Gmail labels accordingly for organized inbox management.

Name: Automated Weekly Google Analytics Reporting
Description: An n8n workflow that automates weekly Google Analytics reporting by fetching and comparing this week vs prior week data on page engagement, country views, and Google Search Console metrics. Uses Google Analytics API and Gmail to format and email HTML reports.

Name: Zalando Price Monitor & Alert System
Description: An n8n workflow that monitors Zalando product prices by scraping product pages, logging price history, updating product info in Google Sheets, and sending email alerts via Gmail when prices drop below user-defined thresholds. Uses Google Sheets API, HTTP Request, and Gmail API.

Name: Automated Arabic Kids Story Generator
Description: An n8n workflow that uses OpenAI GPT-4 Turbo for crafting, translating, and summarizing kids' stories to Arabic, generating DALL·E images and audio narration, and distributing content via Telegram. Ideal for educational content creators and language learning apps.

Name: Dropcontact Bulk Profile Enrichment
Description: Automates enriching LinkedIn profiles without emails using Dropcontact API, PostgreSQL for profile data storage, Python for data transformation, and Slack notifications. Processes profiles in batches asynchronously, ideal for large-scale contact data enrichment.

Name: Spotify Downloads Playlist Automator
Description: Automates Spotify by creating and maintaining a 'Downloads' playlist with the latest liked tracks. Uses Spotify API via n8n nodes, scheduled triggers, and code filters to sync and limit songs, optimizing offline listening with defined limits.

Name: Notion to Webflow Blog Post Sync
Description: Automate syncing blog posts from Notion to Webflow using n8n. Converts Notion rich text blocks to HTML, manages slug uniqueness, updates or creates posts in Webflow, and sends Slack notifications. Integrates Notion API, Webflow API, Slack, and n8n workflow automation.

Name: Automated Invoice Data Extraction & Reconciliation
Description: Automates extraction of invoice data from Gmail PDF attachments using LlamaParse PDF parser, OpenAI GPT-3.5 LLM for structured data extraction, and exports results to Google Sheets. Workflow manages email labeling to prevent duplicates and handles processing status polling.

Name: Automated RFP Q&A Generator
Description: Automates RFP responses by extracting questions from PDF RFPs using n8n with Langchain AI (OpenAI), creates Google Docs for answers, and sends notifications via Gmail and Slack. Enables efficient, AI-powered RFP answering and improves sales team productivity.

Name: Scheduled Website Uptime Monitor
Description: An n8n workflow that checks website statuses every 6 hours using HTTP requests, reads target URLs from Google Sheets, logs uptime events back to Sheets, and sends alerts via Gmail and Slack upon downtime. Uses Google Sheets API, HTTP Request node, Gmail and Slack integrations.

Name: AI-Powered Product Photo Data Enrichment
Description: Automates enrichment of product info from photos in Airtable using OpenAI vision & chat models, SERPAPI reverse image search, and Firecrawl web scraper. Designed for building surveyors to identify and update product attributes efficiently.

Name: AI-Driven Local Folder Organizer
Description: Automates local folder organization by monitoring changes and using Mistral AI to suggest file categorization into subdirectories. Utilizes n8n Local File Trigger, shell commands, and Mistral Cloud Chat Model to intelligently move files, enhancing file management efficiency.

Name: Local Folder to Qdrant AI Bank Statement Expert
