Description: Automates monitoring of a local folder for file changes, syncing bank statement files with Qdrant vector store using Mistral AI embeddings, and provides a Q&A AI agent for querying the documents. Uses n8n workflows, local file trigger, Qdrant API, and Mistral Cloud AI.

Name: AI Rental Payment Reconciliation
Description: Automates reconciliation of rental payments by watching local bank statement CSV files, querying tenant and property data from an Excel file, and using OpenAI GPT-4 to identify payment discrepancies, generating actionable reports all within n8n self-hosted workflows.

Name: AI-Powered SMS Appointment Scheduling Bot
Description: Automates SMS-based appointment scheduling for PC/Laptop repairs using Twilio SMS, Airtable for session management, OpenAI GPT for conversational AI, and Cal.com API for booking. Includes follow-ups and STOP command handling to manage engagement effectively.

Name: HN Comments Insight Generator
Description: Automates extracting, vectorizing, clustering Hacker News story comments using HN API, OpenAI embeddings, Qdrant vector DB, and K-means in Python. Summarizes clustered feedback with GPT-4 and exports insights to Google Sheets.

Name: IKEA Remote to Spotify Control
Description: Automates Spotify playback control via MQTT messages from an IKEA 5-button switch using n8n workflows. Integrates Spotify OAuth2 API and MQTT to handle play, pause, volume, track navigation, and playlist actions on a specified playback device.

Name: n8n Workflow Version Control with GitLab
Description: This n8n workflow automates version control of n8n workflows by syncing them with GitLab. It retrieves all workflows from n8n, compares each with corresponding JSON files in a GitLab repo, and creates or updates files accordingly. It uses n8n API and GitLab API for integration.

Name: Automated Paddle Invoice PDF Saver
Description: This n8n workflow automates processing Paddle invoice emails received in Gmail. It filters Paddle invoices, extracts invoice URLs from emails, converts them to PDFs using pdflayer API, uploads to Google Drive, renames and organizes files in specified Drive folders.

Name: Notion Knowledge Base AI Assistant
Description: Automates search and summarization of knowledge from a Notion database using OpenAI's GPT-4o model. Utilizes Notion API for querying database contents and LangChain for managing AI agent memory and tool integration, enabling concise, fact-based Q&A from company knowledge bases.

Name: Bank Statement OCR to Markdown with Google Gemini
Description: Automates bank statement processing by downloading PDFs from Google Drive, converting PDF pages to images via Stirling PDF API, transcribing images to markdown with Google Gemini Vision LLM, and extracting deposit data as structured JSON. Uses n8n automation with Google Drive API, Stirling PDF, and Google Gemini (PaLM) API.

Name: Adobe PDF Services API Automation
Description: n8n workflow automates Adobe PDF Services API to authenticate, upload a PDF, process it (e.g., extract text and tables), and download results. Integrates Dropbox for fetching test PDFs. Uses HTTP Request nodes with OAuth2 and Header Auth for Adobe API calls.

Name: n8n AI-Enhanced FAQ Generator from Google Sheets
Description: Automates FAQ creation by reading service data from Google Sheets, generating Q&A templates, enhancing answers using OpenAI GPT-4, and saving results as JSON in Google Drive. Supports native, credential-only, and non-native integrations for CMS publishing.

Name: Stripe Invoice PDFs to AWS S3
Description: Automates monthly exporting of Stripe invoice PDFs to an AWS S3 bucket with configurable folder structure by year and month. Utilizes Stripe API, n8n workflow automation, and AWS S3 for cloud storage. Scheduled trigger ensures monthly syncs or manual runs.

Name: Luma AI Text-to-Video Generator
Description: Automates video creation from text prompts with randomized camera motions using Luma AI API and stores results in Airtable. Uses HTTP API, JavaScript for randomness, Airtable integration—enabling quick generation and tracking of creative short videos.

Name: Squarespace Order Fulfillment Automation
Description: Automates fetching and fulfilling Squarespace orders using Squarespace Commerce API with OAuth2 and API key authentication. Supports filtering by fulfillment status, pagination, and automated notification sending to customers.

Name: Batch Processing with Anthropic Claude API
Description: Automates sending and retrieving multiple batched prompts to Anthropic Claude AI via its Batch API. Uses n8n with HTTP Request nodes, JavaScript code processing, and Langchain memory management for parallel prompt execution and result aggregation.

Name: AI Resume Parsing & Client Usage Billing
Description: Self-hosted n8n workflow using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via Langchain Code node to parse uploaded resume PDFs into structured JSON. Tracks token usage and costs per client, logs data to Google Sheets, and auto-generates monthly invoices via Gmail. Enables cost monitoring & billing automation for AI document extraction services.

Name: Gmail Attachments to Organized Google Drive
Description: Automates downloading attachments from filtered Gmail emails, checks and creates company and date-based folders in Google Drive using Google Sheets for whitelist verification. Tech stack: Gmail API, Google Drive API, Google Sheets API via n8n nodes.

Name: SMS Course Assistant with Twilio & Airtable
Description: An automated SMS chatbot workflow using Twilio for SMS triggers, OpenAI (GPT-4) for natural language understanding, and Airtable as a course database. It fetches and answers course queries, logs interactions, and provides up-to-date academic info for Northvale Institute students.

Name: Retell Call Data Auto-Saver
Description: Automates saving Retell AI call analysis data from webhook into Airtable, Google Sheets, and Notion. Utilizes Retell webhooks, Airtable API, Google Sheets API, and Notion API to store call transcripts, summaries, sentiment, and cost details in structured databases.

Name: University Term Dates to Calendar ICS
Description: Automates extraction of term dates from university Excel files using Cloudflare Markdown Conversion, Google Gemini LLM for event extraction, and Python code to create ICS calendar files, then emails the calendar via Gmail for easy import to calendar apps.

Name: Google Keep Notes to Google Sheets via AI
Description: Automates exporting Google Keep notes stored as JSON files in Google Drive, filters, processes content with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini model via LangChain AI, and appends extracted data to Google Sheets. Uses Google Drive, Google Sheets APIs, and OpenAI for text extraction and data structuring.

Name: Daily Exchange Rate Updater to Google Sheets
Description: Automates daily retrieval of USD currency exchange rates via ExchangeRate-API, formats data, and updates & archives it in Google Sheets. Utilizes n8n HTTP Request, Code, Google Sheets, and Schedule Trigger nodes for seamless financial data management.

Name: AI-Powered Daily Israeli News Digest
Description: Automates fetching and processing of Israeli news from Calcalist and Mako RSS feeds, uses GPT-4o to select top 5 executive-relevant articles, and generates a formatted HTML email digest sent daily via SMTP.

Name: Daily Product Hunt Data Fetcher to Google Sheets
Description: Automates daily retrieval of today's top Product Hunt posts using Product Hunt GraphQL API, processes product details, resolves website redirects, and stores enriched data into Google Sheets via service account. Built with n8n, HTTP requests, JavaScript code, and Google Sheets integration.

Name: Indeed Job Listing Scraper with Bright Data & LLM
Description: Automates job search by scraping Indeed listings using Bright Data API. Integrates n8n for workflow, Google Sheets for storage, and OpenAI GPT-4 mini model to assess applicant-job fit. Uses form trigger for search parameters and polls for data readiness.

Name: Glassdoor Job Listings Scraper with Bright Data
Description: Automates job prospecting by scraping Glassdoor job listings via Bright Data API, processes data with OpenAI GPT-4 and LangChain, and stores results in Google Sheets. Includes customizable queries via form triggers for targeted job search automation.

Name: Trustpilot Review Scraper & Ad Copy Generator
Description: n8n workflow scraping Trustpilot competitor reviews via Bright Data API, storing results in Google Sheets, filtering negative reviews, summarizing with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and emailing ad copy suggestions for marketing campaigns.

Name: Amazon Reviews Analysis & Creative Generator
Description: This n8n workflow automates scraping Amazon product reviews using Bright Data API, stores data in Google Sheets, summarizes reviews with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, generates Ads images, and emails media buyers. It leverages Bright Data API, Google Sheets, OpenAI GPT, and Gmail for competitive review analysis and marketing creative generation.

Name: PostgreSQL MCP Server for DB Management
Description: An n8n workflow acting as a PostgreSQL MCP server enabling secure database management operations (select, insert, update) via MCP clients like Claude Desktop. Uses n8n nodes (Postgres, LangChain MCP Trigger/Tools), avoids raw SQL for security and supports schema introspection.

Name: Qdrant MCP Server for Review Analysis
Description: An n8n workflow implementing a customized MCP server to extend Qdrant's vector database features with review database management. Utilizes OpenAI for embeddings and Qdrant API for advanced search, grouping, and recommendation functionalities to handle, search, compare, and recommend customer reviews.

Name: PayCaptain Employee MCP Server
Description: n8n workflow creates an MCP server for PayCaptain payroll, enabling employee search, lookup, and updates via the PayCaptain API. Uses MCP Server Trigger, HTTP Request, Google Sheets (for logs), and LangChain tool workflows. Ideal for payroll automation with audit logging.

Name: EU Sustainability Legislative Scraper & Tracker
Description: An n8n workflow that scrapes EU parliamentary legislative procedures from an official site, uses OpenAI GPT-4 Turbo to classify sustainability-related items, records filtered results in Google Sheets, and creates Google Tasks for study reminders. Tech stack: HTTP request, HTML parsing, OpenAI API, Google Sheets, Google Tasks.

Name: EU Sustainability News Daily Digest
Description: Automates daily scraping of EU news, classifies sustainability articles using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini via LangChain, records results in Google Sheets, and sends a curated HTML email digest via Gmail. Integrates HTTP Request, HTML parsing, AI classification, Sheets, and Gmail nodes for sustainable news curation.

Name: Automated Product Photo Enhancement & Storage
Description: An n8n workflow that downloads product images from Google Sheets, uses OpenAI GPT models to analyze and create AI-generated professional product photography prompts, edits images with OpenAI's image editing API, then uploads results to Google Drive and updates the sheet. Tech stack: n8n, OpenAI GPT-4 & GPT-4O, OpenAI Image Edit API, Google Sheets, Google Drive.

Name: Google Drive Nested Folder Creator
Description: Automates the creation of nested folders in Google Drive from a slash-separated path string. Uses Google Drive API via n8n nodes, and JavaScript code nodes to iterate and check folder existence, creating missing folders step-by-step until the full path is built.

Name: n8n Workflow Backup to Google Drive
Description: Automates scheduled backups of all n8n workflows to a specified Google Drive folder using n8n API, Google Drive API, Gmail for notifications, and Discord for status alerts. Enables reliable versioned backups and timely notifications on success or failure.

Name: Chat Message Batch Consolidator with LangChain
Description: This n8n workflow buffers chat messages per context using Redis, waits for inactivity or message count thresholds, and uses OpenAI GPT-4.1-nano via LangChain to consolidate messages into a single summary paragraph. Ideal for chat apps needing batch processing and deduplication.

Name: WhatsApp Campaign Automation with KlickTipp
Description: Automates personalized WhatsApp outreach using WhatsApp Business Cloud API integrated with KlickTipp for subscriber-triggered campaigns. Features message filtering, template messaging, opt-out management, and dynamic content insertion via n8n workflow.

Name: Secure Webhook with Auth & Payload Check
Description: An n8n workflow that protects a webhook endpoint by verifying a Bearer token and validating required fields in the JSON POST body. Uses native n8n nodes for webhook, conditional checks, JavaScript code, and structured JSON responses for 200, 400, and 401 HTTP codes.

Name: Prevent Concurrent Runs with Redis Lock
Description: n8n workflow to prevent concurrent executions using Redis for distributed locking. It uses Redis keys to track workflow states (set, get, unset) and manages workflow concurrency by erroring if already running. Useful for critical or long-running tasks to avoid overlaps.

Name: Obsidian Notes Automation via Google Drive & OpenAI
Description: Automates creation/update of Markdown notes in an Obsidian Vault by saving workflow outputs to Google Drive. Uses n8n, Google Drive API, and OpenAI for AI-powered Zettelkasten note generation and YAML frontmatter metadata. Enables real-time, structured knowledge management.

Name: Daily Automated Customer Win-Back Offers
Description: An n8n workflow that daily fetches customer churn risk data from Google Sheets, filters high-risk non-campaign customers, and uses Google Gemini (PaLM) AI to generate personalized win-back offers. It logs activity in Sheets and sends offers via Gmail for customer retention.

Name: n8n LLM Chaining Workflow with Anthropic
Description: Automates multi-step content analysis using n8n, Anthropic Claude 3.7 LLM, HTTP scraping, Markdown conversion, and memory management. Processes webpage content via chained and parallel LLM calls for detailed insights and humor generation.

Name: n8n Workflow Management & Backup Automation
Description: Automates listing, detailed retrieval, file backup, and metadata updating of n8n workflows using n8n API, Airtable, Dropbox, and Cron. Supports batch processing and triggers; ideal for managing and backing up workflows systematically.

Name: OpenAI File Retrieval with Citation Formatter
Description: Automates citation-rich content retrieval using OpenAI assistant with vector store for file search. Integrates OpenAI API, HTTP requests, and n8n Langchain memory nodes to format text with dynamic citations in Markdown or HTML, enhancing accuracy and traceability.

Name: Google Calendar MCP Server Integration
Description: An n8n workflow integrating MCP Server with Google Calendar API to manage events via create, read, update, and delete operations. Utilizes Google Calendar OAuth2, n8n MCP Trigger & Client tools, and OpenAI GPT-4o model for AI-driven calendar management workflows.

Name: Clinic Appointment & Reminder Assistant
Description: Automates clinic appointment management and reminders using OpenAI GPT-4, Google Calendar, Google Tasks, Telegram, WhatsApp (Evolution API), and Postgres. Handles patient rescheduling, confirmation, shopping lists, and escalations for a streamlined healthcare workflow.

Name: Sports Betting Data Automation with TheOddsAPI & Airtable
Description: Automates daily retrieval and updating of sports betting events and results using TheOddsAPI for data fetching and Airtable for record management. Includes scheduled triggers for morning event pulls and evening score updates, customizable for any sport.

Name: Open Source Project Metrics Dashboard
Description: Automates collection and updating of development metrics from GitHub, Docker Hub, npm, and Product Hunt APIs to a custom dashboard using n8n workflow automation with HTTP Requests, GitHub node, and JavaScript functions.

Name: Google Sitemap Index URL Re-indexing
Description: Automates fetching and parsing sitemap.xml URLs, checks indexing status via Google Indexing API, and updates Google with new or modified URLs for faster re-indexing. Uses HTTP requests, XML parsing, Google OAuth2 API in n8n workflow.

Name: Auth0 OAuth2 User Login Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that automates user authentication via Auth0 OAuth2. It uses Auth0's OAuth2 API to authorize users, exchange authorization codes for access tokens, and retrieve user info. Includes webhook triggers and HTTP Request nodes for secure login flow.

Name: AI-powered Gmail Auto-labeler
Description: Automatically categorizes Gmail messages into labels (Partnership, Inquiry, Notification) using OpenAI's GPT-4 Turbo and n8n automation. Integrates Gmail API for triggers, label management, and message updates. Enhances inbox organization with AI-driven content classification.

Name: PUQ Docker NextCloud Deployment API
Description: This n8n workflow automates deployment and management of NextCloud instances in Docker for WHMCS/WISECP through an API backend. It uses Docker, docker-compose, SSH, nginx-proxy, and PowerDNS API to manage containers, DNS records, NGINX config, user accounts, and disk mounts.

Name: OAuth2 Configuration Finder AI
Description: AI-powered n8n workflow to identify OAuth2 settings (authorization URI, token URI, audience) for APIs from a service name. Uses OpenRouter Chat Model with Llama 3.3, LangChain AI integration, and structured JSON parsing with confidence scoring for reliable API OAuth2 setups.

Name: Form Data to Google Sheets & Airtable Pipeline
Description: Automates data collection from an n8n form, extracting date/time, formatting inputs, saving to Google Sheets and Airtable, and sending personalized emails via Gmail. Utilizes n8n workflow with Form Trigger, Code node, Google Sheets, Airtable, and Gmail integrations.

Name: Spotify Liked Songs to Playlist Sync
Description: An n8n workflow that automates syncing Spotify Liked Songs to a specified playlist by adding missing tracks and removing unliked ones. Utilizes Spotify API for data fetch and modification and Gotify for notifications. Runs on a scheduled trigger, ideal for music playlist management.

Name: Google Calendar Event Manager
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Google Calendar API for creating, reading, updating, deleting, and checking availability of calendar events via automated webhook triggers. Utilizes Google OAuth2 for authentication and Langchain MCP trigger for AI-driven interactions.

Name: Landing Page Conversion Rate Optimizer
Description: Automates analysis of landing pages by scraping URLs, then uses OpenAI's GPT-powered Langchain Agent to roast and provide 10 personalized, creative, and actionable Conversion Rate Optimization recommendations. Ideal for marketers and founders wanting data-driven CRO insights.

Name: AI Research Reports via Jina DeepSearch
Description: Automates deep research using Jina AI DeepSearch API and n8n. Users input queries via chat, triggering the API to generate structured, fact-based reports. Includes automated Markdown formatting and cleanup for readable, insightful analysis. No API key needed.

Name: Airtable Multi-Method API Endpoint Template
Description: An n8n workflow providing a RESTful API for Airtable with full CRUD operations via multi-method webhooks. It uses Airtable API and n8n webhook/respond nodes to create, read (single/all), update, and delete customer records in Airtable.

Name: Amazon Best Seller Electronics Data Extractor
Description: Automates extraction of Amazon Electronics best seller data using Bright Data API for scraping and Google Gemini LLM for structured information extraction, delivering product rankings, ratings, and offers as structured JSON.

Name: HN Who is Hiring Job Scraper

Name: Hacker News Historical Headline Summarizer
Description: Automates fetching Hacker News front-page headlines from multiple years on the same day, categorizes and summarizes key tech trends using Google Gemini (PaLM) LLM, and publishes markdown reports via Telegram. Utilizes HTTP requests, HTML parsing, date calculations, and Langchain LLM integration.

Name: Line MiniBear Bot: Namecard & Task Automation
Description: Automates Line messaging by processing texts, images, and audio. Uses Line Messaging API, OpenRouter GPT-4o model, and Microsoft suite (Teams, To Do, OneDrive) to extract namecard info, create tasks, save messages, and manage files with AI-driven content recognition.

Name: AI Motion Illustration Video Generator
Description: Generates motion illustration videos by combining Midjourney AI image generation and Kling API video creation. Uses PiAPI with HTTP requests, automating from image prompt to final video output for content creators and social media professionals.

Name: Paul Graham Essays Vector Search with Milvus
Description: Automates scraping latest Paul Graham essays, extracts and cleans text, creates embeddings with OpenAI, and stores them in Milvus vector database. Enables querying via chat with AI-powered citation retrieval using OpenAI GPT-4 model and LangChain integration.

Name: Perplexity Research to TailwindCSS HTML
Description: An n8n workflow that automates research on a user-provided topic using Perplexity API and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini models, improves the prompt, generates structured article content, and converts it into a single-line, responsive, Tailwind CSS-styled HTML page, optionally sending summaries via Telegram.

Name: DeepResearcher: AI-Powered Notion Research
Description: Automates deep topic research by querying web SERPs, extracting key learnings via OpenAI GPT and Google Gemini, and organizing findings into Notion. Integrates OpenAI and Google Gemini chat models with Notion API for structured expert-level research synthesis.

Description: Automates synchronization of clients, projects, and tasks between Notion and Clockify using n8n. Employs Notion and Clockify APIs, scheduled triggers, webhooks, and dataset comparisons to ensure data consistency and archive outdated entries.

Name: Indeed Company Info Extract & Summarize
Description: Automates extraction and summarization of company data from Indeed using Bright Data's Web Unlocker API and Google Gemini LLM. Converts markdown data to text and HTML, formats results via AI agent, and sends summarized insights via webhook for HR and engineering use.

Description: n8n workflow integrating Line Messaging API and OpenRouter.ai LLM to translate text and image content to Chinese with pinyin and English. Supports text, image input via Line webhook, uses OpenRouter's qwen models, sends replies back via Line API.

Description: An n8n workflow to synchronize Microsoft Entra contacts with Zammad user accounts. It uses Microsoft Graph API to fetch contacts and Zammad API to create, update, or deactivate users. Automates user management by merging, filtering, and comparing datasets.

Description: Automates OAuth2 token refresh for Pipedrive API using n8n, Supabase DB for token storage, and HTTP/webhook nodes. Enables secure storage and refreshing of access tokens for reliable API calls with Pipedrive integration.

Description: Automates retrying failed n8n workflow executions every hour. Uses n8n API for fetching error executions, logs into n8n via HTTP request, filters successful retries, and retries failed executions automatically. Ideal for improving workflow reliability.

Description: An n8n workflow integrating CoinMarketCap APIs with OpenAI GPT-4o Mini to provide detailed cryptocurrency exchange data, asset holdings, market sentiment via Fear & Greed Index, and the CMC 100 index. Designed for crypto analysts seeking automated, structured insights.

Description: Automates synchronization of Microsoft Entra (Azure AD) group users with Zammad user records via Microsoft Graph API and Zammad API. Manages user creation, update, and deactivation to keep Zammad in sync with Entra group memberships.

Name: AI-Powered Airtable MCP Server
Description: This n8n workflow builds an MCP server integrating Airtable with AI tools from Langchain and OpenAI GPT-4o. It enables chat-triggered intelligent CRUD operations on Airtable records using AI agents, memory buffers, and real-time SSE endpoints. Ideal for automated database interactions.

Description: Automates structured bulk data extraction from Amazon using Bright Data's Web Scraper API via HTTP requests in n8n. Waits for snapshot readiness, aggregates JSON results, writes data to disk, and triggers webhook notifications. Ideal for data analysts and engineers.

Description: Automates SEO keyword research using Ahrefs API via RapidAPI, Google Gemini AI for query extraction and response formatting, and custom JS for data extraction. Enables chat-triggered keyword insights with detailed metrics on main and related keywords for content optimization.

Description: An n8n workflow demonstrating various OpenAI API integrations: text completion, chat (ChatGPT), text editing, audio transcription (Whisper), and image generation (DALLE-2). Shows prompts for summaries, translations, HTML SVG generation, and quick email replies.

Name: Printify Product Title & Description Updater
Description: An n8n workflow automating product title and description updates for Printify shops using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini. Integrates Printify API, Google Sheets for trigger and record keeping, and AI-powered content generation to enhance eCommerce product listings efficiently.

Description: Automates daily air quality and pollen data retrieval via Ambee API, then uses OpenAI GPT-4 and Langchain AI to generate personalized, easy-to-understand environmental health summaries and care suggestions emailed to users based on location and health profile.

Name: Notion Work Time & Break Tracker

Name: Tavily API Search & Extract with AI Summary
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Tavily API for intelligent web search and content extraction, combined with OpenAI to summarize content. Automates fetching relevant web data and summarizing it for research or content enrichment using Tavily's search/extract endpoints and OpenAI's LLM.

Name: Trustpilot Review Scraper & Sentiment Analyzer
Description: Automates scraping of Trustpilot reviews using DeepSeek API, extracts detailed review info, analyzes sentiment with OpenAI, and stores results in Google Sheets. Ideal for companies monitoring customer feedback and sentiment analysis.

Name: Google Search Console Data to Google Sheets
Description: Automates fetching Google Search Console data (queries, pages, dates) using Google OAuth2 API, processes it in n8n, and updates Google Sheets reports regularly to track SEO metrics like clicks, impressions, CTR, and position.

Name: Prompt-Based Object Detection with Google Gemini 2.0

Description: Automates processing of AI-generated sales call data with Notion integration. Extracts Marketing Insights, Recurring Topics, and Actionable Insights from Gong calls, then organizes and updates them in separate Notion databases. Uses n8n workflow automation with Notion API.

Name: AI-Driven Google Sheets Data Analyst
Description: An n8n workflow integrating OpenAI GPT-4, LangChain AI Agent, and Google Sheets API to analyze and query transaction data via chat. It filters by date, status, and product using Google Sheets OAuth, enabling dynamic, AI-powered data insights and calculations.

Name: Google Gemini AI Media Analyzer Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow demonstrating 5 methods to analyze images and PDFs using Google Gemini AI (PaLM API), Unsplash image source, and direct API calls. Automates media content understanding with dynamic prompts, batch processing, and data transformations in n8n.

Name: HIBP New Breach Alert Automation
Description: Automates monitoring of new data breaches from HaveIBeenPwned API every 15 minutes. Caches last breach info locally, compares for new incidents, and triggers alerts for new breaches. Built with n8n using HTTP Request, file operations, and conditional logic nodes.

Name: Dropbox Folder Watch & New File Automation
Description: An n8n workflow that monitors specified Dropbox folders using Dropbox webhooks and API, filters new files against a NocoDB database to exclude known files, and triggers subworkflows for new files processing. Uses Dropbox API, NocoDB, and n8n automation platform.

Name: Webpage Change Monitor & Notifier
Description: Automates monitoring of webpage content changes using n8n's HTTP Request, HTML extraction, Crypto hashing, Google Drive & Sheets APIs, and Gmail. Tracks changes via hashes, logs updates, saves snapshots, and sends email alerts for updated webpages.

Name: Gmail PDF Invoice Classifier & Drive Uploader
Description: n8n workflow using Gmail, Google Drive, and OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini to scan emails for PDF invoices/receipts, classify via AI, upload matched PDFs to Drive folders by date, and optionally email them. Customizable with token limits and search terms.

Name: Automated Arabic Kids Story Creator
Description: This n8n workflow automates creating, translating, and sharing kids' stories in Arabic using OpenAI GPT-4 Turbo for story generation and translation, DALL·E for image creation, audio generation, and Telegram for distribution. It fosters educational storytelling with visual and audio content.

Name: AI-Powered HR CV Processing & Evaluation
Description: Automates HR recruitment by extracting candidate info from PDF CVs via LangChain AI, evaluating fit against job criteria, and storing results in Google Sheets. Uses n8n workflow, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, Google Drive, and Sheets APIs for streamlined candidate management.

Name: Text Automation via Apple Shortcuts & OpenAI
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Apple Shortcuts with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini models to automate text tasks: translate (English/Spanish), grammar correction, and text length adjustments. Sends text via webhook, processes through OpenAI, responds to Shortcut for in-app editing.

Name: Company Data Enrichment with OpenAI & Google Sheets
Description: Workflow enriches company data from Google Sheets using ScrapingBee for homepage scraping and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini for extracting business insights. It updates sheets with company business areas, offers, models, and ideal customer profiles automatically.

Name: Amazon Product Price Tracker
Description: Automates tracking Amazon product prices using ScrapeOps API, logging data to Google Sheets, calculating price changes, and sending alert emails when prices cross thresholds. Utilizes n8n workflow with Google Sheets, ScrapeOps HTTP API, and SMTP email integration.

Name: Bank Statement OCR to Data Extraction
Description: Automates extraction of deposit data from bank statements by converting PDFs to images, then transcribing pages to markdown with Google Gemini VLM, finally extracting structured data. Uses Google Drive API, Stirling PDF API, and n8n nodes for PDF/image processing.

Name: French-To-English Audio Translator
Description: Automates French text-to-speech with ElevenLabs, transcribes speech via OpenAI Whisper, translates text using OpenAI GPT, and generates English speech again with ElevenLabs. Useful for multilingual audio content creation and language learning.

Name: Airtop AI Web Automation Agent
Description: An intelligent n8n workflow integrating Airtop browser tooling and Anthropic Claude 3.5 AI to automate complex web browsing tasks. It uses Langchain AI Agent to query, click, type, load URLs and manage browser sessions, enabling natural language driven web interaction and data extraction.

Name: Indeed Company Data Scraper & AI Summarizer
Description: Automates scraping company profiles from Indeed using Bright Data Web Unlocker, extracts and converts markdown data, then summarizes with Google Gemini AI models. Integrates Airtable for URL input and webhook notifications for processed summaries.

Name: Trustpilot Review Scraper & Sentiment Analyzer
Description: Automates scraping Trustpilot reviews using DeepSeek API, extracts detailed review info, analyzes sentiment via OpenAI, and stores results on Google Sheets for easy tracking and analysis.

Name: TOTP Code Generator in n8n
Description: This n8n workflow demonstrates generating Time-based One-Time Passwords (TOTP) using the n8n TOTP node with a configured TOTP account credential. It includes a manual trigger node to test the workflow and is ideal for implementing 2FA code generation within automation processes.

Name: Bitwarden Group & Member Management
Description: Automates Bitwarden password manager group creation, lists all members, updates group members, and retrieves group members. Uses Bitwarden API via n8n nodes. Ideal for managing Bitwarden user groups programmatically and synchronizing member access.

Name: Daily Weather SMS Alert via Plivo
Description: Automates sending daily SMS weather updates for Berlin at 9 AM using OpenWeatherMap API for temperature data and Plivo API for messaging, orchestrated by n8n's Cron node for scheduling.

Name: Todoist Task Categorizer with AI Priority Update
Description: Automates categorizing Todoist inbox tasks into projects using OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini, then updates their priority in Todoist accordingly. Uses n8n workflow with Todoist and OpenAI APIs, scheduled trigger, and filters to streamline task management.

Name: Copper CRM Person Create-Update-Get Flow
Description: n8n workflow automates Copper CRM interactions by creating a person with email, updating phone number, then retrieving the person data, using Copper API and manual trigger node for streamlined CRM data management.

Name: Webflow CMS Item Create & Update Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow automating creation and update of CMS items in Webflow using Webflow API. It triggers manually, creates a new item, then updates it with additional fields including an avatar URL, ensuring content management automation.

Name: Orbit Member Management Workflow
Description: Automates creating and updating members in Orbit using its API. It adds notes and posts linked to members in a workspace. The workflow triggers manually and sequentially manages member data, notes, and posts via Orbit API within n8n.

Name: ClickUp Task Creator
Description: An n8n workflow to automate task creation in ClickUp using ClickUp API. Trigger tasks manually and create tasks in specified ClickUp spaces, folders, and lists. Useful for streamlining project management with no-code automation.

Name: ISS Position Publisher via MQTT
Description: Automates fetching the current ISS location every minute using the WhereTheISS.at API and publishes latitude, longitude, and timestamp data to an MQTT topic for real-time tracking. Built with n8n, integrating Cron, HTTP Request, Set, and MQTT nodes.

Name: Gmail Attachment to Google Drive Link
Description: Automates retrieving Gmail messages with a specific label, uploads their attachments to Google Drive, and outputs the file link. Uses Gmail and Google Drive APIs within n8n workflow to streamline attachment management and sharing.

Name: Add a Book Volume to Google Bookshelf
Description: This n8n workflow uses Google Books API with OAuth2 to fetch a specific book volume by ID and add it to a chosen Google Bookshelf. It automates managing your digital library inside Google Books, simplifying book collection updates.

Name: Notion to Mattermost Meeting Alerts
Description: Automates notifications in Mattermost when new meeting notes are added to a Notion database for the Marketing team. Uses Notion Trigger node to monitor Notion API, applies conditional logic, then sends formatted messages via Mattermost API to alert team members.

Name: Chargebee Event Updates Receiver
Description: An n8n workflow using the Chargebee Trigger node to listen for all Chargebee subscription and billing events in real-time, enabling automated processing and integration with other systems.

Name: Calendly to Notion Personality Sync
Description: Automates the creation of Notion database pages with personality insights by triggering on new Calendly invitees, querying Humantic AI for detailed personality analysis, and storing results in Notion. Uses Calendly webhook, Humantic AI API, and Notion API.

Name: SSL Certificate Expiry Notifier
Description: An n8n workflow that checks the SSL certificate validity of a specified domain (default: n8n.io) using the Uproc API and sends an alert to a Telegram chat if the certificate has expired. Integrates manual trigger, function item, Uproc and Telegram nodes.

Name: ClickUp Event Updates Receiver
Description: An n8n workflow using the ClickUp Trigger node to receive real-time updates for all events in a ClickUp workspace. Integrates with ClickUp's API to automate task and project monitoring efficiently.

Name: URL to Notion Link Logger
Description: This n8n workflow uses Webhook, HTTP Request, HTML Extract, and Notion API to capture URLs, fetch page titles, and add them as entries into a Notion database. It includes Discord reply confirmation. Automates link organization with webpage title retrieval.

Name: UptimeRobot Monitor Create-Update-Get
Description: Workflow using UptimeRobot API in n8n to create a monitor for n8n.io, update its friendly name, and retrieve monitor details. Ideal for website uptime tracking automation with UptimeRobot API credentials.

Name: Microsoft To Do Task Automator
Description: Automates creation and status update of tasks in Microsoft To Do using n8n workflow with manual trigger and Microsoft OAuth API integration. Simplifies task management by creating, updating to 'inProgress', and retrieving tasks seamlessly.

Name: Get and Update Contacts from GetResponse
Description: Workflow to fetch all contacts from GetResponse using its API, check their campaign association, and update the campaign ID if it differs. Built in n8n automation platform, it uses manual triggers, GetResponse API integration, conditional logic, and updates contacts accordingly.

Name: Syncro to OpsGenie Alert Sync
Description: Automates alert creation and closure in OpsGenie from Syncro MSP by receiving webhook notifications. Utilizes Syncro webhooks and OpsGenie API with HTTP Request nodes for real-time incident management and status synchronization.

Name: Steam Phishing Domain Reporter
Description: Automates detection and reporting of Steam phishing domains via webhook. Uses DNS dig commands to validate domain and Cloudflare nameservers, then sends alert emails via Mailgun API to Steam and Cloudflare security teams.

Name: Segment Event Tracking Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow to track custom events in Segment using the Segment API. It triggers manually and sends event data to Segment's tracking endpoint, enabling user behavior data collection for analytics and marketing automation.

Name: API Rate Limiter with Airtable Data Fetch
Description: n8n workflow implements an API rate limiting system using Redis for per-minute and per-hour limits with secured webhook authentication. It fetches Pokemon data from Airtable and returns it if limits are not exceeded, ensuring controlled API usage and data delivery.

Name: AWS Textract Invoice OCR Workflow
Description: Automates OCR extraction of invoice data from an image stored in AWS S3 using AWS Textract API. Triggered manually in n8n, processes 'Rechnung.jpg' from 'textract-demodata' bucket to extract text for further workflows, leveraging AWS cloud services.

Name: ISS Position Tracker to Firebase DB
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches the International Space Station's geolocation every minute using WhereTheISS.at API, then saves latitude, longitude, and timestamp data to Google Firebase Realtime Database. Automates real-time ISS tracking and storage.

Name: Product Label Generator with DB & API Integration
Description: Automates product label creation by integrating n8n webhook, MySQL and PostgreSQL databases, and a local HTTP API for print configuration. Retrieves detailed product, fabric roll, and composition data to generate comprehensive labels for inventory management.

Name: User Signup & Notion Semester Tracker
Description: Automates user signup via a secure HTTP webhook, extracts user name and email, checks existence in Notion database, creates new user if absent, and updates their associated semester info. Uses n8n with Notion API and basic auth for secure, streamlined academic user management.

Name: GitLab Release to Outline Document
Description: Automates creating published documents in Outline from GitLab release tag pushes. Uses GitLab Trigger node for tag_push events, IF node to filter release events, and HTTP Request node to call Outline API to create release notes automatically.

Name: Mautic Form Submission SMS Alert
Description: Automates sending SMS confirmations via Twilio when a form is submitted in Mautic. Uses Mautic API for form trigger and Twilio API to send personalized SMS notifications, ideal for webinar sign-ups or lead confirmations.

Name: Daily Weather Push Notifications with Spontit
Description: Automates daily weather updates for Berlin using OpenWeatherMap API and sends them as push notifications via Spontit. Scheduled with n8n Cron node for daily delivery at 9 AM, ideal for keeping users informed about temperature changes.

Name: SyncroMSP Call Timer Sync
Description: Automates call duration logging to SyncroMSP by syncing webhook call data with Google Sheets to find matching tickets, then adds timer entries via SyncroMSP API. Uses n8n, Google Sheets API, webhooks, and HTTP requests for efficient call tracking.

Name: Strava Activity Reminder & Encouragement
Description: Automates daily activity checks using Strava API to track moving time. If activity is below threshold, sends encouragement emails to accountability partners via SMTP. Built with n8n, integrates Strava OAuth2 and email sending.

Name: Airtable to Mattermost Notification
Description: This n8n workflow automates notifications by triggering on new data entries in Airtable and sending formatted messages to a Mattermost channel. It integrates Airtable API and Mattermost API for real-time alerts, facilitating team collaboration and data monitoring.

Name: PagerDuty Incident Create, Update, and Retrieve
Description: An n8n workflow automating PagerDuty incident management with create, update, and get operations. Uses PagerDuty API via n8n nodes to streamline incident lifecycle management triggered manually.

Name: City Weather Info via OpenWeatherMap API
Description: An n8n workflow that receives a city name via webhook and fetches current weather data using the OpenWeatherMap API. It extracts temperature and weather description to return concise weather info dynamically. Tech stack: n8n, Webhook, OpenWeatherMap API.

Name: URL Job Analysis with Cortex API
Description: This n8n workflow triggers manually to analyze a URL using Cortex's Abuse Finder analyzer and retrieves detailed job results. It integrates n8n with the Cortex API to automate URL threat detection and forensic job data collection.

Name: TheHive Event Update Notifier
Description: An n8n workflow using TheHive Trigger node to receive real-time updates for any event occurring in TheHive security incident response platform. Enables automation based on security event notifications via webhooks.

Name: Iterable User Management Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow integrating with Iterable API to create, update, and retrieve user data by email. It automates user profile management in Iterable marketing platform using n8n's Iterable nodes triggered manually.

Name: Kafka Temperature Alert via SMS
Description: An n8n workflow that listens to a Kafka topic for temperature readings, checks if the temperature exceeds 50, and sends an alert SMS via Vonage API. Integrates Kafka, conditional logic, and Vonage SMS for real-time temperature monitoring alerts.

Name: Shorten URL & Fetch URL Stats with YOURLS
Description: An n8n workflow to create short URLs using YOURLS API and retrieve their statistics. It uses n8n's manual trigger and YOURLS nodes to automate URL shortening and stats fetching, ideal for tracking short link performance.

Name: Factory IoT Data Generator with AMQP
Description: Generates synthetic smart factory data including machine ID, temperature, uptime, and timestamp at regular intervals using n8n. Sends data via AMQP to a specified queue for IoT or monitoring integrations. Tech: n8n workflow, JavaScript, AMQP protocol.

Name: Manage Ghost Posts via Admin API
Description: Automates creating, updating, and fetching posts on Ghost CMS using n8n. Utilizes Ghost Admin API and n8n's Ghost node to streamline content management workflows with manual trigger initiation.

Name: Airtable Data Insert and Update Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow integrating Airtable API to append, list with filter, and update records in an Airtable base. It automates managing data rows programmatically via manual trigger, ideal for streamlined data syncing and updates.

Name: Snowflake Table Create & Upsert Workflow
Description: Automates creation of a Snowflake table and performs insert and update operations using n8n with Snowflake API integration. Ideal for managing and updating data programmatically with no manual SQL needed.

Name: Random User Data to Google Sheets & CSV
Description: Fetches random user data via the RandomUser API, extracts name and country, then appends it to a Google Sheets spreadsheet using OAuth2 authentication and also exports the data as a CSV file. Utilizes HTTP Request, Google Sheets, and Spreadsheet File nodes in n8n.

Name: Automate Twist Channel Creation & Messaging
Description: n8n workflow using Twist API to create and update channels, add users, and send custom messages with action buttons linking to docs. Integrates Twist OAuth2 for secure access to workspace, streamlining team communications and onboarding.

Name: Customer Data Filtering & Branching Demo
Description: An n8n workflow demonstrating conditional filtering and routing of customer data from a custom datastore using If and Switch nodes. Highlights multi-condition logic with AND/OR combos and branching by country (US, CO, UK, others). Ideal for learning data-driven workflow branching.

Name: Customer Messaging Approval Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow demonstrating batch message sending with rate limiting, waits for external approval via webhook, and simulates sending approval URLs to merchants. Uses n8n core nodes, custom Customer Datastore & Messenger, wait, splitInBatches, and webhook nodes.

Name: Weekly MySQL to Google Sheets Export
Description: Automates weekly data export from a MySQL database to Google Sheets using n8n. Triggers every week at 5am, queries all records from 'books' table, and appends them to a specified Google Sheet via OAuth2 authentication.

Name: Google Sheets Row Processing Automation
Description: An n8n workflow that reads rows from a Google Sheets document every 5 minutes, checks if rows are unprocessed, executes actions on new data, marks them processed with timestamps. Utilizes Google Sheets API with OAuth2 for automatic data management.

Name: Google Sheets to HTML Exporter
Description: Automates exporting data from Google Sheets to an HTML file using n8n workflow. Utilizes Google Sheets API via OAuth2 credentials and n8n's spreadsheet file node to convert sheet data into an HTML document triggered by a webhook.

Name: Gmail Label Manage: Fetch, Remove, Add
Description: Automates Gmail email management by fetching messages with a specific label, removing that label, and applying a new one using Gmail API via OAuth2 in n8n workflow. Ideal for organizing emails automatically.

Name: Mattermost Channel Setup and Welcome Message
Description: Automates Mattermost by creating a new channel, adding a specific member, and posting a welcome message using Mattermost API within n8n workflow. Ideal for onboarding and team collaboration setup.

Name: JSON to Google Sheets Append
Description: Automates reading a local JSON file and appending its data to a Google Sheets spreadsheet using OAuth2 authentication. Utilizes n8n's Read Binary File, Move Binary Data, and Google Sheets nodes to streamline data synchronization.

Name: Podcast RSS Feed Generator from Web Episodes
Description: An n8n workflow that scrapes podcast episode data from ardaudiothek.de, parses JSON metadata from episode pages, and generates a valid RSS feed. Utilizes HTTP Requests, HTML extraction, JSON parsing, and custom JS code to create podcast RSS XML feeds dynamically.

Name: Typeform to NextCloud Spreadsheet Sync
Description: Automates data flow from Typeform submissions to NextCloud-stored Excel files. Uses Typeform Trigger to capture form responses, merges with existing spreadsheet data from NextCloud, updates the file, and uploads it back to NextCloud.

Name: Google Drive to Notion File Logger
Description: Automates logging of newly uploaded Google Drive files to a Notion database. Uses Google Drive API trigger to detect file uploads in a specific folder and Notion API to create database entries with file details and links. Ideal for file management and tracking.

Name: Calendly to Mautic Contact Sync
Description: Automates contact creation/update in Mautic when a new Calendly event is created using Calendly webhook and Mautic API integration. Keeps contact info up-to-date by syncing invitee email and first name upon scheduling events.

Name: Clockify Invoice to Notion Logger
Description: Automates logging of new Clockify invoices into a Notion database using Clockify webhook and Notion API. Captures invoice number, issue date, due date, and amount for centralized invoice tracking and management.

Name: Export MySQL Table to XLSX File
Description: An n8n workflow to export data from a specified MySQL table into an XLSX spreadsheet file using MySQL and spreadsheet nodes. Triggered manually, it allows easy saving of SQL table data for sharing or backup.

Name: Manage e-goi Subscribers: Create, Update, Retrieve
Description: An n8n workflow using the e-goi API to create, update, and fetch subscriber details. It automates subscriber management by chaining operations with manual trigger, utilizing e-goi's contact list API for email marketing and audience handling.

Name: Gender Inclusive Language Notifier
Description: An n8n workflow that listens for messages containing gendered terms via a webhook and sends a Mattermost bot suggestion to use gender inclusive language alternatives like "folks" or "y'all". Uses n8n Webhook and Mattermost API integration.

Name: MySQL Products to XML File Exporter
Description: Automates extraction of 16 random product records from MySQL, formats data with or without XML attributes, converts to XML, and saves as files. Utilizes n8n with MySQL node, JSON to XML conversion, and file writing for easy product data export.

Name: Paul Graham Essays Scraper & Summarizer
Description: An n8n workflow that scrapes the latest essays from paulgraham.com, extracts titles and full texts, and summarizes them using OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini model with Langchain nodes. Automates content aggregation and summarization of Paul Graham's essays.

Name: Snowflake CSV Data Importer
Description: Automates importing CSV data from an HTTP URL into a Snowflake database table. Uses n8n nodes: HTTP Request to fetch CSV, Spreadsheet File to parse, Set to map fields, and Snowflake node to insert data.

Name: Website Screenshot Capture with Bright Data
Description: An n8n workflow to capture website screenshots using Bright Data's Web Unlocker API and save them locally. Utilizes HTTP requests with authenticated headers, proxy zone configuration, and file system write operations to automate web page capture.

Name: Phantombuster Data to Airtable Logger
Description: Automates retrieval of data from Phantombuster API and stores structured results (name, email, company) into Airtable. Utilizes n8n workflow with Phantombuster connector, manual trigger, data mapping, and Airtable API for seamless data capture and storage.

Name: Azure DevOps PR to DingTalk Notifier
Description: Automates notifications on new Azure DevOps Pull Requests by sending customized DingTalk messages. Uses Azure DevOps webhook, MySQL for user mapping, and DingTalk's robot webhook API to notify correct users in group chats.

Name: Save URLs to Notion via Webhook
Description: An n8n workflow that uses a POST webhook to capture URLs and automatically saves them as pages in a specified Notion bookmarks database, enabling easy bookmarking and organization. Tech stack: n8n, Notion API, Webhook.

Name: Website Analytics to Airtable Logger
Description: Automates fetching Google Analytics data (sessions by country over a date range) and appends it into an Airtable base for easy tracking. Utilizes Google Analytics API, Airtable API, and n8n automation platform for seamless data integration.

Name: Monday.com Error Logging Automation
Description: Automates error detection in n8n workflows by triggering on errors, extracting stack traces via JavaScript, and logging detailed error records into a specified Monday.com board with timestamps. Integrates n8n, Monday.com API, and custom code for workflow error management.

Name: French to English Audio Translation Workflow
Description: This n8n workflow converts French text to spoken audio using ElevenLabs TTS, transcribes it with OpenAI Whisper, translates to English with GPT-4o-mini, and generates English speech via ElevenLabs. Integrates ElevenLabs TTS API and OpenAI APIs for a full audio translation cycle.

Name: SendGrid Contact Management Workflow
Description: Automates creating, updating, and retrieving contacts using SendGrid API within n8n. Utilizes manual trigger, SendGrid node for contact resource operations including adding first and last names, and fetching contact by email. Ideal for managing email lists.

Name: n8n Workflow Sync to Notion Database
Description: Automates syncing of n8n workflows tagged 'sync-to-notion' with a Notion database. Uses n8n API to fetch workflows every 15 mins, then queries and updates or adds corresponding pages in Notion via Notion API. Ideal for workflow management and monitoring.

Name: G Suite Admin User Management Workflow
Description: Automate creation, updating, and retrieval of G Suite users using the n8n G Suite Admin node with OAuth2 authentication. Ideal for managing Google Workspace users programmatically within n8n workflows.

Name: Gmail Error Notification Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers on errors in other workflows and sends an email alert via Gmail API with error details. Set up with Gmail OAuth2 credentials and target email to receive notifications about workflow failures for quick troubleshooting.

Name: Set Default Error Workflow in n8n
Description: Automates updating the default error workflow ID in n8n workflows stored in a Postgres DB. Uses n8n API to fetch workflows, filters by tags, and updates workflow settings via Postgres node. Scheduled every 4 hours or manually triggered.

Name: Country Info Lookup via GraphQL API
Description: An n8n workflow that retrieves country details (name, phone code, emoji) using a GraphQL query to the countries.trevorblades.com API. It accepts a country code from a webhook, processes the response, and returns a formatted summary string.

Name: HighLevel Contact Address Verifier
Description: Automates verification of mailing addresses from HighLevel CRM contacts using Lob API. It triggers via webhook, verifies address deliverability, and tags contacts in HighLevel accordingly for follow-up or confirmation. Integrates HighLevel CRM, n8n workflow, and Lob address verification API.

Name: Grist Record Transfer with Confirmation
Description: An n8n workflow that uses a Webhook and Grist API to transfer records from a source to a destination table only when a 'Confirmed' boolean flag is true. It prevents duplicate entries by checking existing records before creating new ones, ensuring manual confirmation triggers the process.

Name: XML to JSON Conversion API
Description: An n8n workflow webhook that converts uploaded XML files or XML text payloads into JSON. Uses n8n's Extract From File and XML nodes, supports binary file uploads and text input, sends JSON responses, and logs errors to Slack.

Name: Dynamic NASA API Key Credentials
Description: An n8n workflow demonstrating how to dynamically set NASA API credentials using form input expressions. Utilizes n8n Form Trigger, NASA API node, and Respond to Webhook to fetch and redirect to NASA's picture of the day. Great for learning dynamic credential handling.

Name: Automated Mautic Contact Unsubscribe via Gmail
Description: This n8n workflow automates unsubscribing contacts in Mautic based on unsubscribe emails received in Gmail. It uses Gmail API to trigger on new emails, parses sender emails, searches Mautic contacts via Mautic API, updates contact segments (unsubscribe and newsletter), and replies with a confirmation message.

Name: Redis Workflow Lock for Scheduled Runs
Description: An n8n workflow that uses Redis to lock execution status, preventing concurrent runs of a main workflow triggered on a set schedule. It checks and updates workflow state as 'running' or 'idle' to ensure serialized runs, using scheduleTrigger, Redis, and executeWorkflow nodes.

Name: FlutterFlow Low-Code API Endpoint
Description: n8n workflow provides a low-code API endpoint for FlutterFlow apps using webhooks, a customer datastore node, data aggregation, and response formatting. Easily customize with your database and serve GET requests for app data integration.

Name: DOCX to PDF Conversion Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that converts DOCX files to PDF using ConvertAPI service. It fetches a DOCX file from a URL, sends it to ConvertAPI with query authentication, and saves the resulting PDF locally. Ideal for automated document format conversion.

Name: Scheduled Website Scraper with Scrappey API
Description: An automated workflow using n8n that triggers on schedule to scrape any website via the Scrappey API, avoiding anti-bot blocks. It uses n8n's Schedule Trigger, HTTP Request node with Scrappey API, and customizable URL input for scalable web scraping tasks.

Name: XLSX to PDF Conversion Workflow
Description: Automates downloading an XLSX file, converts it to PDF using ConvertAPI's API, and saves the PDF locally. Utilizes n8n, HTTP Requests, and file handling nodes to streamline document format conversion.

Name: PPTX to PDF Conversion Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that automates downloading a PPTX file, converting it to PDF using ConvertAPI's API, and saving the result locally. Utilizes HTTP Request nodes and file system operations with authentication via ConvertAPI query credentials.

Name: PDF Password Protect and Save Workflow
Description: An n8n automation workflow that downloads a PDF, applies password protection using ConvertAPI, saves it locally, and uploads to Google Drive. Utilizes ConvertAPI for PDF processing and Google Drive API for cloud storage.

Name: Webpage to PDF Converter
Description: Convert any webpage URL into a downloadable PDF file using ConvertAPI via HTTP request, with automated file saving on disk, triggered manually in n8n workflow.

Name: HTML to PDF Conversion with ConvertAPI
Description: Automates conversion of a simple HTML document to PDF using ConvertAPI via HTTP request, with file handling in n8n. Demonstrates use of manual trigger, code node for binary conversion, and authenticated API request to create a PDF file.

Name: PDF to PDF/A Conversion Workflow
Description: Automates downloading a PDF file, converting it to the PDF/A standard using ConvertAPI, and saving the result locally. Utilizes n8n, HTTP Request nodes, and ConvertAPI's authenticated REST API for file conversion.

Name: Systeme.io Contacts & Tags Management
Description: Automate retrieval and management of contacts and tags using Systeme.io API in n8n. Includes pagination and rate limiting handling for full data sync, plus batch adding contacts with custom fields via HTTP requests.

Name: Zigbee2MQTT Weekly Backup to SFTP
Description: Automates weekly Zigbee2MQTT backups by triggering an MQTT request every Monday at 2:45 AM, receiving the base64 backup response, converting it to a ZIP file, and uploading it securely to an SFTP server. Utilizes MQTT, SFTP, JSON parsing, and n8n scheduling.

Name: TOTP 2FA Code Validation Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow to validate 6-digit TOTP codes using Python in a function node without creating credentials. It runs a time-based one-time password algorithm for 2FA verification, suitable for secure authentication systems.

Name: Todoist Task Prioritization with OpenAI
Description: Automates task prioritization in Todoist using a scheduled n8n workflow. It fetches inbox tasks, categorizes them to projects via OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and updates their priority accordingly. Utilizes Todoist API, OpenAI API, and n8n automation platform.

Name: Xero Webhook Verification & FileMaker Sync
Description: Automatically verifies Xero webhook payloads using HMAC SHA256 and syncs data to FileMaker. Utilizes n8n's webhook, crypto, and FileMaker nodes to securely validate and store webhook events with custom script execution.

Name: Access Token Management with Static Data
Description: An n8n workflow to manage expiring API access tokens using static data storage. Uses Webhook and Schedule Trigger nodes, HTTP Request to fetch new tokens, JavaScript code nodes to store tokens and timestamps globally, and conditional logic to validate token expiry before reuse.

Name: Book Info Scraper to Google Sheets
Description: This n8n workflow scrapes book data from a website using HTTP request with Jina AI, extracts details via OpenAI-powered Langchain, and saves structured info (title, price, availability, image, link) into Google Sheets. Tech stack: n8n, Jina AI, OpenAI, Google Sheets API.

Name: Daily Calvin & Hobbes Comic with AI Translation
Description: Automates daily retrieval of Calvin & Hobbes comics using HTTP requests to GoComics, extracts comic images with LangChain, translates dialogues to Korean & English via OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and posts results on Discord via webhook. Uses n8n scheduler for daily automation.

Name: BlueSky Auto Post from RSS Feed
Description: Automates posting new RSS feed items to BlueSky social. Uses BlueSky API (session creation, image upload, post creation) and n8n workflow nodes to download images, upload blobs, and create posts with text, images, and metadata. Ideal for content syndication.

Name: ConvertKit Subscriber & Tag Automation
Description: Automates adding subscribers to ConvertKit forms, creating tags, and associating subscribers with tags using ConvertKit API in n8n. Enables streamlined email marketing list management by linking subscribers and tags automatically.

Name: n8n Cleanup Old Workflow Executions
Description: This n8n workflow uses n8n API and scheduling to automatically list and delete workflow executions older than 10 days. It includes manual and scheduled triggers, conditional date checking, and execution deletion to keep the n8n instance clean and performant.

Name: Sentry Release Management Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that automates creating a new release and retrieving all releases in Sentry.io using its API. Triggered manually, it integrates with the Sentry API to manage software release versions and track project releases efficiently.

Name: Perplexity AI Q&A with n8n
Description: Automates sending system and user prompts to Perplexity AI's Sonar model via HTTP API in n8n, processing answers and citations. Uses n8n workflows with HTTP Request node and Generic Header Authentication to query AI-driven chat completions for knowledge comparison.

Name: Keyword IT Service Identifier
Description: An n8n workflow that reads keywords from a Google Sheet, uses OpenAI GPT-4 via Langchain to identify if keywords include known IT software or services, then updates the sheet with 'yes' or 'no' results. It features batch processing and rate-limiting wait nodes for API stability.

Name: RSS to Mastodon Auto Poster
Description: Automates posting new RSS feed items to a Mastodon instance using n8n. Utilizes RSS Feed Read, Cron scheduling, Function node for deduplication, and HTTP Request node to post updates via Mastodon API every 10 minutes.

Name: SIGNL4 Alert Automation
Description: This n8n workflow triggers hourly to read alert data from a JSON file, sends or resolves alerts via the SIGNL4 API, and updates the stored alert status. It uses n8n nodes like Cron, file read/write, JSON-binary conversion, and SIGNL4 integration to automate alert management.

Name: Syncro Tickets to Clockify Timer
Description: Automates time tracking by creating Clockify entries from Syncro ticket data via a webhook. Uses n8n workflow with Syncro webhook POST input and Clockify API to log work sessions efficiently.

Name: MailerLite Subscriber to Airtable Logger
Description: Automates capturing new MailerLite subscriber additions to a group and stores their name and email in Airtable. Uses MailerLite webhook trigger and Airtable API via n8n to keep subscriber data synced in real-time for easy CRM or marketing use.

Name: n8n Invite Users from Google Sheets
Description: Automates inviting users to an n8n instance by syncing email addresses from a Google Sheet with existing n8n users. Uses Google Sheets API, n8n API, and supports pagination and scheduled or manual triggers for updates.

Name: PDF Downloader and Merger Workflow
Description: n8n workflow automates downloading multiple PDF files from URLs, merges them into a single PDF using a custom PDF Toolkit node, and writes the merged file to disk. Uses HTTP Request, Split Out, and file system nodes with custom-js PDF merge API.

Name: Customer.io: Create Customer & Add to Segment
Description: An n8n workflow using Customer.io API to create a new customer with custom properties and add them to a specific segment. Utilizes manual trigger and Customer.io nodes for customer management and segmentation automation.

Name: Sensor Alert System with PostgreSQL and Twilio
Description: Automates monitoring of sensor data in PostgreSQL, sending SMS alerts via Twilio for readings above a threshold. Uses n8n Cron to schedule, queries the DB, sends notifications, and updates alert status to avoid duplicates.

Name: Gumroad Sale Notification Trigger
Description: This n8n workflow listens to Gumroad sales using the Gumroad API webhook trigger to notify users in real-time when a sale is made. It enables automated updates for sales events, ideal for creators and sellers using Gumroad.

Name: PagerDuty Incident Acknowledge Notifier
Description: An n8n workflow that listens for POST webhook calls, acknowledges PagerDuty incidents via their API, and posts confirmation messages to Mattermost channels. Utilizes PagerDuty and Mattermost APIs for incident management and team notifications.

Name: HTML to Compressed PDF Workflow
Description: n8n workflow automates converting HTML content to PDF and compresses PDFs. Utilizes CustomJS PDF Toolkit nodes for HTML-to-PDF conversion and PDF compression, plus manual trigger and code nodes. Useful for content generation, document processing automation.

Name: HTML to PDF and PDF to PNG Converter
Description: An n8n workflow using CustomJS PDF Toolkit to convert HTML content to PDF and transform PDFs (from generated output or URL) into PNG images. It automates document format conversions with HTML input, manual trigger, and URL-based PDF input.

Name: n8n Auto-Start Workflows by Tag
Description: Automates activation of n8n workflows tagged with 'Auto start' via n8n API integration. Runs post-start to ensure tagged workflows are activated automatically, ideal for auto deployment pipelines and containerized n8n setups.

Name: Export PostgreSQL Table Data to CSV
Description: An n8n workflow using PostgreSQL and Spreadsheet nodes to export data from a specified database table (e.g., booksRead) into a CSV file format with manual trigger execution.

Name: Orlen Invoice Auto Archiver
Description: Automates extraction of Orlen invoice emails, saves attachments to date-organized Google Drive folders, marks emails as read, and sends Slack notifications. Uses Gmail API, Google Drive API, Slack API, and cron scheduling in n8n.

Name: Webflow Form Submission Trigger
Description: Automates receiving updates from Webflow form submissions using Webflow Trigger node with OAuth2 authentication in n8n workflow. Ideal for alerting or processing form data instantly from your Webflow site.

Name: DigitalOcean Droplet Creation via API
Description: An n8n workflow that automates creating a DigitalOcean droplet using HTTP Request node. It sends a POST request to DigitalOcean API with droplet details (name, region, size, image) and requires a personal access token for authorization.

Name: Wit.ai Speech-to-Text from WAV File
Description: An n8n workflow that reads a WAV audio file and sends it to the Wit.ai speech recognition API for transcription. Utilizes the Read Binary File node and HTTP Request node with audio/wav content type to convert speech to text.

Name: Weekly Cocktail Recipe Poster
Description: Automates fetching random cocktail recipes from TheCocktailDB API, generates a custom image with Bannerbear API, and posts it weekly to Rocket.Chat. Uses n8n workflow automation with HTTP Request, Bannerbear, Cron, and Rocket.Chat nodes.

Name: Asana Event Update Notifier
Description: Workflow that triggers notifications on updates within Asana's Engineering workspace using n8n's Asana Trigger node. Ideal for automating task/event updates by leveraging the Asana API to monitor changes in real-time.

Name: Wallabag Auto-Starred RSS Importer
Description: Automates fetching starred articles from Tiny Tiny RSS and posts them to Wallabag. Uses TTRSS API for authentication & retrieving articles, Wallabag API for OAuth2 token and posting. Enables scheduled article archival every 10 minutes.

Name: Mailchimp Subscribe Event Listener
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers on Mailchimp subscribe events using Mailchimp API credentials. It listens to new subscribers from multiple sources (API, admin, user) for a specific list ID, enabling automated responses or actions on subscriber signup events.

Name: MQTT Message Receiver
Description: An n8n workflow using MQTT Trigger node to receive messages from an MQTT queue. It listens to MQTT broker messages and can be extended for IoT, messaging, or automation projects requiring MQTT integration.

Name: Hacker News Feed Fetcher
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches the latest stories from Hacker News using the native Hacker News node triggered manually. It provides a simple way to retrieve news data for automation or integration purposes.

Name: Invoice Ninja Data Fetcher
Description: Automates fetching all invoices from Invoice Ninja using its API triggered manually in n8n workflow. Useful for financial data retrieval and integration with other systems.

Name: Eventbrite Order Event Listener
Description: An n8n workflow to listen for Eventbrite order events (placed, updated, refunded) using Eventbrite API via webhook trigger. Ideal for automating responses to ticket sales and order changes in an Eventbrite organization.

Name: Typeform to Airtable Submission Logger
Description: Automates capturing form responses from Typeform via webhook and appends them to an Airtable base for organized storage. Utilizes Typeform API trigger and Airtable API node in n8n. Ideal for streamlined data collection and management workflows.

Name: Zoho CRM Data Fetch Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers manually to fetch all records from Zoho CRM using Zoho OAuth2 API. Useful for integrating and automating CRM data retrieval.

Name: Clockify Ticket Status Sync
Description: An n8n workflow that syncs ticket statuses with Clockify projects via webhook triggers. It uses the Clockify API to archive or unarchive projects based on ticket status updates, automating time tracking project management for support tickets.

Name: Fetch Completed Orders from Unleashed Software
Description: n8n workflow to manually trigger and fetch all completed orders from Unleashed Software API using the Unleashed Software node. Ideal for inventory or order management automation setups.

Name: Download and Upload File via FTP
Description: Automates downloading a file via HTTP request and uploads it to an FTP server, then lists files on the FTP. Uses n8n's HTTP Request and FTP nodes. Enables simple file transfer automation between web and FTP storage.

Name: Microsoft Teams Channel Setup & Messaging
Description: n8n workflow automates creating and updating a Microsoft Teams channel and sending a message using Microsoft Teams OAuth2 API. Triggered manually, it integrates Microsoft Teams operations to manage team channels and post messages efficiently.

Name: Weather Alert SMS Notification
Description: Automates sending SMS alerts via Twilio based on current Berlin weather from OpenWeatherMap. Uses n8n with Cron trigger, weather API, conditional logic, and Twilio messaging to notify if 'feels_like' temperature is under 18°C.

Name: Taiga Project Event Update Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers notifications upon events in a specific Taiga project using the TaigaCloud API. Ideal for automating project update alerts and integrations within team workflows.

Name: Session Feedback Reminder via Mattermost
Description: Automates scheduled feedback requests by fetching session details from Google Sheets and posting a customized message with a feedback link to a Mattermost channel using n8n automation.

Name: Clockify Project, Tag & Time Entry Automation
Description: Automates workflow in Clockify by creating a project, adding a tag, creating a time entry with details, and updating it with the project ID. Utilizes Clockify API through n8n nodes for seamless time tracking and project management automation.

Name: BTC Price Alert via SMS
Description: Automates BTC price monitoring in EUR using CoinGecko API every minute; sends an SMS alert via Twilio if the price is >= 9000 EUR. Uses cron scheduling, conditional logic (IF node), and Twilio API for messaging.

Name: Web Page Scraper with FireCrawl API
Description: An n8n workflow that takes a URL input and uses the FireCrawl API to scrape the webpage content in markdown format. It automates fetching web page data via HTTP requests and processes it for reuse in AI agents or other applications.

Name: Sitemap Reader and URL Filter
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches a sitemap.xml via HTTP, converts its XML to JSON, splits URLs, and filters them by criteria (e.g., PDFs). Main tools used: HTTP Request, XML node, Split Out, and Filter nodes. Useful for automated URL extraction and filtering.

Name: Disk Usage Alert via Twilio SMS
Description: This n8n workflow monitors hard disk usage on the host machine twice daily using a shell command, and sends an SMS alert via Twilio if usage exceeds 80%. It automates system resource monitoring and alerting with Cron, Execute Command, IF, and Twilio nodes.

Name: Zoom Meeting Creation Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that automates creating a Zoom meeting using the Zoom API. Triggered manually, it leverages the Zoom node with OAuth2 authentication to set up meetings instantly within automation pipelines.

Name: Create Jira Issue on Manual Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that creates a new issue in Jira Software Cloud when manually triggered. It uses the n8n Jira node connected to Jira Software Cloud API, enabling quick issue creation with specified project, summary, and issue type.

Name: ISS Real-Time Position Tracker
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches the current International Space Station (ISS) position using the whereistheiss.at API every minute, filters out duplicate timestamps, and outputs new coordinates with timestamps for monitoring ISS position changes in real time.

Name: Workflow Error Notification via Mailgun
Description: An n8n workflow that captures runtime errors using an Error Trigger and sends detailed error reports via Mailgun email API, including error message and stack trace, to specified recipients for quick debugging.

Name: ISS Position Logger to TimescaleDB
Description: Automates fetching the International Space Station's live latitude, longitude, and timestamp every minute using the 'wheretheiss.at' API, then stores the data into a TimescaleDB database for time-series analysis.

Name: Reddit Post and Comment Automation
Description: Automates creating a Reddit post, fetching it, and adding a comment using n8n's Reddit node with OAuth2 credentials. Ideal for Reddit content automation workflows using n8n's automation platform and Reddit API.

Name: Tapfiliate Affiliate Management Workflow
Description: Automates affiliate creation and tagging in Tapfiliate using n8n. Includes manual trigger, affiliate creation, metadata tagging, and program assignment via Tapfiliate API integration, streamlining affiliate program management.

Name: Typeform to Demio Webinar Registration
Description: Automates webinar sign-ups by triggering on Typeform submissions and registering users to Demio events using their APIs. Streamlines lead capture from surveys or signup forms directly into webinar platform.

Name: Raindrop Bookmark CRUD Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow automating bookmark create, update, and retrieve operations using Raindrop API with OAuth2 authentication. It manages bookmark collections and individual bookmarks like creating a collection, adding docs link, updating title, and fetching bookmark details.

Name: Strava Activity Auto-Tweet
Description: Automates tweeting new Strava activities using Strava API trigger and Twitter API. When a new activity is created on Strava, it tweets the activity name and distance automatically using OAuth2 and OAuth1 authentication.

Name: GoToWebinar Webinar Automation Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow automating webinar management in GoToWebinar API: creates a webinar, updates its description, and fetches webinar details using OAuth2 credentials. Ideal for automating webinar setups and updates seamlessly.

Name: Weather Alert Notification via SIGNL4
Description: Automates weather monitoring for Berlin using OpenWeatherMap API, triggers a SIGNL4 alert if the temperature drops below 25°C. Utilizes n8n's schedule and conditional nodes for timely notifications.

Name: Webhook to PostHog Event Tracker
Description: An n8n workflow that receives events via a webhook and sends them to PostHog analytics using the PostHog API. Useful for real-time event tracking with no-code automation.

Name: Lemlist to Mattermost Reply Notifier
Description: Automates notifications in Mattermost when a recipient replies to a Lemlist email campaign. Utilizes Lemlist API webhook triggers and Mattermost API to post personalized reply messages to a specified channel, streamlining sales and outreach follow-up.

Name: Asana Task Creation via Webhook
Description: An n8n workflow that creates Asana tasks triggered by HTTP requests via webhook using Asana's OAuth2 API. It automates task creation and returns a confirmation URL. Useful for integrating external systems with Asana task management.

Name: Create Task in Asana
Description: Automates creation of tasks in Asana using n8n workflow with manual trigger and Asana API integration. Ideal for streamlined task management within teams.

Name: Autopilot to Airtable Contact Sync
