Description: An n8n workflow that triggers on new Autopilot contacts, extracts their first name, last name, and email, and appends them to an Airtable base. Utilizes Autopilot API for contact events and Airtable API to store contact data for easy CRM management.

Name: Random Cocktail Recipe Translator
Description: n8n workflow fetches a random cocktail recipe via TheCocktailDB API and translates the instructions to French using the DeepL API, automating cocktail content localization.

Name: Microsoft SQL Query Executor
Description: n8n workflow to manually trigger and execute SQL queries on Microsoft SQL Server using n8n's built-in Microsoft SQL node. Enables easy database querying via automated workflows with manual control, ideal for database admins and developers.

Name: 3D Figurine Views Generator with AI APIs
Description: Automates creation of 3D figurine orthographic views using Midjourney for initial 3D-style image generation and GPT-4o-Image API to produce front, side, and back views on a turnaround sheet. Built with n8n workflow automation handling HTTP requests and image URL parsing.

Name: Matrix Virtual Coffee Group Organizer
Description: Automates weekly virtual coffee meetups by grouping Matrix chat room members into randomized small groups. Utilizes Matrix API, cron scheduling, and custom JavaScript to fetch members, shuffle, and announce groups in the room every Monday at 10 AM.

Name: Paul Graham Essays Milvus AI Agent
Description: n8n workflow scrapes Paul Graham essays, extracts and processes text, loads to Milvus vector database, and enables AI chat with OpenAI GPT-4o mini model. Tech stack: HTTP requests, HTML parsing, LangChain tools, Milvus vector store, and OpenAI embeddings and chat APIs.

Name: Line Messaging API Auto Reply & Push
Description: n8n workflow leveraging Line Messaging API to automatically reply to incoming Line messages using reply tokens and send push messages with user-specific Line UID. Integrates webhook listener, conditional checks, and HTTP requests for interactive chat automation.

Name: Book Data Scraper to Google Sheets
Description: An n8n workflow that scrapes book details from a website using HTTP request to Jina.ai endpoint, extracts structured info with OpenAI-powered Langchain nodes, and appends data (title, price, availability, image, link) into Google Sheets. Automates product price tracking.

Name: LangChain Workflow Retriever with OpenAI QA
Description: An n8n workflow integrating LangChain and OpenAI API to retrieve and query data from another n8n workflow by ID. It uses LangChain's Workflow Retriever and Retrieval QA Chain with an OpenAI Chat model to answer questions based on workflow data.

Name: Typeform Feedback Sentiment Alert
Description: Automates sentiment analysis on Typeform event feedback using AWS Comprehend and sends negative feedback alerts to Mattermost. Integrates Typeform API, AWS Comprehend for sentiment detection, and Mattermost API for messaging.

Name: n8n Workflow Auto On/Off Scheduler
Description: Automates activation and deactivation of an n8n workflow daily at 08:00 and 20:00 using n8n API node and cron-based schedule triggers. Ideal for controlling workflow operation hours in DevOps setups with custom API credentials.

Name: Chat with Local LLMs via n8n & Ollama
Description: Interact with self-hosted Large Language Models (LLMs) using n8n workflow and Ollama API. This system captures user chat input, sends it to a local Ollama-powered LLM, and returns AI responses seamlessly within n8n, enabling private, customizable AI chats.

Name: Webpage to Markdown & Link Extractor
Description: n8n workflow that uses Firecrawl.dev API to convert webpage HTML into markdown and extract all links. Supports batch processing with rate limiting and integrates with custom data sources for input/output. Ideal for content extraction and AI preprocessing.

Name: Docker WHMCS/WISECP API Backend
Description: An n8n workflow providing an API backend for managing Docker containers via WHMCS/WISECP integrations. Uses SSH to run bash scripts on Docker servers, managing container lifecycle, disk mounts, NGINX config, and user/password operations for containerized n8n instances.

Name: DigitalOcean File Upload via Form
Description: An n8n workflow that accepts file uploads through a web form and uploads them to a DigitalOcean Spaces bucket using the S3 API with public read access. It then returns the public URL of the uploaded file. Uses n8n form trigger, S3 node, and form completion steps.

Name: PDF Merge Automation with ConvertAPI
Description: This n8n workflow automates downloading two remote PDF files, merging them into one using ConvertAPI's PDF merge endpoint, and saving the result locally. It integrates HTTP Request nodes for file download and the ConvertAPI for file merging, requiring API key authentication.

Name: HTML Page Generator with OpenAI Structured Output
Description: An n8n workflow that uses OpenAI GPT-4o to generate structured JSON UI components styled with Tailwind CSS from user queries, converts JSON to formatted HTML, and serves dynamic web pages via webhook.

Name: SQL Dataset Comparison Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow to compare two SQL datasets using MySQL queries and the Compare Datasets node. It fetches aggregated payment data for customers from overlapping years and identifies differences based on customerNumber and year fields.

Name: Google OAuth2 Credentials Auto-Creator
Description: Automates creation of OAuth2 credentials for multiple Google services (Docs, Sheets, Slides, Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Contacts) in n8n using Google JSON client info and user email. Simplifies tedious manual setup with n8n API integration.

Name: Daily ProductHunt AI Launch Monitor
Description: This n8n workflow monitors daily ProductHunt launches related to specified products like AI Agents using Airtop API for web extraction, and sends the curated list via Slack. Automates product discovery using ProductHunt, Airtop API, and Slack integration.

Name: Airtable Query & AI Response in Obsidian
Description: This n8n workflow links Airtable data with Obsidian notes using OpenAI GPT-4 through an AI Agent. It automates querying Airtable and sends AI-processed answers back into Obsidian via webhook, enhancing note-taking with dynamic database insights.

Name: GetBible Scripture Retrieval
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches Bible verses from the GetBible API v2 using JSON input with references, translation, and version. It processes scripture references, queries the API, and returns standardized scripture texts for dynamic integration in faith-based apps or projects.

Name: Text-to-Speech Voice Call Automation
Description: Automates text-to-speech phone calls using the ClickSend API triggered by form submissions. Users input text, recipient number, voice, and language. Built with n8n using HTTP Request and formTrigger nodes for easy voice message delivery and notifications.

Name: Personal Data Extractor with Self-Hosted LLM
Description: An n8n workflow that extracts structured personal data from chat messages using a self-hosted Mistral NeMo LLM via Ollama API. It includes auto-fixing output parser and JSON schema validation to ensure precise extraction of user info like name, contact, and communication details.

Name: Amazon Keyword Suggestion & Storage Workflow
Description: This n8n workflow automates fetching Amazon keyword suggestions via Amazon's Completion API, cleans and aggregates keywords, and stores them in Airtable. Utilizes n8n HTTP Request, Airtable integration, and JavaScript code node for keyword processing.

Name: PDF Text Extraction & HTML to PDF
Description: An n8n workflow using CustomJS PDF Toolkit nodes to convert HTML to PDF and extract text from PDFs via URL or direct input. It automates PDF content extraction and generation steps with manual trigger initiation, suitable for document processing tasks.

Name: TechCrunch Latest Articles Scraper
Description: n8n workflow scraping the latest 20 articles from TechCrunch using HTTP Request and HTML parsing nodes. Extracts post metadata, detailed content, images, and timestamps for use in content aggregation or analysis.

Name: Monday.com Subitem & Linked Items Fetcher
Description: An n8n workflow that integrates with Monday.com API to retrieve an item's details, its subitems, and linked pulses by parsing specific columns. Uses JavaScript code nodes, splitOut, and API calls to fetch and merge detailed relational data from Monday.com boards.

Name: PDF Merge Automation
Description: Automates downloading two PDF files via HTTP requests, merges them using a custom JS PDF toolkit in n8n, and writes the merged PDF to disk. Utilizes n8n's HTTP Request, custom JS node, and file system nodes for seamless PDF processing.

Name: Namesilo Bulk Domain Availability Checker
Description: Automates checking domain name availability in bulk using Namesilo API. Supports batches up to 200 domains with rate-limit handling. Outputs results as Excel file. Built with n8n workflow using HTTP Request, JavaScript code, Wait, and Convert to Excel nodes.

Name: Automated Posting to X via Airtop & n8n
Description: Automatically post text content on x.com using Airtop API and n8n workflow automation. It creates a browser session, opens X, types a post, and publishes it. Triggered via form submission or another workflow for seamless marketing updates.

Name: API Uptime Monitor with SMS Alert
Description: Automates API uptime checks using scheduled HTTP requests and Twilio SMS alerts when the API status code is not 200. Built with n8n automation, leveraging HTTP Request and Twilio nodes for timely service downtime notifications.

Name: AI Financial Chart Analyzer Backend
Description: An n8n workflow backend for a Chrome extension that uses OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini model to analyze stock or cryptocurrency chart images sent via webhook. It provides simple, novice-friendly technical market analysis with disclaimers. Tech stack: n8n, OpenAI API, webhook integration.

Name: Conditional Retry Workflow with Known Error Handling
Description: An n8n workflow for retrying failed API calls up to 3 times, except for specific known errors (e.g., 'could not be found'). Uses wait and counter logic with Manual Trigger, If and Set nodes to manage retries and error handling, ensuring robust error flow control.

Name: Perplexity AI Q&A with n8n
Description: This n8n workflow automates querying Perplexity AI's chat completions API using HTTP requests, setting system and user prompts, and cleaning responses. It uses generic HTTP header authentication and enables retrieval of AI-driven answers filtered by search domains, ideal for dynamic Q&A automation.

Name: Multi-file Zip Compressor
Description: An n8n workflow that compresses multiple input files (images, PDFs, CSV/XLSX) into a single ZIP archive. Uses n8n's Execute Workflow Trigger, JavaScript code node for binary handling, and Compression node to produce a dated zip file as output.

Name: n8n Keyword-Based Community Topic Tracker
Description: Automates tracking of new topics matching a keyword on the n8n community forum using n8n workflows. Integrates HTTP API requests to n8n community search, Google Sheets for data storage, and optional Slack and email notifications. Ideal for monitoring community discussions.

Name: Git Commit and Push Automation
Description: Automates adding files, committing with a message, and pushing changes to a Git repository using n8n's Git nodes, triggered manually to streamline version control operations.

Name: n8n Workflow Export to Google Drive
Description: An n8n workflow that retrieves all workflows from an n8n instance via HTTP API with Basic Auth, processes the data, and uploads each workflow as individual JSON files to Google Drive. Uses n8n core nodes including HTTP Request, Cron, Function, Merge, and Google Drive integration for automated daily export.

Name: Gmail Bulk Delete Automation
Description: An n8n workflow that connects to Gmail via OAuth2, retrieves all emails excluding chats and unsubscribe content, and deletes them in batches of 100. Automates inbox cleanup using Gmail API within n8n automation platform.

Name: Daily Weather Updates via Gotify
Description: Automates sending daily weather updates for Berlin at 9 AM using n8n. Utilizes OpenWeatherMap API to fetch current temperature and Gotify API to deliver messages. Ideal for users wanting automated, timely weather notifications.

Name: Strapi Entry CRUD Automation
Description: Automates creating, updating, and retrieving blog posts in Strapi CMS using n8n. Utilizes n8n's Strapi nodes with manual trigger, Set nodes for data, and sequential API operations to streamline content management workflows.

Name: Plex Qbittorrent Throttle Automator
Description: Automates bandwidth throttling of qBittorrent based on Plex media playback events using n8n workflow. Integrates Plex webhook triggers, qBittorrent API authentication, and speed limit toggling to optimize network usage during media consumption.

Name: Random Cocktail Suggestion to Mattermost
Description: This n8n workflow triggers via a POST webhook, fetches a random cocktail recipe from TheCocktailDB API, and sends a formatted message with recipe details and image to a Mattermost channel. Integrates webhook, HTTP Request, and Mattermost API for cocktail recommendations.

Name: SWIFT Code Scraper & MongoDB Importer
Description: An n8n workflow automating extraction of banking SWIFT codes by country from theswiftcodes.com. Uses HTTP Request & HTML Extract nodes for scraping, uProc API for country normalization, and MongoDB for storing parsed data. Efficiently handles pagination and batch processing.

Name: Quick Base Record CRUD Automation
Description: Automates creating, updating, and retrieving records in Quick Base using n8n workflows. Utilizes Quick Base API and n8n built-in nodes like Set and Manual Trigger to manage database records efficiently.

Name: DigitalOcean Droplet Snapshot Manager
Description: An n8n workflow that automates DigitalOcean Droplet snapshot management using the DigitalOcean API. It runs every 48 hours, lists droplets, deletes oldest snapshots if over 4, and creates new snapshots to maintain up-to-date backups.

Name: Scheduled SharePoint List Fetcher
Description: An n8n workflow that periodically retrieves SharePoint list items using OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow. It integrates Microsoft Azure AD for token generation and SharePoint REST API for data fetching, automating secure SharePoint data access.

Name: Auto Website Screenshot from Google Sheets
Description: This n8n workflow triggers on new rows added in a Google Sheets document containing URLs. It captures website screenshots using a custom PDF Toolkit node and stores the images in a specified Google Drive folder. Useful for automated visual content archiving.

Name: Postgres Sensor Data Ingestion
Description: Automates ingestion of simulated sensor data into a PostgreSQL database every minute using n8n. Utilizes Cron for scheduling, a Function node to generate random humidity sensor readings with timestamps, and PostgreSQL node to insert data. Ideal for IoT data pipelines.

Name: BetterStack Log Sender Workflow
Description: n8n workflow to send log messages from other workflows to BetterStack Logs via HTTP POST with header authentication. Supports manual testing and embedding. Utilizes n8n executeWorkflow nodes and HTTP Request node for log forwarding.

Name: Mautic CRM User Sync & Tagging
Description: Automates user management in Mautic CRM via webhook-triggered workflow. Processes student data, finds or creates contacts, updates details, handles subscription tags, and manages marketing email opt-in status using Mautic OAuth2 API integration.

Name: Philips Hue Light On & Brightness Set
Description: Automation workflow using n8n to turn on a Philips Hue light and set its brightness via Philips Hue API. Triggered manually, it sets brightness level to 90 for light ID 123. Useful for smart home lighting control with Philips Hue OAuth2 integration.

Name: CSV to Google Sheets COVID Data Importer
Description: Automates downloading COVID-19 testing CSV data from ECDC, filters for DACH region in 2023, adds unique keys, and uploads to a specified Google Sheets document via Google Sheets API using n8n workflow nodes.

Name: Luma AI Webhook to Airtable Video Logger
Description: An n8n workflow that captures POST requests from Luma AI's video generation webhook, extracts video and thumbnail URLs, and automatically updates Airtable records with this data. Integrates Luma AI webhook, Airtable API, and conditional data validation.

Name: PDFMonkey Callback PDF Downloader
Description: n8n workflow automates PDFMonkey webhook callbacks by receiving PDF generation status, verifying success, and downloading the generated PDF via HTTP request. Integrates PDFMonkey API and n8n webhook for seamless PDF retrieval upon generation completion.

Name: Paul Graham Essays Scraper & Summarizer
Description: Automates scraping of Paul Graham's latest essays from his website using HTTP and HTML nodes, then summarizes the top 3 essays with GPT-4 via OpenAI API and LangChain nodes in n8n workflow.

Name: Daily Gratitude Reminder via LINE
Description: An automated daily reminder system that sends personalized gratitude prompts at 9 PM via LINE. Utilizes Azure OpenAI for varied message generation and reformats output for LINE Push API. Helps build positive habits using n8n workflow and AI.

Name: Daily Calvin & Hobbes Comic Auto Poster
Description: Automates fetching daily Calvin and Hobbes comic images via HTTP request, extracts the image URL using LangChain info extractor, translates dialogues to English and Korean with OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and posts the results to Discord daily using a webhook. Uses n8n, OpenAI API, and Discord webhook.

Name: Squarespace Blog to Google Sheets Sync
Description: Automates fetching blog and event collections from a Squarespace site via HTTP API with pagination, and appends or updates the data in Google Sheets using Google Sheets OAuth2. Scheduled or manual trigger allows easy syncing of blog content to spreadsheets.

Name: Automated Video Captioning with json2video API
Description: This n8n workflow automates adding captions to videos using the json2video API. It accepts video URL and dimensions, sends a video captioning request, polls for completion, and outputs the captioned video link and details. Uses HTTP Request, Wait, and If nodes for automation.

Name: n8n Workflow: Export Executions to CSV
Description: An n8n workflow that retrieves all workflow executions via the n8n API, converts the data into a CSV file for easy parsing, and prepares it for export to a cloud storage or other destination. Utilizes n8n manual trigger, n8n API node, and file conversion tools.

Name: YogiAI Daily Yoga Pose Reminder
Description: Automates daily yoga pose reminders via Line using Azure OpenAI and Google Sheets. Fetches weighted random poses from Sheets, formats messages with AI, creates Line Flex messages with images, and sends scheduled notifications. Tech: n8n, Azure OpenAI, Google Sheets, Line Messaging API.

Name: Google Sheets & MySQL Event Inquiry Sync
Description: An n8n workflow automating sync between Google Sheets (Google Sheets API) and MySQL database for event inquiries. It compares datasets, upserts new records, updates statuses, and schedules regular 30-min interval checks on weekdays. Ideal for managing event form data efficiently.

Name: ProspectLens Company Research Automation
Description: Automates company data enrichment by integrating Google Sheets with ProspectLens API using n8n. Retrieves detailed company profiles and updates sheets with firmographic info, funding, traffic, and location, streamlining business research workflows.

Name: CSV to Excel Converter from URL
Description: Automates downloading a CSV file from a public URL, imports it using n8n's HTTP Request and Spreadsheet nodes, and converts it to an Excel (.xlsx) file. Utilizes n8n native nodes with no external APIs, ideal for data processing automation.

Name: Google Sheets to Shopware 6 Manufacturer Import
Description: Automates importing multiple product manufacturers from Google Sheets into Shopware 6 using Shopware's API. Utilizes Google Sheets API, OAuth2 authentication, and custom JavaScript for multi-language translations and logo uploads for seamless e-commerce management.

Name: n8n Workflow Nodes Update Notifier
Description: Automates checking and updating outdated nodes in n8n workflows using n8n API and Gmail for summary emails. Identifies outdated nodes, prepends symbols, optionally adds updated nodes to canvas, and notifies via Gmail. Helps maintain workflow health.

Name: Zammad User Role Update via Excel
Description: Automates updating user roles in Zammad helpdesk by processing Excel data sourced via HTTP. Utilizes n8n workflow nodes including HTTP Request, Excel extraction, and data merging to sync user roles based on email matching. Requires Zammad API with Bearer token.

Name: WhatsApp Echo Bot via Meta API
Description: Automates WhatsApp messaging using Meta's WhatsApp API with n8n. Verifies webhook, listens for incoming messages, checks message presence, and echoes text back to the sender. Ideal for building interactive WhatsApp bots with webhook and API integration.

Name: Monday.com Full Item Data Fetcher
Description: n8n workflow to fetch comprehensive data for a specific Monday.com board item, including all columns, subitems, and board relations. Utilizes Monday.com API nodes, JavaScript code nodes for data processing, and merging/aggregation nodes for structured JSON output.

Name: Bitrix24 Task Widget with Webhook Integration
Description: Automates Bitrix24 task widget app installation and task data retrieval using webhooks, HTTP requests, and file handling within n8n. Integrates with Bitrix24 REST API to manage widget placement, installation responses, and display task details dynamically.

Name: Taiwan Agricultural Market Data to Google Sheets
Description: Automates fetching sheep quotation data from Taiwan's Ministry of Agriculture API (data.moa.gov.tw) for specified dates and markets, then appends parsed data into Google Sheets using Google Sheets API via OAuth2. Aids agricultural data tracking and analysis.

Name: Generate llms.txt from Screaming Frog CSV
Description: Automate creation of llms.txt files from Screaming Frog website crawl CSVs. Uses n8n nodes, optional OpenAI GPT-4o-mini text classifier, and file processing to filter, format, and generate AI-ready text files describing site content for LLM training or analysis.

Name: Ollama Chat Integration with Llama 3.2
Description: n8n workflow integrating Ollama API with Llama 3.2 model for chat message processing. Uses LangChain nodes including chat trigger, LLM chain, and structured response formatting to handle and respond to chat prompts as JSON objects.

Name: Reddit n8n Posts Classification & Summary
Description: Automates fetching recent n8n-related Reddit posts, filters by upvotes and date, classifies relevance with OpenAI, then summarizes content. Uses Reddit API and OpenAI API, aiming to monitor and categorize discussions about n8n.io efficiently.

Name: Automated n8n Workflow Backup to Dropbox
Description: This n8n workflow automates backing up current workflows by exporting them as JSON files to Dropbox, organizing backups into folders, and purging backups older than 30 days. It uses n8n API, Dropbox API, and date-time nodes for scheduling and maintenance.

Name: n8n Workflow Outdated Node Checker
Description: Checks n8n workflows for nodes with outdated versions by comparing each node's type and version to the latest available via the n8n API. Uses n8n's HTTP Request, Aggregate, If, and Code nodes with n8n API key authentication to identify nodes needing updates.

Name: Contabo VPS Snapshot Automation
Description: Automates daily backup snapshots for Contabo VPS instances using Contabo API, UUIDGenerator for unique request IDs, and n8n nodes. Handles authorization, instance listing, snapshot checking, deletion, and creation with scheduled and manual triggers.

Name: Webhook.site to Local n8n Relay
Description: Automates receiving public webhooks via webhook.site API and forwards them to a local n8n workflow. Utilizes schedule triggers, key-value storage (@horka.tv/n8n-nodes-storage-kv), HTTP requests, and custom JavaScript for filtering and processing. Ideal for testing and local webhook processing.

Name: Customer.io Unsubscribe Event Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that uses the Customer.io Trigger node to automatically capture and respond to customer unsubscribes in real time via Customer.io API, enabling automated actions upon unsubscribe events.

Name: Redis Locking Workflow for Webhook Concurrency
Description: An n8n workflow that uses Redis to implement distributed locking for webhook handling, preventing concurrent or duplicate executions. It parses Slack webhook payloads, checks and acquires Redis locks, conditionally executes workflows, and releases locks after completion.

Name: n8n Tag-to-Folder Workflow Organizer
Description: Automates organization of n8n workflows by converting tags into folders via n8n API. Uses n8n HTTP Request, Form Trigger, and Code nodes to login, fetch tags, create folders, and move workflows. Simplifies project management for personal owned projects.

Name: Automated RSS to Google Sheets Updater
Description: An n8n workflow that periodically reads RSS feed URLs from a Google Sheet, fetches and filters recent news (last 3 days), converts content from HTML to Markdown, updates and deletes entries in a Google Sheet to maintain fresh news data. Uses Google Sheets API, RSS feed reader, and custom JavaScript code.

Name: Paul Graham Essays Scraper & QA Chat
Description: Automates scraping of Paul Graham's essays from his website, processes texts using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and stores embeddings in Milvus vector DB. Enables QA chat with the indexed essays via LangChain nodes in n8n workflow.

Name: Linux Filesystem MCP Server
Description: An n8n workflow implementing a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Linux filesystem. It enables remote MCP clients to list, search, read, create directories and files securely on the host machine using n8n's MCP trigger and Execute Command tools. Ideal for file management automation.

Name: SQLite MCP Server for Database CRUD
Description: Self-hosted n8n workflow acting as an MCP server to securely manage SQLite DB via CRUD operations. Utilizes SQLite3 Node.js lib, MCP server trigger, and Code + custom workflow tools for read, insert, update. Ideal for business intelligence tasks.

Name: PayPal Payment Capture & Template Delivery
Description: An n8n workflow to handle PayPal NVP SOAP webhook for payment captures, fetch order details using PayPal API with OAuth2, filter specific product purchases, convert JSON template to file, and email the purchased workflow template to customers. Tech stack includes PayPal API, HTTP Requests, webhooks, and email node.

Name: Retell Voice Agent Booking Webhook
Description: An n8n workflow that connects Retell AI Voice Agents with custom logic via webhooks. It captures booking requests, processes data, and sends confirmation responses in real-time. Tech stack includes Retell AI, n8n webhook and respond nodes, with potential for API integrations and AI enhancements.

Name: Encrypted WhatsApp Flow Handler
Description: n8n workflow for secure WhatsApp interactions using hybrid RSA-AES decryption. It decrypts encrypted webhook payloads, parses user state ('screen'), applies conditional routing, extracts appointment or seat data, then encrypts and responds via API. Utilizes n8n nodes, Node.js Crypto, and webhook integration.

Name: Google News RSS Decoder to Clean Article Links
Description: An n8n workflow that reads Google News RSS feeds (customizable by language), decodes obfuscated Google News URLs via reverse-engineered POST requests, and outputs clean, direct article links. Uses RSS Feed, HTTP Request, HTML extraction, and JavaScript code nodes.

Name: Automated Bluesky Thread Creator
Description: An n8n workflow that authenticates to Bluesky via API and automates creation of threaded posts (initial post, replies, siblings) on schedule. Uses Bluesky's xrpc API with HTTP Request and JavaScript code nodes to build and post multi-level conversation threads daily at 9 AM.

Name: Automated Price Tracker and Notifier
Description: This n8n workflow automates monitoring product prices across multiple web pages using HTTP requests and CSS selectors for data extraction. It compares current prices with stored data and sends email alerts via SMTP for price drops or extraction issues.

Name: Docker InfluxDB WHMCS API Backend
Description: Automates Docker-based InfluxDB container management for WHMCS/WISECP. Uses n8n workflow with Webhook API (Basic Auth), SSH for Docker commands, Docker Compose, and nginx-proxy configs to deploy, start, stop, suspend, and monitor InfluxDB containers per client domain.

Name: Centroid Calculator for Vector Sets
Description: An n8n workflow that receives vector arrays via webhook, validates uniform dimensions, computes their centroid by averaging each component, and returns the result. Uses n8n's Webhook, Set, Code, and Respond nodes for API-driven vector centroid calculations.

Name: n8n Workflow AI Model Usage Tracker
Description: This n8n workflow fetches all n8n workflows via n8n API, filters nodes containing AI model references (modelId), and logs node and workflow details including AI model info into Google Sheets. It uses n8n API and Google Sheets API for centralized AI model usage tracking.

Name: Docker MinIO WHMCS API Deployment
Description: An n8n workflow to deploy and manage MinIO Docker containers for WHMCS/WISECP integration. Utilizes SSH for Docker commands, Basic Auth API webhook, dynamic Docker Compose and NGINX config generation, and supports lifecycle actions like deploy, start, stop, suspend, and ACLs.

Name: Zammad Data Export to Excel
Description: An n8n workflow that exports users, roles, groups, and organizations from Zammad via API calls authenticated by token. It transforms data into universal objects and converts them into Excel files (XLSX). Ideal for helpdesk admin reporting and data management.

Name: 3-View Orthographic to Dynamic Video Converter
Description: Automates conversion of three orthographic views into a rotating 3D-style video. Uses GPT-4o for front and side image generation and PiAPI's Kling model for dynamic video synthesis with rotation. Ideal for 3D visualization and animation workflows.

Name: Airtable Markdown to HTML Converter
Description: An n8n workflow using Airtable API and markdown node to convert video descriptions from markdown format stored in Airtable to HTML, then updating single or multiple Airtable records with the HTML content. Automates content formatting for Airtable video entries.

Name: Scaleway Servers Info Retrieval & Filter
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches and aggregates Scaleway instance and baremetal server details across multiple zones using Scaleway API. It supports dynamic filtering by tags, name, public IP, or zone and returns results via authenticated webhook. Built with HTTP Request, Code, Switch, and Webhook nodes.

Name: n8n Supabase AI Agent Manager
Description: Automates management of AI agent interactions using n8n with Supabase as a vector store and data backend, integrating OpenAI embeddings for knowledge retrieval and Langchain MCP triggers for agent workflows.

Name: Generate & Save CSV User Lists with GPT-4
Description: An n8n workflow that uses GPT-4 (OpenAI API) to generate mock user data in JSON, parses it, converts to CSV in batches, fixes UTF BOM issues, and saves files locally. Ideal for creating randomized CSV datasets quickly.

Name: LINE BOT Receipt OCR to Google Sheets
Description: Automates receipt image processing from LINE chat by extracting text via OCR Space API, then parsing transaction info. Uses LINE Messaging API, Google Drive for storage, and Google Sheets for recording data, enabling efficient financial record keeping.

Name: Immich Docker Deployment API Backend
Description: n8n workflow deploying and managing Immich Docker containers via API webhook. Integrates SSH for remote Docker commands. Supports container lifecycle, disk mounting, ACL management, NGINX config, and admin user operations. Designed for WHMCS/WISECP integration by PUQcloud.

Name: Dynamic Dropdown Form with Google Sheets Data
Description: Automates updating an n8n form's dropdown field dynamically using values fetched from a Google Sheets document. Utilizes n8n API, Google Sheets node, and formTrigger for real-time dropdown updates, enabling seamless form customization and data-driven options.

Name: News Web Scraper with AI Summarization
Description: Automates weekly scraping of news from Colt telecom site using HTML extraction and CSS selectors. Utilizes OpenAI GPT-4 API to generate concise summaries and technical keywords. Stores results in a NocoDB SQL database for easy management.

Name: Ollama LLM Chat Processor
Description: An n8n workflow that processes chat messages using Ollama's Llama 3.2 model via LangChain integration. It receives chat inputs, processes them through an LLM chain, and returns structured JSON responses. Requires Ollama API credentials and n8n.

Name: Bluesky Auto Welcome Message Sender
Description: Automate sending personalized welcome DMs to new followers on Bluesky social. Uses Bluesky API to track followers, store follower data in JSON files, detect new followers, and send predefined private messages with links at hourly intervals.

Name: n8n Workflow Magic Positioning AI
Description: Automates dynamic positioning of nodes in n8n workflows using AI. Integrates n8n core nodes, OpenAI APIs (Chat and Embeddings), LangChain AI Agents, and a custom IA2S positioning API. Enables effortless and smart workflow layout management.

Name: Strava Activity Logger to Google Sheets
Description: Automates fetching the latest cycling activities from Strava via API every 2 hours, filters out already logged rides, and appends new activity data (distance, time, elevation, date, link) to a Google Sheets spreadsheet using n8n workflow.

Name: n8n Async Workflow Coordination Example
Description: Demonstrates asynchronous workflow coordination in n8n using manual triggers, HTTP webhooks, wait nodes, and HTTP requests. Integrates with an external JokeAPI and simulates independent workflows communicating via resume URLs for joined execution flow handling.

Name: Ko-fi Payment Webhook Handler
Description: An n8n workflow that receives Ko-fi payment webhooks, validates verification tokens, and categorizes payments into Donations, Subscriptions or Shop Orders for further automation. Uses n8n webhook, if and switch nodes for processing Ko-fi webhook JSON data.

Name: Todoist Task Creator
Description: Automates creating new tasks in Todoist using n8n with manual trigger and Todoist API integration. Enables easy task management by adding tasks on demand through a simple workflow.

Name: Merge Interviewers and Employee Records
Description: An n8n workflow that merges interviewers' scheduling data with employee records by matching unique IDs. Uses built-in function and merge nodes to convert and combine JSON arrays, enabling synchronized personnel and interview data management in workflows.

Name: CRM Contact Data to Spreadsheet
Description: Automates loading mock HubSpot CRM contacts into a spreadsheet-like system. Uses n8n's manual trigger and function nodes to format data, ready for integration with Google Sheets, Airtable, or databases.

Name: Insert Row into Coda Table
Description: Automates inserting data into a new row of a Coda table using n8n. Utilizes the Coda API and n8n's Manual Trigger and Set nodes to define column values and push them into a specified Coda document and table.

Name: Google Slides Thumbnail Extractor
Description: An n8n workflow that uses Google Slides API via OAuth2 to retrieve all slides from a specific presentation and download their thumbnails automatically upon manual trigger. Ideal for quick slide image extraction and automation.

Name: Chargebee New Customer Creation
Description: Automates creating new customers in Chargebee using the Chargebee API and n8n workflow automation. Triggered manually, it captures customer details and creates a customer record in Chargebee for subscription billing management.

Name: Emelia Replies to Mattermost Alerts
Description: n8n workflow that triggers on Emelia campaign replies and sends customized notifications to Mattermost channels. Uses Emelia API for webhook triggers and Mattermost API to post messages, enabling real-time campaign response alerts.

Name: Workflow Update Notification via Mattermost
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers upon workflow updates and sends notifications to a Mattermost channel using Mattermost API. It includes a webhook that sets a message and a workflow trigger that detects updates, automating alert delivery for workflow changes.

Name: Publish Storyblok Stories Starting with 'release'
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches all Storyblok stories with names starting with 'release' using Storyblok Management API and publishes them automatically. Utilizes manual trigger and Storyblok nodes to automate content deployment in Storyblok CMS.

Name: Company Lookup by Name & Country
Description: Automates company data retrieval using n8n and Uproc API. Inputs company name and country, fetches detailed info via 'getCompanyByName' tool, checks if the company exists. Useful for CRM enrichment and business research.

Name: DNS Records Retrieval Workflow
Description: n8n workflow automating DNS record retrieval for a domain using uproc API and function node. Triggered manually, it creates a domain item, then queries DNS entries for automation and monitoring purposes.

Name: Phone Number Validation Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that verifies phone numbers using the Uproc API. It creates a phone item, parses and validates the number, and checks validity in an automated flow triggered manually. Useful for data quality and contact management.

Name: Pipedrive Change Updates Listener
Description: Automate receiving real-time updates for all changes in Pipedrive using the Pipedrive API and n8n's Pipedrive Trigger node. Ideal for syncing CRM updates or triggering workflows on any change inside Pipedrive accounts.

Name: Webhook to Netlify Site Creator
Description: Automates creation of Netlify sites via POST webhook. Uses n8n, Netlify API; receives JSON with site title and triggers site creation. Useful for integrating custom site deployment workflows or CMS systems.

Name: Create Contact in Drift via API
Description: An n8n workflow that creates a new contact in Drift CRM using Drift API. It is triggered manually and requires Drift API credentials. Ideal for automating lead management and contact creation in sales processes.

Name: Create Company in Salesmate CRM
Description: An n8n workflow to create a new company record in Salesmate CRM using manual trigger. Integrates with Salesmate API for CRM automation, ideal for sales and marketing teams to streamline company data entry.

Name: Automated Torrent Search & Download
Description: An n8n workflow automating torrent search using 'torrent-search-api' on KickassTorrents and Rarbg, integrates with Transmission RPC to start downloads, and uses Telegram bot for notifications. Enables POST webhook input with movie title to trigger torrent fetching and download.

Name: Toggl New Time Entries Trigger
Description: This n8n workflow uses the Toggl Trigger node to automatically fetch new time entries from the Toggl API in real-time. Ideal for integrating time tracking data into other systems or automations, it simplifies monitoring and processing of time logs.

Name: XML Fetch Edit & Dropbox Upload
Description: Fetches XML from httpbin.org, converts it to JSON for modification (changes title), converts back to XML, and uploads to Dropbox. Uses n8n nodes: HTTP Request, XML, Set, and Dropbox API integration for XML data processing and cloud storage.

Name: Baserow Blog Releases to RSS Feed
Description: Automates fetching and parsing Baserow blog release posts using HTTP requests and HTML extraction in n8n, then formats them into an RSS 2.0 feed served via webhook. Tech stack: n8n, HTTP Request, HTML Extract, JavaScript function nodes.

Name: Webhook HMAC SHA256 Token Validator
Description: An n8n workflow that receives webhook requests, uses a Crypto node to compute HMAC SHA256 of incoming crc_token values with a secret key, and sets the response token for validation. Uses n8n built-in Webhook, Crypto, and Set nodes for secure token verification.

Name: Cocktail Instructions Translator with LingvaNex
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches a random cocktail recipe from TheCocktailDB API and translates its instructions into Italian using the LingvaNex translation API. Automates multilingual cocktail instruction delivery via API integration and workflow automation.

Name: CSV to JSON Spreadsheet Converter
Description: n8n workflow that converts a CSV spreadsheet file to JSON format using native n8n nodes: manual trigger, read binary file, spreadsheet file parser, binary data mover, and write binary file. Automates file format transformation locally.

Name: n8n Merge Node Data Aggregation Demo
Description: Demo workflow showcasing n8n's Merge node with code-generated datasets to simulate SQL joins and unions in data aggregation. It uses n8n core nodes (Code, Merge) illustrating inner, left, and union joins with example data for ingredients and band members.

Name: ISS Position Updates via RabbitMQ
Description: Automates retrieval of the International Space Station's position every minute via the 'wheretheiss.at' API and publishes latitude, longitude, and timestamp updates to a RabbitMQ queue. Utilizes n8n Cron trigger, HTTP Request node, Set node, and RabbitMQ node for real-time messaging.

Name: Batch Download and Merge Files
Description: n8n workflow that downloads multiple files from predefined URLs using HTTP Request nodes, then merges them into one item with multiple binary objects for streamlined processing.

Name: AI-Powered Random Color Selector
Description: An n8n workflow using LangChain and OpenAI GPT-4o-mini to return a random color excluding specified ones. It integrates a code tool for color selection and AI agent for processing chat inputs via webhook, ideal for AI-driven color choice automation.

Name: Add Event to Google Calendar
Description: Automates adding an event to Google Calendar using n8n workflow with manual trigger and Google Calendar API integration. Ideal for scheduling tasks by specifying start/end times and calendar account.

Name: Excel to PostgreSQL Importer
Description: Automates importing Excel spreadsheet data into a PostgreSQL database using n8n. Reads a binary XLS file, parses it, then inserts rows into a PostgreSQL 'product' table with columns 'name' and 'ean'.

Name: USDT TRC20 Wallet Tracker
Description: An n8n workflow that tracks USDT TRC20 token transfers for a specified wallet using TronScan API. It fetches recent transactions, filters for incoming transfers within the last 15 minutes, formats and aggregates data. Built with n8n nodes, HTTP Request to TronScan API, and schedule trigger.

Name: Google Sheets Data Fetch via Webhook
Description: An n8n workflow that exposes a webhook to fetch data from a Google Sheets spreadsheet (range A:D on 'Problems' sheet) via Google Sheets API. It enables integration of external apps with spreadsheet data retrieval through HTTP requests.

Name: Zotero Collection Items Fetcher
Description: An n8n workflow to fetch and paginate items from a Zotero user's specified collection using Zotero API with HTTP header authentication. It includes looping for pagination, filtering, and optional field editing, automating retrieval of research references.

Name: Twitch Stream Online Status Checker
Description: Checks if a specified Twitch user is currently streaming live using Twitch's GraphQL API. Utilizes n8n nodes for GraphQL queries and conditional logic to determine online status based on stream data.

Name: ConvertKit Form Subscriber Alert
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers notifications when a new subscriber submits a specified ConvertKit form using ConvertKit API's webhook integration. Ideal for keeping track of list growth and automating subscriber management.

Name: Add Task to Google Tasks List
Description: An n8n workflow that adds a new task to a specified Google Tasks list using Google Tasks API with OAuth2. Triggered manually, it allows users to quickly create tasks in their Google account tasklist through seamless automation.

Name: Text-to-Speech Audio Generator
Description: An n8n workflow that converts text to speech using a Python script (voicegen.py) and plays the resulting audio file. It uses local Python execution for TTS and reads an MP3 output file for playback, automating voice generation from specified text inputs.

Name: Twilio SMS Sending Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that sends SMS messages using the Twilio API. It triggers manually and connects n8n's Manual Trigger node to the Twilio node, enabling easy SMS automation with Twilio credentials.

Name: ActiveCampaign Contact Upsert Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers manually to add or update a contact in ActiveCampaign via API, using the manual trigger node and ActiveCampaign node to manage contacts efficiently.

Name: HackerNoon Article Extractor
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches HackerNoon homepage HTML via HTTP Request, then extracts article titles and URLs using HTML Extract nodes. Useful for content aggregation or monitoring HackerNoon articles without coding.

Name: Send SMS via MSG91
Description: An n8n workflow that sends SMS using the MSG91 API. It uses a manual trigger node to start the flow and the MSG91 node to dispatch messages. Suitable for automating SMS notifications or alerts with MSG91's messaging platform.

Name: TravisCI Build Trigger Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow to manually trigger builds on TravisCI using the TravisCI API. It features a Manual Trigger node and TravisCI node, enabling easy integration with continuous integration pipelines for automated build execution.

Name: Invoice Ninja Invoice Creation Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers actions when a new invoice is created in Invoice Ninja using its API webhook integration. Designed to automate workflows based on invoice creation events in Invoice Ninja accounting software.

Name: Calendly Event Webhook Listener
Description: An n8n workflow using the Calendly API to trigger actions upon invitee creation or cancellation events. It listens to Calendly webhooks and enables automation based on scheduling changes, ideal for appointment management integrations.

Name: Xero Data Fetch on Manual Trigger
Description: This workflow uses n8n's Manual Trigger node to initiate and connects to the Xero API via OAuth2 to fetch all organization data. It automates retrieving accounting data from Xero on-demand using n8n integration.

Name: Paddle Coupon Creator
Description: An n8n workflow that creates discount coupons on Paddle using its API. Triggered manually, it automates coupon generation with customizable codes and discount amounts, ideal for e-commerce promotions.

Name: SurveyMonkey Response Listener
Description: Automates workflows triggered by new SurveyMonkey survey responses using SurveyMonkey Webhook and OAuth2 authentication. Ideal for instantly processing or forwarding fresh survey data via n8n automation platform.

Name: Monday.com Board Data Fetcher
Description: An n8n workflow that manually triggers a data retrieval from a specified Monday.com board using the Monday.com API credentials, aiming to fetch and use project management data easily within automation pipelines.

Name: SpaceX Launches Data Fetcher
Description: An n8n workflow that fetches the latest 5 SpaceX launches using the SpaceX GraphQL API. It retrieves mission details, launch dates, sites, rocket info, payload, and ship data, triggered manually via n8n's Manual Trigger node.

Name: Excel Data Fetch on Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that retrieves all data from a Microsoft Excel spreadsheet using Microsoft Excel OAuth2 API upon manual trigger. Ideal for automating data extraction from Excel files into connected systems.

Name: HelpScout Mailbox Fetcher
Description: n8n workflow uses HelpScout API via OAuth2 to retrieve all mailboxes on manual trigger, enabling streamlined support mailbox management and automation.

Name: Jira Event Listener Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow node that listens to all Jira events via Jira Software Cloud API webhook integration. It triggers automation whenever any event occurs in Jira, enabling real-time Jira activity monitoring and workflow automation using n8n.

Name: Send SMS via Mocean API
Description: This n8n workflow sends SMS messages using the Mocean API. It starts with a manual trigger and connects to the Mocean node to dispatch SMS by specifying recipient, sender, and message content. Useful for integrating SMS alerts or notifications in automation.

Name: Append Data to Google Sheets Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow that appends predefined data to a specified Google Sheets spreadsheet using OAuth2 authentication. It triggers manually, sets data values, appends them to the sheet, and reads back the updated data, ideal for simple data entry automation with Google Sheets.

Name: MySQL Execution History Purge Workflow
Description: Automates deletion of MySQL n8n execution logs older than 30 days to maintain database performance. Utilizes n8n's Cron trigger and MySQL node with SQL DELETE queries. Useful for n8n users managing execution history retention.

Name: Mattermost Video Call Invite via Webhook
Description: This n8n workflow listens for POST requests via a webhook, extracts channel and user data, and sends a customized video call invite message through the Mattermost API, using dynamic URLs based on usernames. Useful for team communication automation.

Name: Dropbox File Fetch and List Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow automating Dropbox operations: fetching a folder, downloading a file from URL, uploading it to Dropbox, then listing folder contents. Utilizes Dropbox API and HTTP Request node to manage files programmatically.

Name: HelpScout Customer Created Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers on new customer creation events in HelpScout using the HelpScout OAuth2 API. It listens for 'customer.created' events via a webhook to automate updates or integrations when a new customer is added.

Name: Affinity List Creation Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers when a new list is created in Affinity CRM. It uses the Affinity API via a webhook to receive real-time updates, enabling automated responses to list creation events.

Name: Upload & List Files in S3 Bucket
Description: Automates downloading a file via HTTP, uploading it to an Amazon S3 bucket, then retrieving and listing all files in that bucket using n8n's HTTP Request and S3 nodes.

Name: Save Random Cocktail Data as JSON File
Description: This n8n workflow fetches a random cocktail recipe from the CocktailDB API using an HTTP Request node, converts the JSON response to binary data, and writes it to a local JSON file named cocktail.json. Useful for drink recipe collection and automation.

Name: Taiga Issue Create-Update-Get Workflow
Description: Automates issue management on Taiga using n8n nodes. It creates an issue, updates its description, and retrieves the issue details via Taiga Cloud API, triggered manually in n8n. Useful for project tracking automation.

Name: Periodic Google Sheets Sync
Description: Automates syncing data within the same Google Sheets document every 2 minutes using n8n's Cron trigger and Google Sheets API nodes. It reads data from a specified range and updates two sheet areas simultaneously, ensuring data consistency and automation.

Name: Wufoo Form Submission Trigger
Description: An n8n workflow that triggers an automation when a Wufoo form named 'n8n' is submitted. Uses Wufoo API webhook integration to receive real-time form submission data, enabling seamless triggering of further automations.

Name: Medium Publication Post Publisher
Description: An n8n workflow to publish posts directly to a Medium publication using the Medium API. Triggered manually, it streamlines content publishing by automating the posting process to a specified Medium publication.

Name: Fetch CircleCI Pipeline Data

Description: An n8n workflow that generates mock JSON data objects and consolidates them into a single array object using JavaScript functions inside n8n. Useful for testing and prototyping data handling workflows without external APIs.

Name: Spanish Text Case and Replace Demo
Description: n8n workflow demonstrating string manipulations like toLowerCase, toUpperCase and replace on Spanish text using executeCommand nodes triggered manually. Ideal for beginners learning text processing in n8n with simple command line snippets.

Name: Assign Variables Using Set Node
Description: A simple n8n workflow demonstrating how to assign values to variables of different types (number, string, boolean) using the Set node triggered manually. Ideal for beginners learning value assignment in n8n automation.

Name: Manual Trigger with Crypto Node Demo
Description: This n8n workflow demonstrates a manual trigger that executes a Crypto node to process a simple string ('n8n rocks!'). It uses n8n's built-in manual trigger and crypto encryption tools for basic cryptographic operations. Ideal for learning node chaining and crypto usage.

Name: Basic Conditional Workflow Demo
Description: An n8n workflow demonstrating manual trigger, creation of test data, conditional branching based on 'id' field, and setting different string values. Uses n8n native nodes: Manual Trigger, Function, IF condition, and Set nodes for flow control and data assignment.

Name: Manual Trigger to Execute Workflow
Description: A simple n8n workflow that uses a manual trigger node to initiate the execution of another predefined workflow by its ID. Utilizes n8n's internal executeWorkflow node to chain workflows. Ideal for manual control and testing purposes.

Name: ID-Based Conditional Set Workflow
Description: An n8n workflow using manual trigger, function, and switch nodes to map IDs (0,1,2) to specific string values (n8n, nodemation, nathan). It demonstrates conditional branching and data transformation without external APIs.

Name: Basic Array Mapper Workflow
Description: Simple n8n workflow using Function nodes to generate mock array data and map each element into individual JSON objects. Demonstrates basic data transformation without external APIs or integrations.

Name: Create JSON Items from Mock Data
Description: An n8n workflow that generates a mock list of user objects and converts them into individual JSON items using Function nodes. Useful for testing or prototyping JSON data processing without external APIs.

Name: Gmail to AI Auto Reply Assistant
Description: Automatically reads new Gmail messages, uses AI to generate a smart reply, and saves the draft back to Gmail. Uses Gmail API and OpenAI.

Name: Retell AI Outbound Call Trigger
Description: This workflow uses a headless browser (via HTTP) to scrape any website, uses AI to clean the "messy" HTML into clean data, and saves it into a Google Sheet.

Name: AI PDF Research Assistant (Perplexity AI Style)
Description: Automatically triggers a Retell AI outbound call when a new lead is added to a CRM. It sends the lead's name and goal to the Retell agent via API.

Name: Automated SaaS Competitor Monitor
Description: Scrapes competitor pricing pages once a week. If a price change is detected, it summarizes the change and alerts the marketing team on Discord.

Name: Multilingual Support Bot (WhatsApp)
Description: Receives WhatsApp messages in any language. Uses AI to detect the language, translate it to English for the agent, and translate the agent's reply back to the user's language.

Name: AI Podcast Show Notes Generator
Description: Watches a Google Drive folder for new MP3 files. Uses OpenAI Whisper to transcribe and GPT-4o to generate show notes, timestamps, and social media clips.

Name: Crypto Portfolio Rebalancer
Description: Checks your Binance wallet every 24 hours. If any coin exceeds its target percentage (e.g., 50% BTC), it calculates the trade needed to rebalance and sends a Slack approval.
